Name: bofrost*
Description:
bofrost* steht seit fast 60 Jahren für erstklassige Qualität, herausragenden Service und vor allem individuelle Beratung. Das 1966 gegründete Familienunternehmen mit Hauptsitz in Straelen am Niederrhein ist heute mit 258 Niederlassungen in 11 europäischen Ländern der europäische Marktführer im Direktvertrieb von Eis- und Tiefkühlspezialitäten. 3,7 Millionen Kunden, davon rund 2 Millionen in Deutschland, wissen die lückenlos geschlossene Tiefkühlkette und die erstklassige Frische, aber auch die Reinheits- und Geschmacksgarantie zu schätzen. Nachhaltigkeit, der verantwortungsvolle Umgang mit den Ressourcen der Natur und soziales Engagement sind wichtige Bestandteile der Firmenphilosophie. 

Seit Unternehmensgründung setzt sich bofrost* für Kinder in Not ein. In den vergangenen Jahren hat das Unternehmen durch das Engagement seiner Kunden und Mitarbeiter verschiedene Projekte für hilfsbedürftige Kinder mit insgesamt über 16 Millionen Euro allein in Deutschland unterstützt. Seit 2016 ist bofrost* Partner der „Stiftung RTL – Wir helfen Kindern e. V.“.

YooKatale is a mobile food market for selling, buying and advertising food products and services in Uganda, Africa. 

We offer our services to homes and commercial 
clients.

Mission: To make food accessible everywhere. 
Vision : To connect people & communities to healthy  food anywhere.  
 
Core values 
Focus on the customer. 
Respect everyone. 
 Simplify everything.  
Be authentic & curious.  
Respect opportunities.  
Never give up.  

Work Culture
We are a hybrid company that integrates both physical and digital technology solutions to uplift & solve everyday problems in society.  

 Hybrid organizational structure.
 Yookatale's culture can be described as having a hierarchical structure, where the focus is on being customer-centric first, placing employees second, and considering stakeholders as the final priority. This approach emphasizes the importance of prioritizing customer needs and satisfaction, followed by ensuring the well-being and engagement of employees, and finally, considering the interests of stakeholders in the decision-making process. This hierarchy reflects a strategic alignment towards delivering value to customers, fostering a positive work environment for employees, and maintaining relationships with stakeholders to support the overall success of the organization.

Our mission is to free the naan and to bring fresh, healthy Indian food options to more households in the region.

Our flagship grocery flagship products include Tuk Took’s original naan, naan pizza, samosas, curry pastes/sauces, and wraps. 
 
Our flagship restaurant products include Tuk Took’s Ayurvedic power grain salads, smoothies, bowls (butter chicken, saag paneer), and the ever-refreshing mango lassi.

Tuk Took is named after the legendary 3-wheeled vehicle (also known as a tuk-tuk or rickshaw) found throughout Asia.

Name: Eatance
Description:
Revolutionizing Food Ordering with Fair, Transparent, and Rewarding Ecosystem

At Eatance, we believe in fairness, savings, and empowerment—for restaurants and diners alike. Unlike traditional food ordering platforms that charge up to 60% marketing commission and restrict restaurant control, Eatance is built to break the cycle and put power back into the hands of businesses and consumers.

What Makes Eatance Different?
 $0 Commissions – Restaurants keep 100% of their revenue.
 Real Menu Prices – No markups, no hidden fees, real offers, just real savings for diners.
 AI-Powered & Data-Driven – Smart recommendations, order scheduling, and targeted deals.
 QR-Based Ordering & Google food & Social media Digital Menus – Less wait time, faster service, and higher efficiency.
 Event Management  – Serving time reduced from 80 seconds to just 15 seconds!
 Price Match Guarantee – A game-changing offer ensuring diners ensuring diners always get the best price.
 Marketing & Growth Support – Helping restaurants reach real diners, manage their social media, and drive demand generation marketing.

Impact So Far
—> 28K+ Downloads | 300+ Restaurants Onboarded (50+ Live in GTA) | 
—> 17k+ Orders in Just 3 Days at an Event |  Millions of Impressions
—> Ranked 45th on the Canadian App Store 

Join Eatance Today! 
Whether you’re a restaurant looking to grow, 
A diner looking to save, or 
An investor looking for the next big disruptor, 
Eatance is the future of commission-free, transparent, and customer-first food ordering.

Let’s Connect & Create a Fair Food Future!

Name: Jaml App - تطبيق جمل
Description:
We created a local food delivery app shaped by the values we grew up with such as warmth, familiarity, the Nashama spirit, and the Fazaa mindset that Jordanians are naturally known for.

Our aim is to bring small moments of comfort closer to homes, families, and neighborhoods in a way that feels simple, human, and truly local. Jaml connects customers, restaurants, and delivery captains through a platform designed for everyday life. We work with local partners who shape the city’s food culture and rely on captains who carry the energy of the Nashama in the way they treat every order.

The entire journey from choosing a meal to receiving it stays clear, friendly, and close to the routines people know. We are committed to supporting communities across Jordan by helping customers feel cared for, restaurants grow with confidence, and captains work within a fair and reliable system.

Jaml continues to grow with the same heart that started it all, building a delivery experience rooted in Jordanian values and shaped for every moment that matters.

Name: Twamashrita Food
Description:
Twamashrita Food is a leading food delivery marketplace which was launched in 2023 to empower the women and make them independent. This platform is specially developed for talented housewives who are passionate and experts in cooking and have a desire to earn sitting at home. Customers who are interested in having delicious homemade food can visit our online marketplace and place orders for food which shall be delivered at their doorstep. This will facilitate the women to earn something sitting at home and also the customers who shall be served tasty, homely food.

Besides, we also supply food from different hotels according to the choice of the customers. They can simply place their orders through our website stating clearly the type and quantity of food they require and the name of the hotel, if any specific, they need so that our delivery staff can deliver at their place.

Name: Laheq Halak
Description:
Don’t Waste, Just Taste

Welcome to Laheq Halak, is an innovative app dedicated to reducing food waste and promoting sustainability in Palestine. By connecting local vendors, farmers, and distributors with consumers, Laheq Halak ensures that surplus and high-quality produce is accessible and affordable.

Our mission is to support local communities and the environment by offering value-for-money deals on fresh produce that might otherwise go to waste. Each purchase through Laheq Halak helps local farmers and distributors thrive, contributing to a more sustainable and resilient food system.

At Laheq Halak, we believe in making conscious choices that benefit both people and the planet. Join us in our commitment to reducing food waste, supporting local businesses, and creating a greener future for Palestine.

Description: In today's fast-paced world, convenience is key, especially when it comes to getting food delivered to your doorstep. Wide Range of Options: Tarpli Food offers a vast selection of restaurants and cuisines to choose from. Whether you're craving sushi, pizza, or local delicacies, you can find it all on the app. With a variety of options available, you're sure to find something that suits your taste buds. 2. Introducing Kitchen Ghar, your ultimate solution for lightning-fast, hassle-free grocery delivery right to your doorstep. Say goodbye to long lines at the supermarket and tedious trips to gather your essentials – with Fresh2Door, your groceries are just a click away and arrive within a mere 15 minutes.

At Kitchen Ghar, we understand the importance of convenience and efficiency in today's fast-paced world. That's why we've revolutionized the grocery shopping experience, offering an extensive selection of fresh vegetables, fruits, pantry staples, and household essentials, all available at your fingertips through our user-friendly mobile app or website.

With our state-of-the-art logistics network and advanced technology, we guarantee swift and reliable delivery, ensuring that your order reaches you promptly and in pristine condition. Whether you need ingredients for tonight's dinner, last-minute snacks for unexpected guests, or simply want to stock up on everyday items, Fresh2Door has you covered.

Our commitment to quality extends beyond just our products – we prioritize sustainability and source locally whenever possible, supporting farmers and communities while reducing our carbon footprint. Plus, with our competitive pricing and frequent promotions, you can enjoy the convenience of Fresh2Door without breaking the bank.

Experience the future of grocery shopping with Kitchen Ghar – where speed, convenience, and freshness converge to elevate your lifestyle. Order now and discover the joy of stress-free shopping, delivered straight to your door in just 15 minutes.

 What We Are Planning To Do:

Description:
Maison Planche, c’est l’apéro sans compromis.
Des produits rigoureusement sélectionnés, des planches prêtes à déguster, et un seul objectif : sublimer chaque moment de convivialité.

Fondée à Paris, Maison Planche s’est imposée comme la référence n°1 de la planche apéritive en France, avec plus de 5 000 clients conquis, un développement rapide sur plusieurs canaux, et une exigence constante sur la qualité.

 Notre mission :
Sauver vos apéros — que ce soit chez vous, en entreprise ou dans les rayons. Parce qu’un moment partagé mérite bien plus qu’un snack improvisé.

 Trois canaux pour un même standard de qualité :
 Livraison express (Deliveroo / Uber Eats)
Des planches apéritives premium livrées en moins d’une heure à Paris et bientôt partout en France. Fromages affinés, charcuteries d’exception, pain artisanal, condiments triés sur le volet.

 Offre entreprise & traiteur événementiel
Afterworks, séminaires, comités de direction, soirées clients… Maison Planche livre des apéritifs prêts à servir, dans un format clé en main. Demandez votre devis personnalisé et marquez les esprits.

 Grande distribution
Nos best-sellers sont désormais disponibles chez Monoprix, pour permettre à chacun de profiter de l'expérience Maison Planche à tout moment.

 Notre exigence :
Chaque produit est sélectionné pour sa qualité, son goût et sa capacité à bien tenir dans le temps. Chaque planche est conçue pour être aussi belle que bonne. Et chaque détail compte : du packaging à la découpe, tout est pensé pour offrir une expérience sans faute.

 Basée à Paris, Maison Planche se développe partout en France à travers un réseau de partenaires, bars, restaurants et enseignes qui partagent notre passion de l’apéritif bien fait.

Bock auf eine Vitaminbombe am Arbeitsplatz?

Name: HerFoodCode
Description:
Bij HerFoodCode helpen we vrouwen ontdekken welk voedsel écht werkt voor hun lichaam – afgestemd op hun hormonen, cyclus en gezondheid. Ons platform vertaalt wetenschappelijke inzichten over voeding en vrouwelijke hormoongezondheid naar praktische, begrijpelijke adviezen.

Wist je dat 10-20% van de vrouwen PCOS heeft? Deze hormonale disbalans kan zorgen voor klachten zoals een onregelmatige cyclus, verminderde vruchtbaarheid, hardnekkige huidproblemen en meer. Toch is de juiste voeding vaak dé ontbrekende schakel in de zorg.

Wij combineren bestaande wetenschappelijke kennis met data-gedreven inzichten om vrouwen te ondersteunen. Tegelijkertijd bouwen we actief mee aan toekomstig onderzoek, zodat kennis over voeding en vrouwelijke gezondheid verder groeit.

Elke vrouw verdient het om haar eigen voedingscode te kunnen ontcijferen – en te weten wat haar lichaam wanneer nodig heeft.

Name: Antojos PR
Description:
Discover the Essence of Puerto Rican Cuisine with Antojos PR 

Welcome to a world where each bite transports you to the heart of Puerto Rico, where the vibrant flavors and rich traditions of the island come alive. At Antojos PR we're not just a food truck – we're a culinary journey that tantalizes taste buds and creates memories.

About Us:
Nestled within the walls of our food truck is a treasure trove of Puerto Rican delights. From the sizzling aroma of our signature pernil to the crisp perfection of our tostones, every dish is a tribute to the diverse, spirited culture of Puerto Rico. We're more than a business; we're a celebration of heritage and the joy of sharing authentic flavors.

Our Mission:
Our mission is simple yet profound: to bring the warmth of Puerto Rican cuisine to your plate and the rhythm of the island to your soul. With each dish we serve, we're not just offering food – we're offering a piece of Puerto Rico, made with passion and served with a smile.

Our Team:
Our food truck isn't just a vessel for food; it's a vessel for connection. Our team members are more than just staff – they're the storytellers who engage customers in the tales of our dishes, the artists who craft each meal with care, and the welcoming faces that greet you like old friends.

Experience the Island Craving Vibes:
When you step up to our window, you're not just ordering a meal; you're immersing yourself in an experience. The lively atmosphere, the tantalizing scents, and the vibrant colors all combine to create an experience that goes beyond food. It's about savoring life's simple pleasures and feeling the heartbeat of Puerto Rico in every bite.
Connect with Us:
Follow us on social media IG:@AntojosPrinVa or FB: Antojos PR to stay updated on our whereabouts, events, and the irresistible dishes we're serving up. Let's embark on this flavorful adventure together!

#IslandCravingVibes #PuertoRicanCuisine #FoodTruckExperience #ComingSoon

Name: Meza Café
Description:
Your Coffee. Their Future.



Meza Café is more than just coffee—we’re a traveling barista team bringing specialty coffee service to community events,
private gatherings, and catered experiences. Whether it’s a city festival, a corporate event, or a wedding, we set up on-
site, crafting high-quality drinks while fostering meaningful connections.



What Makes Us Different?



A Café That Comes to You

We bring the full café experience directly to your event. Our team arrives with everything needed—equipment, ingredients,
and expertise—so you and your guests can enjoy handcrafted drinks without the hassle. Our service is prepaid by the host,
meaning guests simply order and enjoy, making every event feel seamless and special.



Responsible Sourcing, Better Ingredients

Great coffee starts with great sourcing. Every ingredient we use is thoughtfully chosen:

Single-origin, direct-trade coffee that ensures quality and fair pay for growers.
Local honey, maple syrup, and milk to support sustainable farming in our region.
Biodegradable cups—plastic-free, backyard compostable, and better for the environment.
No refined sugar, only natural sweeteners like maple syrup and honey.


Mentoring the Next Generation

Meza Café was founded with a bigger mission: to invest in students. We provide meaningful employment and mentorship
for young people, giving them hands-on experience, professional skills, and the confidence to grow into who they were
created to be. Every cup of coffee you enjoy helps fund youth experiential learning and job training.



A Cup of Coffee, A Lasting Impact

At Meza Café, coffee is just the beginning. By choosing us, you’re not just getting a great drink—you’re supporting ethical
sourcing, local farmers, and the next generation of leaders.

Want Meza Café at your next event? Book us today!

Name: Agiza
Description:
Agiza24 is Tanzania's clinician-led Health-Tech platform, building the ecosystem that connects patients, chefs, and payers to reduce the cost of chronic disease through medically-tailored nutrition.

We are not a food delivery app. We are a data-driven, risk-reduction platform on a mission to solve one of the biggest challenges in African healthcare: dietary non-adherence for chronic disease.

The Problem: Every year, Tanzanian insurers and employers lose billions of shillings to preventable hospitalizations for diabetes and hypertension. This is driven by a simple, structural failure: patients receive clinical advice but lack the tools to execute it safely and consistently.

Our Solution: Agiza24 provides the missing infrastructure. Our vertically integrated ecosystem includes:

 Clinician-Led Platform: A marketplace where users order medically-precise meals prepared by certified chefs.
 A Data-Driven Feedback Loop: Our proprietary app allows patients to log biometric data (like blood sugar) and generate a "Doctor's Report," providing measurable proof of positive health outcomes.
 A B2B Financial Flywheel: Our Closed-Loop Supply Chain Finance model empowers our chef network, ensuring quality and creating a powerful, sticky ecosystem.

We are proving that food, when prescribed and delivered with clinical precision, is the most powerful medicine of all. We partner with insurers, hospitals, and employers to reduce long-term claims costs, improve patient outcomes, and build a healthier, more productive Tanzania.

Specialties: Food as Medicine, Health-Tech, Medically Tailored Meals, Value-Based Healthcare, Chronic Disease Management, Diabetes, Hypertension, and Supply Chain Finance.

Description:

Vi er en mobil pizza-foodtruck fra Hjørring i Nordjylland, specialiseret i italiensk-inspireret napolitansk pizza serveret direkte fra vores ovne. Vores dej er langtidshævet for at opnå en let, luftig bund med sprød kant, og hver pizza tilberedes med fokus på råvarer af yderst høj kvalitet.

Men kvalitet stopper ikke ved maden. Vi arbejder struktureret, professionelt og effektivt – så jeres arrangement kører problemfrit. Vi kommer til tiden, sætter hurtigt op, har styr på flowet og serverer med tempo og overblik. Samtidig skaber vi en varm og hyggelig stemning, hvor duften af friskbagt pizza fra ovnen bliver en del af oplevelsen.

The Dough Bros er det oplagte valg, når I ønsker et luksuriøst, uformelt og mindeværdigt cateringkoncept, der får jeres gæster til at tale om maden længe efter.

Perfekt til:
• Firmafester og personalearrangementer
• Universiteter og uddannelsesinstitutioner
• Bryllupper og private fejringer
• Kommunale og offentlige events
• Festivaler og større arrangementer

 Baseret i Hjørring – vi kører primært i Nordjylland og ved større arrangementer i hele Danmark.

Name: Agiza24
Description:
Does your heart stop for a second every time you or a loved one eats? For the 2.9 million Tanzanians with diabetes, that fear is a daily reality.

Agiza is the solution. We are not another food delivery app. We are a clinician-led health platform that gives you back control.

END MEALTIME ANXIETY:
Describe your doctor's exact dietary prescription—low-sodium, controlled carbs, no sugar, specific allergens—and our medically-trained chefs will prepare it with absolute precision.

TRUSTED, CERTIFIED CHEFS:
Our network of local home chefs are all graduates of the Agiza Academy, a rigorous training program in therapeutic nutrition designed and overseen by our co-founder, a licensed medical doctor. You see their certifications and ratings before you order.

A LIFELINE, NOT A MENU:
Stop searching through menus that don't understand your needs. With Agiza, you state your requirements, and qualified chefs compete to create your perfect, safe meal.

FEATURES:
 Create detailed, medically-specific meal requests.
 Receive and compare bids from certified local chefs.
 View chef profiles, certifications, and reviews.
 Meal photo analyser
 Load daily blood sugar reading
 Generate and share doctor's report
 Smart meal request builder
 Glycemic Index (GI) checker
 Glycemic Load (GL) calculator
 Schedule recurring orders for daily peace of mind.
 Track your meal from preparation to delivery.
 Plate builder
 Secure in-app payments via mobile money.

You were given a diagnosis, but you were never given a map. Or, you have health goal. Agiza is that map. Download today and experience the relief of knowing your food is finally safe.

Name: Ambos
Description: En espagnol, « ambos » signifie « les deux ». Pas besoin de vous faire un dessin, on parle de Cristina Chomet Tejeda et Pierre Chomet, « les deux » au restaurant comme à la maison. En face du Sénat et du Jardin du Luxembourg, ils accueillent leurs convives chez eux, sérieux comme un débat dans l’hémicycle, légers comme une promenade entre les arbres et les joueurs d’échec. Les matières sont brutes, pierre, brique et bois. Le lieu a été rendu à ses origines, dans ce quartier historique de Paris, mais dans un esprit contemporain. Le soleil s’invite presque toute la journée à travers la baie vitrée, éclairant les murs couleur crème. La hauteur sous plafond donne du souffle, les plateaux des tables en chêne clair contrastent avec le sol foncé. À droite, la cuisine s’ouvre sur un comptoir en L inversé où quelques privilégiés peuvent s’asseoir, devant le passe. La table des chef·fes, sur réservation, on la trouve au sous-sol, en empruntant un escalier, promesse de plongée dans un univers à part. Cave voûtée, secret le mieux gardé de nombreuses demeures au coeur de Paris, éclairage tamisé, carreaux de terre cuite, grande table d’hôte pour 6 ou 8 personnes, on mange et l’on boit au milieu des casiers à bouteilles. Du plaisir à tous les étages.

We bring carnival eats and treats to the table by fostering sweet nostalgia in our menu! We have a number of yummy options including foot-long corn dogs, bacon-wrapped sausage, sweet funnel cakes, ribbon fries, and thirst-quenching lemonade.

We are available for catering, private events, parties, or any other venues that need a food truck with state fair themed foods!

Name: No Frickin Chicken
Description:
No Frickin Chicken was created by a conversation between two vegans (Patrick & Hana) on holiday, walking along a street, towards a bus stop that had a KFC advert on it.

Disgusted by the advert... Patrick made an announcement “how about if I made vegan chicken, that not only tasted better, but was cruelty free... And I will call it... 'No Frickin Chicken!'“

The idea sparked something, meal deal names, shake ideas & funny slogans... World domination?

Luckily, the chap behind the idea was a qualified chef, with many years of experience. His keen attitude, passion to find the perfect taste & drive to make this idea a reality, brings us to the now...

No Frickin Chicken is an American style foodie trailer, serving delicious vegan fried chicken boxes and burgers. Rocking up at Festivals, Food Markets, High Streets and Events! We will be offering you high quality fast food, that tastes and looks delicious. We have many gluten free options, so no one misses out. We have a wide range of dishes, from burgers, boxes, baos, fries, desserts and shakes. 

We care about the planet just as much as we care about animals, so we are trying our best to be zero waste and all our cutlery is biodegradable.

We are a small, independent business, just the two of us, with a team of friends helping out at festivals and events. We cannot wait to meet you and feed your faces!

Name: Healthy Eats
Description:
What started out as one person's ‘What’s for Lunch’ dilemma quickly evolved into a search for a solution to a much bigger problem: convenient food shouldn't sacrifice nutrition. 

That's why at Healthy Eats we take so much pride in connecting busy people with meals that taste great while helping them reach their goals.

Our menu rotates seasonally to reflect the produce that's available locally. All sauces, marinades, and salsas are made in-house by our talented kitchen team.

Since we launched, we've helped people ease their mealtime worries and feel assured that they're fueling their bodies to maximize their energy and life. It's amazing to see so many people achieve their goals through our meal prep service and to know we're all #supportinglocal businesses along the way.

We're in the process of expanding to new locations to continue connecting local food to local communities through nutritious meals prepped and delivered to the front door.

Check out our website to see our current menu offerings for weekly subscriptions, meal packs, and à la carte purchases to experience the #FarmtoFolks difference for yourself!

Name: Eluo Food
Description:
Eluo Food – The Fairer Way to Order and Deliver!

Eluo Food is transforming how local restaurants, takeaways, and delivery drivers do business. Unlike traditional delivery platforms, we don’t take 30%+ commission — restaurants keep 100% of their sales, drivers keep every penny of their delivery fees, and customers pay no extra service charges.

For Restaurants: No commission, free menu setup, and freedom to use your own delivery team or ours.

For Drivers: Keep all delivery fees, work directly with restaurants, and earn more for every order.

For Customers: Pay what the restaurant charges — no hidden fees, no inflated prices.

We believe in a fairer, more local-first approach that supports Dundee’s food scene, helps small businesses thrive, and ensures drivers are properly rewarded for their work.

Join us in building the future of food delivery — where everyone wins.

Name: Noofy App
Description:
Noofy is a mobile application developed by an Algerian start-up. It enables users to have food and groceries delivered to their doorsteps. On its website, the startup behind the app explains: “When Noofy founder and CEO Nacer Eddine Gacem returned to Algiers in 2022, he discovered a city full of excellent restaurants open at night, but was astonished that there was no option for food and grocery delivery as well as tobacco delivery at night. He made it his personal mission to bring the best local night store work right to people's doorsteps.” In line with its commitment, the startup has developed a mobile application, accessible for Android and iOS devices. Through that app, a user can create an account, with just a phone number, and check the restaurants and stores listed. 

Among other things, users can buy local or western foods, and stock up on groceries and other goods from convenience stores, specialty stores, or supermarkets.

To further simplify the process, Noofy requires users to enter their geographic location before anything. Based on that location, the app will suggest nearby restaurants or stores to reduce delivery time. 

Apart from food and grocery, Noofy also delivers tobacco and medicines on demand. Its delivery drivers ride bicycles to reduce the startup’s environmental impacts. 

The idea is successful since, according to Play Store data, in about one year of existence, the Noofy Android app has been downloaded more than a thousand times. Nevertheless, the startup, which currently operates in Algiers, seeks to expand to other large cities including Oran, Constantine, Setif, and Tlemcen.
Location: Algiers, Les Vergers, Bir Mourad Rais

Name: DropDeli
Description:
Drop Deli is a food delivery app designed to make ordering your favorite meals quick and hassle-free. With just one tap, you can order food from a variety of local restaurants and have it delivered right to your doorstep, no matter where you are. Whether you’re craving comfort food, healthy meals, or something unique, Drop Deli connects you with a wide range of cuisines tailored to your preferences.

The app is built for convenience, offering real-time tracking so you know exactly when your order will arrive. Drivers are carefully selected to ensure fast and accurate deliveries, making sure your food reaches you fresh and on time. Drop Deli also takes customer satisfaction seriously, with a feature that automatically updates balances if a rider doesn’t have change, ensuring a smooth transaction experience every time.

Drop Deli is more than just a delivery app—it's a seamless connection between customers and their favorite restaurants. By focusing on both the customer and the driver experience, Drop Deli creates a delivery ecosystem that prioritizes speed, accuracy, and ease of use. For drivers, the app offers flexible opportunities to earn money, while customers enjoy the convenience of having meals delivered to them quickly, even in busy cities.

Available on both iOS and Android, Drop Deli is perfect for anyone looking to simplify their food ordering experience. Download the app today to discover the easiest way to get your meals delivered.

Name: UMASHI
Description:
At UMASHI, we believe convenience should never come at the cost of quality. Inspired by Japanese craftsmanship and rooted in Hawai‘i’s local flavors, we create meals that are intentional, nourishing, and designed with care — meals that maintain their taste and integrity whether enjoyed fresh, cold, or reheated.

Unlike typical bento shops or local “grab-and-go” counters, UMASHI is committed to raising the standard of convenience food in Hawai‘i. We prioritize nutrition, food safety, and consistency, applying the same attention to detail you find in Japan. From labeling and ingredient sourcing to presentation and customer experience, every element is guided by intention.

UMASHI fills the space between fast food and fine dining — approachable and efficient, yet always respectful of quality and culture. Our focus is on delivering high-quality meals quickly and reliably, while offering something more than the familiar options people are used to.

Looking ahead, UMASHI envisions becoming Hawai‘i’s trusted name for modern convenience food — a brand that people rely on daily for meals that provide comfort, nutrition, and cultural connection. We remain guided by three core principles that define us:

1.	Intention in Every Detail
2.	Balance Between Quality and Accessibility
3.	Respect for Culture and Community

Follow UMASHI as we redefine what grab-and-go dining can be — intentional, nourishing, and rooted in culture. Thank you for your support!

Name: BAYE FoodMart
Description:
BAYE FoodMart is an innovative multi-vendor digital platform that connects youth and women-led agribusinesses to high-value markets through e-commerce, logistics, and digitized Business Development Support services. 

It is a flagship initiative of BAYE Africa, working to unlock inclusive, tech-driven solutions for food systems transformation and MSME empowerment across Kenya.

BAYE FoodMart offers digital and physical food distribution platform that sources fresh, high-quality agricultural products—particularly from young farmers and SMEs—and delivers them directly to consumers, institutions, and retailers. 

It promotes sustainable agriculture, reduces food waste, and empowers youth agripreneurs.

Vision: To be Kenya’s leading youth-powered digital food marketplace delivering fresh, local, and affordable food from farm to fork.

Mission: To connect youth agripreneurs with sustainable market opportunities while offering fresh, healthy, and affordable food to consumers.

Business Model: Youth-led agrifood distribution & retail

Powered by: BAYE Africa

Location: Kenya (HQ with scalable regional operations)

Name: MOTTOZ
Description:
Founded in 2020, we set out with an audacious goal: to revolutionize the support system for micro-entrepreneurs. In these few years, our commitment to fostering a robust ecosystem for small businesses has not only resonated but also brought about tangible change.

Gaining acceptance into the revered Microsoft for Startups program was a significant milestone. It reinforced our vision and provided the impetus to further our endeavors. On the digital front, we've launched 6 user-centric applications, available on both the PlayStore and AppStore, serving thousands of users daily.

One of our standout achievements is the registration of over 2 million dishes, painting a vivid picture of America's diverse culinary landscape. This rich tapestry is a testament to the micro-entrepreneurs we serve.

Understanding the pivotal role of logistics, we've ventured into streamlining deliveries for our businesses. Our driver's app, with over 5,000 downloads, is a testament to our dedication to ensuring that our partner businesses' products reach their customers efficiently.

But our vision extends beyond just tools and platforms. We are a movement, a community dedicated to the dreams and aspirations of the many micro-businesses that form the backbone of the U.S. economy. As we forge ahead, we invite you to be part of our journey, championing the spirit of entrepreneurship, innovation, and community. Together, we aim to redefine the boundaries of what micro-businesses can achieve in today's fast-paced digital world.

Description:
Conty tarjoaa asiakkailleen siirrettäviä ammattikeittiöitä väistötiloiksi, tapahtumiin tai muuhun tilapäiseen tarpeeseen. Keittiöt ovat täysin varusteltuja ja ne toimitetaan paikan päälle käyttövalmiina. Palvelemme kuntia, kaupunkeja, teollisuutta sekä yksityistä palvelusektoria kaikissa tilapäisissä ja pidempiaikaisissa väistökeittiöratkaisuissa.

Mobiilikeittiön avulla pystyt tuottamaan katkeamatonta ruokapalvelua poikkeustilanteessa, nopeallakin aikataululla.Olemme suunnitelleet kaikki väistökeittiömme yhdessä ruoka-alan ammattilaisten kanssa palvelemaan kaikkia keittiötarpeita. Nopeimmillaan keittiö on käyttövalmiina muutamissa tunneissa. Lyhytaikaisiin tarpeisiin saat meiltä täysin varustellut perävaunukeittiöt tai erittäin kätevät keittiöpakut. Pitkäaikaisiin tarpeisiin toimitamme modulaariset konttikeittiöt aina asiakkaan tarpeiden mukaan mitoitettuina ja varusteltuina.

Name: Uudenmaan Ruoka
Description:
Uudenmaan Ruoka yhdistää sinut ja paikalliset viljelijät, kalastajat ja leipurit ilman turhia välikäsiä.
Vastavoimaksi isoille kaupan toimijoille perustimme Suomen ensimmäisen tuottajien ja kuluttajien omistaman osuuskunnan. Olemme vastuullisen paikallisen ruoan tilaus-, sopimus- ja markkinointikanava pääkaupunkiseudulla. Palvelua on kehitetty läheisessä yhteistyössä ekompi.net alustan kehittäjien kanssa. Edistämme ruokajärjestelmän maailmanlaajuista muutosta tukemalla paikallista ruoantuotantoa.
Kuluttajille osuuskunta mahdollistaa viikottain vuoden ympäri helpon tavan ostaa sesongin raaka-aineita ja tuotteita nettialustalta. Noutaminenkin on tehty vaivattomaksi joustavin aikatauluin itsepalvelu noutopisteistä. Etukäteen tilatuilla ruuilla vastaamme suoraan asiakkaan tarpeeseen ja vältämme ruokahävikkiä. Tuottajille tärkeintä on kumppanuus, joka perustuu avoimeen hinnoitteluun ja yhteistyöhön esim. kuljetuksissa. 
Olemme pioneereina kehittäneet läpinäkyviä lähiruokamalleja helpottamaan lähiruuan myyntiä suoraan tiloilta paikallisille asukkaille. Kehittämämme malli on otettu myös muualla käyttöön. On syntynyt omia paikallisia organisaatioita mm. Pohjois-Savon ruoka, Kemiönsaaren ruoka ja Turun seudulle Laari Lähiruokapiste. 
Elä satokautta kanssamme!

uudenmaanruoka.fi

Name: Oregon Mobile Food Association
Description:
The Oregon Mobile Food Association is a non-profit organization dedicated to unifying and promoting the Oregon mobile food industry. Serving as a resource for them, as well as, local governments, community organizations, and the public.  As members, we are united in the common goal of elevating our image as mobile food vendors, giving exceptional customer service, and supporting the communities we serve in meaningful ways through education, advocacy, and community outreach.

The Oregon Mobile Food Association was officially launched in April 2018 as an advocacy organization, hoping to help food trucks succeed in this very competitive industry.  We aim to serve as a central hub of communication and information, a catering referral, information resource, and provide local and state-level proactive lobbying and advocacy.

From weddings to parties and everything in between, we're here to elevate your event with mouthwatering BBQ flavours. And for that extra touch of charm, find us popping up in pub gardens around Norfolk, bringing the smoke to your outdoor gatherings. Let's make your next event a delicious success with The Arrogant BBQ

Name: frisches.ch
Description:
Der Onlineshop www.frisches.ch liefert frische Produkte vom Bauernhof schnell und persönlich an Konsumenten direkt nach Hause. Alle Produkte stammen von Bauern und Lieferanten aus der Region Bern und dem Seeland. Das Sortiment umfasst neben frischem Gemüse und Früchten auch eigenes Fleisch, Teigwaren, Brot sowie weitere, teils auch saisonale Produkte. Viele Produkte gibt es bei frisches.ch in BIO-Qualität, damit die unterschiedlichen Bedürfnisse aller Konsumenten abgedeckt werden. Eine hohe Qualität aller Produkte ist bei frisches.ch selbstverständlich!

Die Lieferung erfolgt unkompliziert und bequem nach Hause. Das Liefergebiet für die persönlichen Lieferungen umfasst die Stadt Bern, die Gemeinde Köniz, Ostermundigen, Bremgarten, Gümligen und Muri. Per Post kann in die gesamte Schweiz geliefert werden.

Das oberste Ziel von frisches.ch ist der Aufbau einer Win-Win-Situation für Lieferanten und Kunden. Die Kunden geniessen die geschmackvollen und erntefrischen Lieferungen bequem nach Hause und sparen die Zeit des Einkaufs. Die Bauern und Produzenten profitieren bei diesem innovativen Konzept von einem Anstieg ihrer Absätze und fairen Preisen.

Name: Rangão Cozinha Industrial

Our menu is carefully crafted to ensure every bite is a burst of flavor, quality, and satisfaction. Join us for a culinary adventure that celebrates taste and convenience.

Name: FlipnFast: Fun-omenal 'Free From' Food
Description:
Back in 2016, in her instantly recognisable pink pod, Anna began flipping crepes around the North East.

Things are a little different now, we have a team of fast flippers and can often be found at two or three events in one day! 

Not just that, but we are the ‘free from’ caterer to have at any event. FlipnFast is a 100% gluten free and vegan business. Our homemade batter recipe is free from all 14 top allergens. Our aim is that, no matter your dietary requirements, you can enjoy our food!
We really are so proud and happy when we see faces light up when people realise that they can eat our food!
Location: Newcastle Upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear

Description:

Name: Sconed
Description:
Sconed enriches connections by providing artisan baked goods and portable, hand-crafted espresso experiences. 

Starbucks created an innovative plan in its formative years. The company wanted to become the “third place” for people to meet around a shared experience. The idea was that people naturally connected first at home then at work. This “third place” concept enabled individuals to deepen relationships and foster community.

This has proven to be a successful model for coffee shops around the world. But we’ve taken it one step further. Instead of a traditional brick-and-mortar, we bring rich connection to you.

We are fully portable but offer the same artisan baked goods and hand-crafted espresso beverages you would traditionally find in any coffee shop. We’ve fostered community and connection in break rooms, board rooms, at wedding receptions, and more. Our charming and creative setup paired with tasty scones and quality coffee offers a new way to create a “third place” wherever you are. The result is genuine connection and enhanced conversation.

Description:
Wie wil er niet gezond zijn? Gezond eten, met veel verse heerlijke groenten en fruit is één van de belangrijkste stappen die je kan zetten. En toch is dit niet evident. De verleiding van andere dingen is groot en tegelijk is de kwaliteit van grootschalig gekweekte groenten & fruit verrassend laag. Deze grootschaligheid verwoest niet enkel onze gezondheid, maar ook de vruchtbaarheid van onze grond.

Gelukkig kan het ook anders! GrondGezond brengt lokale, biologische groenten en fruit, gekweekt volgens grondherstellende methodes, tot in jouw supermarkt (momenteel de Spar in Diest en Halen).

Je tekent in voor een abonnement naar keuze of je stelt online zelf je bestelling samen of je kiest en koopt op de Citadel Diest

Name: Queen City LunchBox
Description:
Queen City LunchBox is Charlotte North Carolina's premier boxed lunch delivery service. We make delicious sandwiches paired with potato salad and chips fresh, and free delivery directly to your office door Thursday's. Our customers include offices, warehouses, retail, dealerships and more. As someone who started my journey in Michigan, I've always had a passion for food and the satisfaction it brings. I spent years working as a line cook and pizza chef, honing my culinary skills and understanding the importance of quality and customer satisfaction. Later, I transitioned into a sales role at Verizon, where I learned the ins and outs of customer service, communication, and business operations.

After years of perfecting my craft in both the culinary and sales industries, I decided to bring these experiences together and embark on a new venture: owning my own business. Combining my love for food with the skills I developed in sales, I've dedicated myself to creating a company that not only delivers quality products but also provides exceptional customer service.

My journey has been shaped by hard work, adaptability, and a relentless pursuit of excellence. I'm excited to continue growing and learning as a business owner, and I'm always open to connecting with others who share a passion for food, sales, or entrepreneurship.

As a Michigan native, I spent years mastering my culinary skills as a line cook and pizza chef before transitioning into sales at Verizon. These experiences fueled my entrepreneurial spirit, leading to the creation of Queen City LunchBox, a boxed lunch delivery service in Charlotte, NC. At Queen City LunchBox, we specialize in delivering fresh, high-quality meals to corporate events, team lunches, and personal gatherings across the city. Combining my passion for food with top-notch customer service, I'm committed to making lunch delivery in Charlotte convenient and satisfying for all our clients.

Offriamo soluzioni chiavi in mano per festival, fiere, concerti, eventi sportivi e aziendali. Il nostro approccio è sartoriale: progettiamo e realizziamo vere e proprie food court esclusive.
Il nostro team ti affianca in ogni fase, dal concept iniziale alla gestione finale, curando ogni dettaglio per massimizzare il risultato.

FOOD & BEVERAGE: selezioniamo i food truck più adatti al tuo pubblico e alla location.
ALLESTIMENTI e ARREDO: progettiamo allestimenti su misura, fornendo tavoli, sedie, luci e grafiche coordinate.
PROGETTAZIONE e CERTIFICAZIONI: gestiamo burocrazia, licenze e permessi per una gestione impeccabile.
SERVIZI AGGIUNTIVI: curiamo l’intrattenimento con artisti e musicisti, gestiamo audio/video e logistica (rifiuti, bagni, sicurezza).

𝗜𝗹 𝗻𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗼 𝘃𝗮𝗹𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗮𝗴𝗴𝗶𝘂𝗻𝘁𝗼
Il nostro modello di business si basa su servizi integrati. Scegliere Food Truck District significa affidarsi a un partner che offre:

Description:
About Us
Welcome to our page! We specialize in bringing the authentic essence of Georgia to the world with our carefully curated selection of BIO, natural, and eco-friendly products.
Our offerings include:
• Georgian Spices: Premium, all-natural blends that add bold, authentic flavors to your cooking. Perfect for traditional Georgian recipes or adding a unique twist to your dishes.
• Natural Churchkhela: A traditional Georgian snack made from BIO grape juice and nuts. Often called the "Georgian Snickers," it’s a delicious and healthy treat packed with energy and nutrients.
• Handmade Wooden Crafts: Beautiful, eco-friendly wooden toys and souvenirs crafted by skilled artisans, showcasing Georgian heritage and charm.
We are committed to sustainability, quality, and supporting Georgian traditions. Our products are designed to bring joy, flavor, and cultural value to your life. Whether you’re looking for a healthy snack, unique cooking ingredients, or a meaningful gift, our store offers something special for everyone.

Name: bites
Description:
Introducing "Bites" – the app that's like having a personal food genie in your pocket! It's not just another app; it's your culinary sidekick with a sense of humor!

Picture this: You tell Bites your dietary preferences, and it responds with restaurant recommendations tailored to your taste buds. It's so good; it's like your food soulmate, minus the awkward dinner dates.

Bites doesn't just know your preferences; it practically finishes your sentences. "Oh, you're in the mood for Italian? How about that cozy spot with the pasta that's so good, it should have its own fan club?"

And don't worry, Bites won't judge you for that secret love affair with extra cheese. In fact, it might encourage it! "Cheese is just milk's way of saying, 'I love you.' Go ahead, order the cheesy goodness!"

Did we mention it's free? Yes, free! Because who says true love can't be affordable?
Download Bites now and let the laughter and lip-smacking recommendations begin! Your taste buds will thank you, and your funny bone might just join in the feast!

Name: Foodbook
Description:
"Trailblazing in Taste: The Success Story of Foodbook Snacks"

Foodbook Snacks, a dynamic player in the snack industry, has captivated consumers with its innovative products and unwavering commitment to quality. This company's journey from a modest startup to a renowned name in the snacking world exemplifies the fusion of culinary creativity and business acumen.

Established in [2018], Foodbook Snacks embarked on a mission to redefine snacking. Armed with a vision to craft unique flavors and healthier options. Through meticulous research, Foodbook Snacks identified gaps in the market and introduced a diverse range of offerings, from artisanal nut mixes to guilt-free baked chips.

Central to Foodbook Snacks' success is its dedication to using premium ingredients. Each product boasts carefully sourced elements that prioritize both taste and nutrition. This commitment has garnered a loyal customer base that values not only the flavors but also the transparency in sourcing.

The company's R&D team consistently experiments with novel flavors, drawing inspiration from global culinary trends. This willingness to push boundaries has birthed iconic products that have set trends and elevated the snacking experience.

With a strong online presence and strategic partnerships, Foodbook Snacks has expanded its reach beyond borders. Collaborations with renowned chefs and influencers have further bolstered its image as a trendsetter. This forward-thinking approach has not only fueled growth but has also solidified the brand's position as an industry leader.

In conclusion, Foodbook Snacks stands as a shining example of a snacks company that blends innovation, quality, and sustainability. From its humble beginnings the company's journey reflects a dedication to elevating the snacking landscape. As Foodbook Snacks continues to evolve and delight, it remains a beacon of inspiration for both aspiring entrepreneurs and discerning snack enthusiasts.

Our menus are intentionally crafted to make life easier: no planning, no prep, no stress. Just balanced, ready-to-enjoy meals delivered with consistency, care, and a signature Little Lunch Co. touch.

We proudly partner with parents, schools, wellness communities, and spaces who value convenient nutrition without compromising on quality or presentation.

Weekly lunchbox subscriptions (kids + moms)

Convenience for busy families

Custom solutions

At Little Lunch Co., we believe nourishment should be simple, beautiful, and accessible, helping you and your family feel your best, every day.

Our founder, Marine Nomblot, is a French chef and the owner of M Cuisine, a private chef catering business. Marine's passion for providing exceptional culinary experiences led her to create Chaviar, a mobile bar that offers the finest caviar and champagne pairings for events.

At Chaviar, we understand that every event is unique, and we're dedicated to providing personalized service to ensure your event is unforgettable. 
Our team of experienced professionals will work with you to create a bespoke caviar and champagne experience that suits your needs. Whether you're hosting a corporate event, wedding, or private party, Chaviar is here to provide the ultimate indulgence for you and your guests.

Our products and services include:

- Caviar and champagne pairings: We offer a range of caviar and champagne pairings to suit every palate, from classic to contemporary.

- Personalized service: Our team of experienced professionals will work with you to create a bespoke caviar and champagne experience that suits your needs.

- Mobile bar hire: Our mobile bar is designed to provide a unique and luxurious experience at your event. We can set up anywhere, from private homes to event venues.

- Catering: In addition to caviar and champagne, we also offer a range of catering options, including canapes, degustation boards, and desserts.

At Chaviar, we're passionate about providing the ultimate indulgence for your events.

 Contact us to learn more about our products & tailored services, and how we can make your event unforgettable.

Name: FodMap 4All
Description:
Fodmap4All is a free app developed by Vincenzo Marafioti, designed to support people following a low-FODMAP diet, useful for managing symptoms of Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS).

 Main Features

Ingredient list with FODMAP levels: Discover which foods are suitable for your diet, with detailed information on their FODMAP content.

Expert-approved recipes: Access a variety of recipes created by nutritionists, designed to be tasty and compatible with a low-FODMAP diet.

Food and symptom tracking: Keep track of your daily meals and symptoms to better understand your reactions to foods.

AI-based virtual assistant: Get personalized advice to improve your diet and better manage your condition.

 Availability

Android: The app is available on the Google Play Store.

iOS: Available on the App Store.

 Privacy and Security

Data protection: Data is transferred via secure connections and the app does not share information with third parties.

Data collection: The app may collect device identifiers to improve functionality and user experience.

Name: Kitchengo
Description:
Welcome to KitchenGo, where we're crafting a platform that celebrates the art of home cooking while connecting cultures through delightful meals. As avid enthusiasts of diverse cuisines, we embarked on a mission to create a user-friendly space for passionate home cooks and eager foodies alike.

Our platform is a haven for home cooks looking to share their culinary expertise with the world. From traditional family recipes to innovative twists on classic dishes, KitchenGo is a place where the rich tapestry of global flavors comes to life. We're dedicated to empowering home cooks, providing them with a stage to showcase their talents and build a community around their passion for food.

For users, KitchenGo is an invitation to explore a world of homemade goodness. Whether you're craving a taste of nostalgia, seeking unique cultural experiences, or simply looking for a convenient way to enjoy freshly prepared meals, our platform has you covered. Every dish tells a story, and KitchenGo is the bridge that brings these stories to your table.

Our commitment to excellence extends beyond delicious meals. We prioritize food safety, quality assurance, and a seamless user experience. With a rigorous onboarding process for cooks, user reviews and ratings for transparency, and adherence to local regulations, KitchenGo ensures a trustworthy and enjoyable culinary journey for all.

Join us on this exciting adventure as we continue to refine and expand KitchenGo, shaping it into the go-to destination for home-cooked magic. Whether you're a cook eager to share your culinary creations or a food enthusiast ready to embark on a flavorful journey, KitchenGo is where the heart of home cooking beats, and the joy of shared meals resonates. Welcome to KitchenGo – where every dish is a story, and every meal is a celebration!

"𝗟𝗘𝗦 𝗖𝗔𝗥𝗚𝗢𝗟𝗘𝗧𝗧𝗘𝗦" sont une 𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 dans le monde de la crêpe.

Name: Désiré de Lille
Description:
Maison fondée en 1903, Désiré de Lille perpétue la tradition des douceurs sucrées depuis 5 générations.

Nous confectionnons à la main Lacquemant, gaufres, crêpes, croustillons et bien d’autres spécialités artisanales, avec passion et exigence.

Basés entre Liège et Anvers, nous transmettons notre savoir-faire à travers une approche familiale, authentique et tournée vers la qualité.

Notre identité visuelle, portée par notre emblématique rouge vif et notre logo en forme de petit bonhomme gourmand, symbolise à la fois notre héritage et notre modernité.

Chez Désiré de Lille, chaque gourmandise raconte une histoire… celle d’une maison centenaire, animée par le goût du vrai.

 Suivez-nous sur Instagram @desiredelille et Facebook pour plonger dans notre univers gourmand !
—
Sinds 1903 brengt Désiré de Lille de traditie van ambachtelijke zoetigheden tot leven, al 5 generaties lang.

Wij maken met de hand lacquemants, wafels, pannenkoeken, smoutebollen en andere lekkernijen, met passie en vakmanschap.

Vanuit Luik en Antwerpen delen wij ons familiaal erfgoed met een authentieke en kwaliteitsgerichte aanpak.

Onze herkenbare visuele identiteit — het levendige rood en ons logo met het lekkere mannetje — weerspiegelen zowel traditie als moderniteit.

Elke lekkernij vertelt een verhaal... dat van een huis met meer dan 100 jaar geschiedenis, waar smaak en vakmanschap centraal staan.

 Volg ons op Instagram @desiredelille en Facebook

Name: Senza
Description:
Vi er et hjemmebasert kjøkken, som begynte å eksprimentere med å bake glutenfritt, og har kommet fram til noen solide produkter. Vi har spesialisert oss på pizza og har kommet frem til en pizza som slår alle glutenfri pizza på markede her i Oslo.
Vi drømmer om å bidra til et større utvalg av glutenfri produkter i byen og fremme gode produkter som kan konkurrere med normal kvalitet. Vi har førstehånds erfaring med å se vanskelighetene for å finne glutenfrie produkter, og ønsker se at gode glutenfrie produkter blir mer tilgjengelige for alle, og kan hjelpe knuse noen fordommer om kvaliteten til glutenfri mat.

Vi ønsker å starte med «pop up’s», events, og jobber for øyeblikket med å lage en kalender der folk kan bestille et begrenset antall bestillinger innenfor spesifikke tidspunkter.

Dat is beter voor het milieu, voor de lokale boeren en voor je eigen gezondheid. Via onze online streekwinkel kun je iedere week seizoensgebonden groente en fruit en andere producten zoals vlees, vis, vega, kip, kruiden, pasta’s, kazen, brood, chips, sauzen, noten, oliën etc etc bestellen. Deze worden geleverd door boeren en tuinders die zo duurzaam mogelijk werken en gevestigd zijn in een straal van ca 30 km van Best. En de boer bepaalt zelf zijn verkoopprijs, zodat ie ook een acceptabel en transparant verdienmodel heeft. Naast de online streekwinkel organiseren we ook regelmatig activiteiten voor de inwoners over gezond, eerlijk, lokaal en streekgebonden voedselproductie. Denk aan kookbijeenkomsten met koks uit andere culturen, lezingen, bedrijfsbezoeken bij de boer, een voedselpubquiz etc. Je kunt voor 10 euro per jaar lid worden en zo meepraten en meedoen. Daarnaast kun je ook als vrijwilliger een steentje bijdragen. Bijvoorbeeld door bij het uitgiftepunt van de wekelijkse bestellingen te helpen met het overdragen van de bestellingen, of als hulpkok of het helpen met flyeren op de Duurzaamheidsmarkt in Best of het mee-organiseren van nieuwe activiteiten.

Name: Rescube Food
Description:
Rescube – Sustainable Frozen Meals, Made Easy

Rescube is a food-tech startup based in Dubai, turning surplus farm-fresh vegetables into chef-made, ready-to-heat frozen meals. We rescue high-quality produce that would otherwise go to waste and transform it into delicious, healthy meals, offering both sustainability and convenience to today’s conscious consumer.

Every year, over 30% of food in the UAE is wasted, much of it before even reaching shelves. At the same time, consumers are demanding healthier, more sustainable, and quick meal options. The current market lacks scalable solutions that tackle both issues.

We rescue “imperfect” vegetables directly from farms and distributors, then prep, cook, and flash-freeze complete meals, delivered directly to customers or sold via retail partners. Each meal is ready in under 7 minutes, contains no additives or preservatives, and is built for modern lifestyles.

Comment ? 
Tous nos plats sont cuisinés maison avec des produits frais, locaux et de qualité. 
Notre cuisine est simple, sans prétention aucune, mais se veut saine, gourmande et équilibrée. 
Chaque semaine c'est une nouvelle carte qui vous est proposée, composée de : 3 entrées, 4 plats (un plat de viande, un plat de poisson, un plat végétarien et un plat froid) et 3 desserts.
Tous les plats sont étiquetés, fabriqués et livrés dans le respect total de la chaîne du froid. Il n'y a plus qu'à réchauffer quand vous êtes prêts à manger !
Commandez quand vous voulez sur www.lunchservice-agen.fr et même jusqu'à 11h pour une livraison le jour même !
Nous vous livrons tous les jours gratuitement à domicile ou à votre bureau.
Inscrivez vous à notre newsletter pour recevoir directement le menu de la semaine tous les mardis ainsi que pour profiter d'offres promotionnelles exceptionnelles. 
Votre fidélité récompensée : 5€ offerts toutes les 10 commandes, jusqu'à plus de 20% de remise sur les plats avec notre formule abonnement sans frais ni engagement ainsi que la possibilité de se voir créditer des € sur votre compte.
Lunch Service c'est aussi le partage de valeurs sociales et environnementales fortes. 
A vous d'essayer !

Name: General Bilimoria's Canteen
Description:
Welcome to General Bilimoria’s Canteen (GBC) – a food experience inspired by the legendary Lieutenant General Faridoon Bilimoria, a decorated officer of the Indian Army, whose legacy lives on through flavors that tell stories of courage, loyalty, and zest for life.

As commander of the 2/5 Gorkha Rifles and the 15th General Officer Commander-in-Chief, Central Command, General Bilimoria – affectionately known as "General Billy" – was renowned not only for his leadership but also for his warmth, loyalty, and, of course, his love of good food. His journeys across the Indian subcontinent introduced him to a tapestry of flavors, textures, and spices that fueled his affection for the cuisine of the region.

Continuing in his father’s footsteps, Lord Karan Bilimoria, founder of Cobra Beer, brings his passion for food and culture into every meal delivered by GBC. Through GBC, Lord Bilimoria captures his father’s spirit, personality, and adventurous palate in every dish, translating General Bilimoria's love for bold, authentic Indian food into a unique culinary journey, where each bite reflects a taste of history, heritage, and hospitality.

At GBC, we believe that every meal should be more than just convenient; it should be trustworthy, fresh, and downright delicious. That’s why we’ve taken the time to do the research for you, so you don’t have to wonder about what’s going into your food or where it’s coming from. We only partner with restaurants that have earned a rating of 4.0 or higher, meaning every dish you order meets our high standards for taste and quality.

Unlike other food delivery platforms, we’re committed to transparency and integrity. You’ll never find “dark kitchens” on GBC – only established restaurants with proven track records for cleanliness and excellence. We visit each restaurant to ensure they maintain the standards you deserve. Our mission is simple: to deliver clean, high-quality food from reliable kitchens straight to your home.

When you choose GB

Diet Dining came up with an innovative and handy solution that helps people find the right diet food around them and deliver it to their doorstep without any consequences. We are a Canadian-based online diet food delivery platform that can be used with an existing app like Skip the Dishes, DoorDash and Uber Eats. Our app is simple, easily navigational, fully-featured, and most importantly, personalized to your needs.

We cater to our users with gluten-free, vegetarian, vegan, ketogenic, and paleo-friendly food options, where Diet Dining has partnered agreements with those restaurants. In addition, our app prominently helps users save time exploring restaurants that serve diet meals best suited for their needs at their convenience located nearby them.

Our solutions focus on providing you seamless experience in searching for proper diet meals at your convenience without any obstacles.

Description:
Homie è una startup innovativa con l'obiettivo di rivoluzionare il settore dell'home restaurant, creando una piattaforma unica che connette chef, host e utenti. La nostra missione è trasformare la cucina in un'esperienza universale, inclusiva e autentica, celebrando la diversità culinaria e culturale.

Attraverso la nostra app, offriamo agli utenti la possibilità di scoprire e prenotare esperienze culinarie uniche, direttamente nelle case di chef locali appassionati. Gli host possono ospitare eventi memorabili, mentre i cuochi hanno l’opportunità di esprimere la loro creatività in un ambiente conviviale. Homie promuove autenticità, sostenibilità e connessioni reali.

Siamo attualmente focalizzati su Roma, con una visione di espansione verso altre città italiane e internazionali. Offriamo un modello che valorizza qualità, trasparenza e sostenibilità, garantendo esperienze personalizzate e memorabili per i nostri utenti.

Unisciti a noi in questo viaggio gastronomico e scopri come Homie sta trasformando il mondo della ristorazione domestica in un movimento globale.

Per saperne di più o collaborare con noi, visita il nostro sito o contattaci!

Our Menu has locally inspired names offering all your favourite coffees, including flavoured Iced Coffees, Tea, Hot Chocolate and Spicey Chai Latte’s.

Description:
Bienvenido a Frezzyks, tu destino para una experiencia gastronómica única en España! Desde finales de 2023, somos los pioneros en ofrecer chuches liofilizadas en España. Nuestro viaje comenzó con un descubrimiento en TikTok que cambió todo: golosinas liofilizadas, una delicia que faltaba en nuestro país. La pasión nos llevó a crear Frezzyks, incluso siendo jóvenes universitarios.

En Frezzyks, traemos nostalgia a cada bocado con chuches liofilizadas inspiradas en nuestras favoritas de la infancia. Queremos que experimentes el sabor auténtico y la diversión que ofrecen. Nuestro objetivo es llevar esta experiencia única a cada hogar, haciendo que sea accesible para todos.

Detrás de Frezzyks estamos dos jóvenes universitarios dedicados, invirtiendo nuestros ahorros y energía para hacerlo realidad. Nuestro sueño es ser conocidos en todo el país por nuestras deliciosas chuches liofilizadas y la felicidad que brindan.

Únete a nosotros en esta dulce aventura en Frezzyks, donde cada bocado es un viaje de sabores y recuerdos inolvidables!

Il propose un concept de traiteur assez inhabituel centré autour des pizzas napolitaines, préparées en direct devant vous. C’est tout l’univers d’une authentique pizzeria à votre porte !

Name: Gourmetvognen
Description:
Gourmetvognen er en pølsevogn ud over det sædvanlige: Lækre råvarer, gourmethotdogs og sliders er i fokus. Til gengæld bliver der ikke pillet det mindste ved den afslappede og uhøjtidelige stemning, der er kendetegnet ved en almindelig pølsevogn. Udover gourmethotdogs og sliders, finder man også de gode, velkendte klassikere som burger, flæskestegssandwich og almindelige hotdogs, både den ristede og den franske.

Stemningen fra pølsevognen følger med – også selvom maden er lidt ekstra. Berit og Preben vil gerne give kunderne en oplevelse. De vil gerne være med til at skabe en stemning omkring kundernes fest/arrangement, og de gør sig umage med det arbejde, de leverer. Det gælder også med det udtryk, de kommer med.

Gourmetvognen er ejet af Berit Bjerregaard og Preben Lund, og har tidligere kørt under navnet Lundbyen. De leverer pølsevogne til arrangementer med min. 50 deltagere og helt op til store virksomheds-arrangementer, festivaler, koncerter og messer. De kan også levere en totalløsning med borde, stole, fadølsanlæg, service og så videre.

Name: MomChef Foodie Private Limited
Description:
Introducing MomChef Foodie Private Limited: Savor the Tastes of Home, Indulge in the Joys of Women's Empowerment!

Are you a student or working professional living in South Campus Delhi and longing for the comforting flavors of homemade food? Look no further than MomChef Foodie Private Limited - the embodiment of exquisite flavors and women's empowerment!

 

Our self-employed business, founded by the visionary Md Tahseen Raja, is on a delicious mission to bridge the gap for those who yearn for authentic, healthy, and handmade culinary experiences. We cover the entire South Campus Delhi area, serving up a sumptuous array of mouthwatering dishes straight from the heart of mothers.

 

But we're more than just a food delivery service. We're a catalyst for women's independence, empowering them to be self-reliant through their exceptional cooking skills. We firmly believe that when women are given the opportunity to shine, magic happens in every kitchen!

 

Immerse yourself in the tantalizing aromas and flavors that transport you back to the cherished memories of your mother's kitchen. With MomChef Foodie Private Limited, you can relish the satisfaction of knowing that every bite supports the growth and empowerment of talented women.

 

We handpick the finest and freshest ingredients, blend them with age-old recipes and cooking techniques, and infuse each dish with a dash of love and passion. And with our commitment to catering to diverse dietary preferences, we ensure that nobody misses out on the savoriness of our offerings - whether you're a vegetarian, vegan, or have specific dietary requirements, our menu has something to tantalize your taste buds.

 

Our vibrant community of talented and passionate women is at the heart of everything we do. By joining forces with MomChef Foodie Private Limited.

Name: JOVER
Description:
Con Jover, vivere un'esperienza al ristorante diventa semplice e intuitiva. Le persone possono prenotare il tavolo, consultare il menù digitale, ordinare direttamente dall'app e pagare in pochi clic, eliminando ogni attesa superflua. Un'esperienza senza interruzioni, fluida e completamente digitalizzata.

VISION
Jover immagina un mondo in cui le attese interminabili per un tavolo, un ordine o un pagamento appartengano al passato. Un mondo in cui l'esperienza al ristorante sia priva di stress, ottimizzata e pensata per chi desidera godersi ogni momento senza inutili perdite di tempo. Jover nasce con l'obiettivo di trasformare questa visione in realtà, creando un nuovo standard per il settore della ristorazione.

MISSION
Da questa esigenza nasce Jover: un'innovativa app che semplifica ogni fase dell’esperienza al ristorante, garantendo efficienza, rapidità e comodità. Grazie a un'interfaccia intuitiva e a funzionalità avanzate, Jover permette agli utenti di gestire con facilità prenotazioni, ordini e pagamenti, offrendo ai ristoratori uno strumento prezioso per ottimizzare il servizio e migliorare la soddisfazione dei clienti.

Jover non è solo un'app, ma un vero e proprio partner digitale per chi vuole vivere la ristorazione in modo smart, valorizzando il tempo proprio e quello degli altri.

Name: Biebite
Description:

BieBite changes that. With one scan, our AI-powered app detects allergens, suggests safer alternatives, and personalizes food recommendations based the users dietary needs.
Unlike outdated databases, BieBite integrates directly with UAE grocery platforms, ensuring real-time accuracy.
For shoppers, it means smarter, safer choices.
For brands, it builds trust.
For Dubai, it supports a healthier, AI-driven future.
Our commission-based model ensures sustainability through affiliate links, in-app promotions, and premium features for unlimited scanning.

One scan. One choice. A healthier future. Say bye to bad food choices with BieBite.

Name: Myggen's
Description: Med mere end 15 års erfaring med at afholde Grillkurser og ”hands on” arrangementer er du sikret den fedeste oplevelse når jeg rykker ud med min grillshow. Er det din virksomhed der skal afholde en sommerfest hvor I mangler aktivitet, eller er I en herregruppe der vil dyste om at grille store bøffer, så rykker jeg ud og hjælper jer der hvor det passer Jer. Hvis I ikke har stedet og pladsen, så hiver jeg trucken med, så I ikke skal bruge tid på at leje et telt og ikke mindst sætte det op. Jeg kan skræddersy arrangementet til Jer, så hvis I ønsker at have en aften med et bestemt tema, så er det det vi laver. Det kunne være ”fisk og skaldyr”, ”Snakcks”, ”BBQ”, ”Røgning”, ”Træpillegrill” og lign.

Name: HomeMady
Description:
We are a remote-first company that aims to empower diversity of cultures and cuisines. On our app you can buy food and get it delivered to you, just like you would on any food delivery app, but our food does not come from restaurants, it comes from home kitchens, from people that have passion for cooking but never had the courage to start a business, from people that did not have the money to start a restaurant but cook very well, from retired chefs that decided to slow down and only cook on their own schedule, and more. The food comes from normal people not from commercial kitchens. This is food made with love and using genuine ingredients just like the ones you would buy at the grocery and use to cook at home. No secret preservatives, commercial chemicals or anything like that. We promote the grandmas cooking, the housewives cooking, or whoever have real passion and cook from the heart. We have tight rules and standards for our cooks. For example,  the first rule is to 'cook with love', the second is to 'cook following the highest safety and hygiene standards as per HACCP'. We carefully select the cooks and monitor their performance and their food quality, we even inspect some of their kitchens personally. But as long as their food is made with love and is safe, we welcome everybody to join us as a home cook, because it is our main goal to bring different people together via one of the few real pleasures of life: good food.

With HomeMady not only you can order individual dishes just like you do on any food delivery app, but you can also order catering for parties or events, or order ready-to-eat meal prep sets. Since the home cooks on HomeMady do not have the big overheads that restaurants have, the home cooks can offer you food for a cheaper price, but also food that is cooked in the proper way using genuine ingredients and not commercialized ones or chemicals. The food can be can be delivered instantly or at an agreed date/time, or even collected.

Name: FOODTUK
Description:

Op zoek naar een originele culinaire beleving voor je bedrijfsbarbecue, teamuitje of personeelsfeest?
Wij brengen de geur, smaak en sfeer van de Indonesische streetfood rechtstreeks naar jouw kantoor of evenemententerrein.

Onze foodtruck is gespecialiseerd in ambachtelijke saté van de houtskoolgrill – denk aan sappige kipsaté (halal), speklap (saté babi), Kambing (Geit) en Tempeh (Vega) met satésaus volgens familierecept én die kenmerkende rokerige geur die mensen doet stilstaan.
Ook serveren wij verse risolles gevuld met kipragout (indonesische kroket).
En sluit af met onze favoriete luchtige Pandancake (sponscake) en de verassende pandancolada (cocktail).

 Smaakvolle catering op locatie
 Geschikt voor bedrijven, events, festivals of gewoon zomaar
 Authentiek, snel geserveerd, altijd vers
 Mogelijkheid tot halal en vegetarische varianten

Laat jouw medewerkers of gasten iets proeven dat blijft hangen – letterlijk én figuurlijk.

 Huisgemaakt | Smaakvol | Uniek

Name: Mizbanapp
Description:
میزبان راهنمای بهترین طعم ها در افغانستان 
«میزبان» یک پلتفرم نوآورانه و جامع در حوزه خدمات غذایی است که با هدف ارتقاء تجربه مشتریان در صنعت رستورانت داری و گردشگری غذایی افغانستان طراحی شده است. این اپلیکیشن با بهرهگیری از فناوریهای روز دنیا، بستری فراهم کرده تا کاربران بتوانند به آسانی بهترین رستورانت ها، کافیشاپها، و بستنیفروشیهای اطراف خود را کشف کنند و از اطلاعات دقیق، نقدها و پیشنهادهای اختصاصی بهرهمند شوند.  

ما در میزبان معتقدیم که هر وعده غذایی فرصتی است برای ایجاد ارتباطات انسانی، حمایت از کسبوکارهای محلی و ترویج فرهنگ غنی غذایی کشورمان. با ارائه رابط کاربری ساده و امکانات متنوع، میزبان تجربهای منحصر به فرد و رضایتبخش برای کاربران فراهم میآورد که موجب افزایش تعامل و وفاداری مشتریان میشود.  

هدف ما ایجاد اکوسیستم پویایی است که ضمن توسعه صنعت خدمات غذایی، نقش مهمی در رشد گردشگری داخلی ایفا کند و به کسبوکارهای کوچک و متوسط کمک کند تا دیده شوند و شکوفا گردند.  

«میزبان» متعهد است تا با نوآوری مستمر و تمرکز بر نیازهای واقعی کاربران، مسیر رشد پایدار صنعت غذا را هموار سازد و تجربهای لذتبخش و هوشمندانه را برای همه رقم بزند.

Description:
A subscription based home-cooked daily meal ordering platform. We take pride in our home chefs who cook multi-cuisine for your every day meals. Onboarding home chefs and growing our network currently.

In the selection process of providing daily meals to our customers, we opted for passionate home chefs over restaurants. Our aim was to present economical and hygienic meals that cater to the customers' preferred cuisine, crafted by talented home chefs. Therefore, we established a network of exceptional home chefs with expertise in internationally authentic cuisines, guaranteeing our customers a delectable experience with each meal.

We have established a convenient and advantageous system for our home chefs, allowing them to manage their business from any location and update their availability within the app. They can easily control their menu and have unrestricted access to their working hours. The home chefs can easily manage their inventory, set prices, and schedule their services, while benefiting from our promotional activities and simple payment procedures. 

Feasti takes pride in offering its home chefs a user-friendly dashboard and a smooth-selling experience for their cuisines. 

At Feasti, we uphold transparency and dedication towards fulfilling the goals of our customers and home chefs. Whether you are a customer seeking quality and timely food or a home chef striving for growth, we are committed to providing you with everything you need.

Name: LA FOUÉE - Maitres fouaciers
Description:
Le Foodtruck "La Fouee" a été créé en 2020 par Christophe et Fabienne, amoureux de cuisine traditionnelle.

Le concept propose des fouées (boules de pain originaires d'Angers) cuites à la flamme devant le client et garnies à chaud avec des garnitures maisons élaborées par Fabienne.
Retrouvez toute la convivialité de l'offre sur des emplacements, lors d'évènements, des festivals, pour une prestation privée à domicile voire une prestation d'entreprise.

Christophe, surpris du peu de notoriété de ce produit savoureux et gourmand a décidé d'optimiser le modèle pendant plusieurs saisons afin d'imaginer un modèle en franchise où chaque région de france (et du monde) pourrait déguster des fouées. 

Il s'est associé à Alexandre, spécialisé dans l'animation de réseau et la gestion stratégique pour développer le modèle à grand échelle.

2023 est l'année du lancement du modèle avec l'arrivée de nombreux ambassadeurs de la fouée grâce à un modèle Foodtruck clé en main où toute la tradition est préservée.

Hey!  Bei VendingZ glauben wir: Jeder verdient eine gesunde Mittagspause! Egal zu welcher Uhrzeit – gutes Essen sollte immer verfügbar sein. Deshalb bringen wir mit unseren smarten Food-Automaten leckere Mahlzeiten direkt ins Büro, rund um die Uhr! 

Kennt ihr das auch?
 Schon wieder Brötchen vom Bäcker, weil sonst nichts in der Nähe ist?
 Die Kantine hat bereits zu, aber der Hunger kommt erst jetzt?
 Das mitgebrachte Essen steht noch daheim auf der Küchentheke?
 Die Lieferdienste sind zu teuer und dauern ewig?
 Keine Zeit für eine richtige Mittagspause zwischen den Terminen?

Genau diese Probleme lösen wir! Mit unseren VendingZ-Automaten gibt's:
 Frische Gerichte aus 65% regionalen Zutaten (direkt aus Baden-Württemberg)
 Dein Essen ist in unter 10 Minuten fertig
 Von Klassisch bis Vegan - für jeden Geschmack was dabei
 100% nachhaltige Verpackungen
 Super einfache Installation

Neugierig auf gesunde Mittagspausen? Der Weg zu deinem VendingZ ist super einfach:
1 Wirf einen Blick auf unsere Website und entdecke unsere Lösung
2 In einem kurzen Erstgespräch lernen wir uns kennen und verstehen eure Bedürfnisse
3 Das Highlight: Wir kommen mit einem kostenlosen Probeessen zu euch - lasst euch von Geschmack UND Qualität überzeugen!

Übrigens: Hinter VendingZ stecken wir - Julius, Benedikt und Noel. Alles begann mit einem Problem, das wir selbst täglich erlebten: Keine Zeit für gesundes Essen im hektischen Uni-Alltag. Zwischen Vorlesungen, Lerngruppen und Nebenjobs blieb oft nur der schnelle Griff zur Tiefkühlpizza. Was als Uni-Projekt begann, ist jetzt unser Startup mit einer Mission: eure Mittagspausen wieder großartig zu machen! 

Starte jetzt deine VendingZ-Journey:

Name: Krožnik
Description:
V letu 2021 smo v Sloveniji zavrgli več kot 140.000 ton hrane, obenem pa se je hrana letos podražila za več kot 14.4 %. Reševanje problema odpadne hrane torej ni samo pomembno, ampak nujno, saj so neenakosti iz dneva v dan večje. Zato smo ustvarili Krožnik.

Krožnik je aplikacija, s katero bodo uporabniki lahko privarčevali pri nakupu hrane, ki bi jo prodajalne sicer zavrgle, samo zato, ker se ni prodala pravočasno.

Na takšen način bo aplikacija tako podjetjem kot uporabnikom ponudila unikatno priložnost, ki bi pozitivno vplivala na njuno finančno stanje. Piko na i doda dejstvo, da se bomo na tak način konkretno spopadli z okolijskim problemom, ki ga ustvarja zavržena hrana.

Name: Foundational Cooking
Description:
Our Core Values help embolden our strong belief in community and giving back to our communities. They are Resourcefulness, Excellence, Community, Integrity, Perseverance, Enjoyment (RECIPE). 

My Journey: For years I struggled enjoying cooking. It always felt so overwhelming to preplan the week's meals, grocery shopping for the food, and spending what felt like hours cooking each meal. Now after years of struggling with personal motivation, esteam, cooking websites, and meal planning apps.

Our Commitment: I founded Foundational Cooking. We are a startup company with an extreme focus on user experience. Our focus is you and our mission is to empower you to cook from home. One of the ways we help create the motivation is by giving 10% of all our profits to a non-profit organization. This way your membership and goal to cook more at home directly impacts the lives of hundreds of other people.  

Our Mission: We are striving to provide a resource to all levels of home cooks to reduce the unspoken stresses of cooking by developing a truly user focused customizable website and apps to provide you with the ease of mind, and allow you to do the one task you really wanted to do from the beginning; cook.

 shows how well you have managed waste in terms of money saved and your smaller carbon footprint.

Waste to WOW!

𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗺𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝗬𝗼𝘂
