Description:
Our company was founded by four partners, bringing together critical capabilities in engineering, analytics, finance, and culinary arts. Co-founders La Min and Hein, former business and data analytics students, gained firsthand food service experience working as sushi chefs after moving to the United States. Our time in restaurant operations exposed systemic issues faced by franchisees but also opportunities for innovation.
We joined forces with co-founder Ensa, whose expertise in fabrication and welding enabled us to pursue a solar-powered vehicle concept. Physics student and co-founder Nazmus, skilled in financing and legal matters, rounded out the diverse skill sets needed to transform the mobile food industry.

Description:
Swirls by Shannon is a mobile soft serve ice cream experience serving the Greater Boston area. Founded by Boston native, Shannon Sullivan, Swirls brings premium soft serve to events of all kinds with a focus on quality, joy, and community connection.

We specialize in creating memorable dessert moments for weddings, birthdays, graduations, school celebrations, corporate gatherings, and community events. Our setup is fully mobile and flexible, allowing us to serve guests both indoors and outdoors with ease.

Guests can enjoy classic vanilla or chocolate soft serve, complete with a full toppings bar that includes favorites like Reese’s Cups, M&M’s, Oreo crumbs, cookie dough, sprinkles, and more. Every event is staffed by a dedicated team member who handles setup and cleanup so hosts can focus on celebrating.

At Swirls by Shannon, our goal is to make every event a little sweeter. Whether it’s a small family party or a large corporate event, we bring the same energy and care to ensure each guest leaves smiling.

We believe in bringing joy to every swirl, one cone at a time.

Name: Crepes by C
Description: Bonjour! My name is Chantal, and I am the owner of Crepes by C. Where did crepes come into the picture? Honestly, it’s always been there. My earliest memories are of my French mom teaching me how to make crepes using her mothers (my grandmothers) recipe. Curious about my French culture that I knew little about, in 2012, I decided to move to France to further my education and learn the French language. After living in various cities in France for nearly 10 years, I couldn’t resist the chance to get formally trained in the art of crepe making in Paris. Upon returning to my hometown of Washington D.C., I realized that there was a lack of authentic French crepe options available. Shortly after, I started Crepes by C in 2022.

Stewday werkt anders

Geen lange avonden. Geen stress door last-minute bestellingen. Wél rust, overzicht en koken op jouw voorwaarden.

Koken zoals jij het wilt

Bij Stewday kook je in je eigen stijl, op je eigen moment. De meeste koks leveren koelverse maaltijden die klanten thuis zelf opwarmen – wanneer het hén uitkomt. Name: tap&eat
Description:
Transform your restaurant’s dining experience with tap&eat, the premier mobile food service solution. We specialize in providing a seamless, tech-driven dining experience that enhances customer satisfaction and streamlines restaurant operations.

At Tap & Eat, we believe that dining should be an effortless and enjoyable experience for both customers and restaurant staff. Our innovative platform allows diners to browse menus, place orders, and make payments directly from their smartphones. This eliminates the need for physical menus and reduces wait times, ensuring a more efficient service.

Our services include:

	•	Mobile Ordering: Customers can easily order their favorite dishes through our user-friendly app.
	•	Contactless Payments: Secure, fast, and contactless payments for a hassle-free transaction.
	•	Real-Time Order Tracking: Keep customers informed with real-time updates on their order status.
	•	Customized Menus: Flexible menu options that allow restaurants to highlight specials and update offerings instantly.
	•	Customer Insights: Gain valuable insights into customer preferences and behavior to tailor your service and offerings.

Why choose Tap & Eat?

	•	Enhanced Efficiency: Streamline your operations and reduce overhead with our all-in-one solution.
	•	Improved Customer Experience: Offer a modern, convenient dining experience that keeps customers coming back.
	•	Increased Revenue: Boost sales with easy-to-use features that encourage repeat orders and higher spending.
	•	Actionable Analytics: Utilize data-driven insights to improve your menu, service, and overall customer satisfaction.

Join the growing number of restaurants transforming their dining experience with Tap & Eat. Whether you run a small café or a large restaurant chain, our solution is designed to scale with your business and help you achieve your goals.

Experience the future of dining with Tap & Eat. Visit us at www.tapandeat.co to learn more and schedule a demo.

But we’re more than just gelato. We produce our own artisanal chocolate, bringing an extra layer of indulgence to our offerings. Our menu also features Italian coffee, fresh panini, and other delicious delicacies inspired by the heart of Italy.

Whether it’s a corporate gathering, private celebration, or a cozy everyday treat, Oooh Gelato brings warmth, flavor, and a touch of Italian magic to every occasion. Let us help you create unforgettable moments—one scoop, one bite, one smile at a time.

Description:
Chris & Steve Dent and Chris’ partner Kayleigh on a family adventure! 

Love coffee? Love cake? Then JACKS Coffee Shack is perfect for you. We offer great-tasting artisan coffee (roasted in Bristol), speciality teas, seasonal drinks and mouth-watering locally baked cakes. We love coffee. We care about making world-class coffee and our attention to detail ensures you get a consistently great brew every time.

Discovering the perfect food spot has never been so easy and fun!

Name: Bedaine Foodtruck
Description:
Bedaine, c’est avant tout l’histoire de deux passionnés de street food, animés par l’envie de créer un projet qui leur ressemble. Après plusieurs années passées dans la région parisienne, nous avons choisi de poser nos valises en Ille-et-Vilaine, une région pleine de dynamisme et d’opportunités — mais aussi un territoire cher à notre cœur, avec des racines à Iffendic.
 
De cette passion commune est née l’idée d’un food truck : un lieu convivial, mobile, où l’on partage des smash burgers faits maison avec des produits frais, locaux et sélectionnés avec soin.

Avec Bedaine, nous avons voulu allier gourmandise, qualité et simplicité, en proposant une expérience authentique, proche de nos valeurs.

Rejoignez-nous sur la route, et laissez-vous tenter par un burger qui fait la différence !

We believe that everyone can enjoy their favourite food anytime anywhere at no extra cost. Instead of spending time scouting for where to eat or waiting in long queues at the restaurant, leave everything to Flavrr and use your precious time to accomplish more important tasks.
We deliver the best food experiences to your door step wherever you are. Just with the tap of a button, you can select your favourite meals from your favourite restaurant in town and we will deliver it to you, just the way you like it!
Maybe you just want to cook for your family at home and you don't have the time to go get ingredients? Flavrr can get you all you need for a great family cooking session.
At Flavrr, we satisfy every bit of your food cravings!

You can find us in a few regular spots in Hampshire, and we're also available for hire for private parties or your corporate event! Just get in touch and let us know what you're looking for.

Name: JackRipe
Description:
JackRipe is a Swiss innovation in online food retailing. The start-up, founded in 2020, is characterized by a consistent focus on local products and the shortest possible supply chain paths. The company gives customers full transparency about local products and creates a community of producers and consumers. Shortest delivery routes lead to unbeatable freshness of the products and reduced carbon footprint.

- JackRipe offers solutions for the future of agriculture in our country that are consistently decentralized and operate without centralized government intervention.

- JackRipe consistently transports food from producers to consumers in short distances using refrigerated vehicles.

- JackRipe delivers the products unbeatably fresh & crisp, which guarantees nutrient richness and long shelf life, as well as minimizes FoodWaste.

- JackRipe customers get a deep insight into the origin of the products and how they are created, building trust and community between consumers and producers.

- JackRipe customers recognize the added value of local food and get to know and appreciate the people behind the products. 

- JackRipe customers know (again) what is ripe and locally in season, and adjust their menu accordingly for the benefit of the environment and with pleasure. - Check what's ripe - JackRipe!

Our JackRipe model has reached maturity and is about to be replicated throughout Switzerland beyond the existing test region. 

 Learn more about JackRipe with this link: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCgWT1BlQ7F4cy2sq_acXkbw

Name: TISCH ZWÖLF
Description:
Es ist kurz vor Zwölf.
Wir müssen heute für eine gute Zukunft essen.  Jetzt steht die Veränderung an um Wandel und Verbesserung in der Mittagverpflegung in Vorarlberg gemeinsam mit den Landwirt:innen und Gastronom:innen zu schaffen. Gesamt gesellschaftlich für Arbeitnehmer:innen, Schüler:innen, Studierende und Senioren. Wir werden mit verschiedenen Projekten individuelle Lösungen finden um gesellschaftliche Prozess -Veränderungen zu bewirken. Lasst uns gemeinsam Pionier:innen sein für die Zukunft, in welcher wir Essen genießen, was uns und anderen Mehrwerte bietet! 

Das Ziel
Wir wollen die Gemeinschaftsverpflegung in Vorarlberg zukunftsfähig machen und so gestalten, dass sie Spaß macht, unserer Gesundheit und der Landwirtschaft und unserm Planeten guttut. Unsere Ziele sind ambitioniert, doch nur so können wir den Herausforderungen unsere Zeit begegnen. Vorarlberg als Modellregion, welche sich stark macht für eine nachhaltige Landwirtschaft, gesunde Ernährung und einen Erhalt der Kultur-landschaft und -küche. Essenstransparenz und Ernährungsbildung wird bei Tisch Zwölf durch Schulprojekte, interaktive Informationsveranstaltungen und transparente Kommunikation bewirkt. 

 Wissensvermittlung und die daraus resultierende Veränderung in der Gesellschaft ist ein fester Bestandteil unserer Prozesslösung für Tisch Zwölf.

 hallo@tisch-zwoelf.at

Name: mostbuben
Description:
Die mostbuben – heimat erfahren. natur erleben. tradition erhalten
In unserer kleinen Mosterei stellen wir aus den Äpfeln unserer Region unseren mostbuben Apfelsaft her. Groß und Klein kommen hier zusammen, um den ersten Schluck frischen Most direkt von der Presse zu genießen. Unser Motto: lasst uns die kostbare Erde der Bergsträßer Region nutzen, um Sachen anzubauen, Dinge wachsen zu sehen, sie mit körperlicher Ertüchtigung zu ernten, um sie dann in ihrem vollkommenen Geschmack zu genießen. Genau deshalb sind die mostbuben entstanden. Die Enttäuschung, dass so viel Obst auf den Wiesen unserer Region verdirbt, hat uns motiviert etwas dagegen zu tun. So wurden Bäume wieder geschnitten, kaputte Bäume durch neue ersetzt und mit der Kelterei eine Möglichkeit gefunden die Frucht in Form von Apfelsaft haltbar zu machen. Dazu möchten wir auch euch motivieren eure Wiesen wieder in Schuss zu bringen, um eure eigenen Erzeugnisse mit Stolz zu konsumieren.

For restaurants, BonApp’ is more than just a reservation tool—it’s an all-in-one guest management system. From handling bookings and walk-ins to optimizing table turnover and providing actionable business insights, BonApp’ empowers staff to work smarter and deliver exceptional service.

What We Offer
	•	Reservation System – Manage online and in-person bookings in one place.
	•	Virtual Queue Management – Live wait times, mobile check-in, and automated table-ready alerts.
	•	Table Plan & Floor Management – Intuitive, color-coded layouts for staff coordination.
	•	Customer Communication – WhatsApp, push notifications, and automated confirmations.
	•	Data & Insights – Guest behavior trends, staff performance analytics, and peak time reports.
	•	Custom Surveys & Feedback – Understand and enhance the dining experience.

BonApp’ is trusted by restaurants that want to increase guest satisfaction, improve efficiency, and boost revenue—without sacrificing hospitality.

We believe dining should start with a warm welcome, not a long wait. BonApp’ makes that possible.

Name: Marenda
Description:
We've identified a significant issue in modern lifestyles: the average person dedicates 2 hours weekly to meal planning and 3-5 hours to grocery shopping every week. This not only consumes valuable time but often results in unbalanced meals, excessive leftovers, and considerable food waste.

Marenda offers a personalized, efficient, and eco-friendly alternative. Our process is simple: Answer seven questions, receive 14 days of custom, nutritionally balanced meal suggestions. Selecting a meal adds it to the cart, generating an itemized grocery list. Groceries can then be purchased through our app, which also provides cooking guidance. It's like having a grocery store in your pocket, minus the long checkout lines!

Marenda isn't just an e-commerce platform; it's a tool for smart, informed planning & shopping that positively impacts user health and reduces food waste.

Name: Auwald Bio
Description:

Unser Sortiment umfasst Bio-Vitalfood, Bio-Nahrungsergänzungsmittel, Bio-Kaffee, Naturkosmetik, Bio Haushaltsprodukte und vieles mehr. 

Wir von auwaldbio.de stehen für höchste Qualität und Natürlichkeit aus der Region. Die Auswahl unseres Sortiments erfolgt nach strengsten Kriterien: Nur Produkte aus kontrolliert biologischem Anbau & Herstellung finden den Weg in unser Angebot. Damit garantieren wir unseren Kunden die bestmögliche Qualität und Vertrauenswürdigkeit. 

Unser Ziel ist es, die Lebensqualität unserer Kunden durch den Genuss hochwertiger Bio-Lebensmittel & Produkten zu steigern.  

Das Team von auwaldbio.de arbeitet mit Leidenschaft & Transparenz stetig daran gesunde Bio Produkte über unseren Shop anzubieten  – angetrieben von der Überzeugung, dass nur qualitativ hochwertige Lebensmittel wirklich gut tun und schmecken. Wir freuen uns, Ihnen diese Qualität auch online anbieten zu können!

Wir sind bestrebt, möglichst vielen Menschen die Vorzüge von hochwertigen Bio-Lebensmitteln & Produkten nahe zu bringen. Deshalb legen wir großen Wert auf eine enge Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Lieferanten und regionalen Produzenten.

Nutrify is the ultimate health companion designed to seamlessly keep the people from all over the world in tune with all their nutrition needs throughout the day. Jeder Cut wird in unserer Manufaktur präzise pariert, schockgekühlt und in lückenlos temperierter Kühlkette an Kunden in Deutschland, Österreich, Frankreich, Benelux und Polen geliefert.

Neben Prime Beef und Wagyu führen wir nachhaltiges Seafood, exklusive Gewürze und Feinkost aus Manufakturen. Unsere Online-Plattform vereint E-Commerce-Komfort mit persönlicher Beratung: vom Corporate Catering über Fine Dining bis zum privaten Genussliebhaber – inklusive Chef-Support, Rezeptideen und B2B-Preisstrukturen.

Verantwortung bestimmt unser Handeln: transparente Herkunft, Tierwohl, ESG-konforme Prozesse und recyclingfähige Verpackungen. So entstehen Genussmomente, die kulinarische Neugier mit verlässlicher Qualität verbinden.

Fleischer & Koch – Genuss, der verbindet.

Name: Microcheck FSP
Description:
Microcheck is an innovative startup dedicated to advancing food safety and public health through smart microbiological testing and digital innovation. We provide rapid, on-site pathogen detection services for restaurants, hotels, and food producers, helping them maintain hygiene standards and comply with ISO 22000 and HACCP requirements.

Our services combine laboratory-quality accuracy with user-friendly technology — including easy-to-use testing kits, portable incubators, and a digital platform for data tracking, reporting, and certification. By offering affordable and accessible microbiological insights, we empower businesses to identify contamination risks early, improve safety practices, and build consumer trust.

At Microcheck, we believe that safe food is not just a requirement — it’s a shared responsibility. Our mission is to create cleaner, healthier communities by bridging science, innovation, and everyday practice.

Name: Mami's Takeout
Description:
About Mami's Takeout:

At Mami's Takeout, we take pride in serving up the most mouthwatering and authentic cuisine, right at your doorstep. We understand the importance of preserving cultural flavors and traditions, which is why we have crafted a menu that showcases the very best of our culinary heritage.

Our mission is to provide you with a convenient and delightful dining experience. Whether you're a busy professional looking for a quick and delicious meal or a food enthusiast craving the authentic taste of home, Mami's Takeout has you covered.

Our dedicated team of skilled chefs carefully prepares each dish using traditional recipes handed down through generations. We use only the freshest ingredients, sourced locally whenever possible, to ensure that every bite is bursting with flavor. From rich and aromatic curries to sizzling street food favorites, our menu offers a wide range of options to satisfy every palate.

At Mami's Takeout, we go beyond just delivering exceptional food. We also prioritize exceptional service. Our friendly and efficient staff are committed to providing a seamless ordering and delivery process, ensuring that your dining experience is stress-free and enjoyable from start to finish.

Whether you're hosting a gathering, craving a solo feast, or simply seeking a taste of home, Mami's Takeout is here to deliver the flavors you love, right to your doorstep. Indulge in the authenticity and convenience that we offer, and let us take you on a culinary journey you won't soon forget.

"Satisfy Your Cravings: Mami's Takeout - Where Convenience Meets Exquisite Taste."

Name: Coffee Bike World

Welcome to Coffee Bike World – where sustainability meets great taste. We’ve combined people’s love for coffee with the desire to protect the environment, creating a fully equipped, self-sustained mobile coffee shop built on an electric tricycle platform. With zero gas emissions and a low environmental footprint, our Coffee Bikes serve freshly brewed espresso drinks, black brew, pastries, and more — all while roaming the streets of Vancouver and the Lower Mainland at your convenience.

We specialize in mobile coffee catering for private events, corporate functions, weddings, markets, and festivals, offering everything from our signature Espresso Deluxe Bar to à la carte black brew and treats.

In addition to our local coffee service, we also build and sell custom-branded Coffee Bikes and Espresso Bars, shipping fully equipped mobile café units to entrepreneurs and businesses worldwide.

Whether you’re looking to hire a mobile coffee cart for your next event or start your own eco-friendly coffee business, you’re in the right place.

Name: High Regard Bar
Description:
High Regard is a premier mobile bartending service based in San Diego, CA. We are a team of dedicated, licensed bartenders who bring years of expertise to crafting top-tier craft cocktails. Our goal is to alleviate the stress of event planning by delivering an unforgettable bar experience for you and your guests.

Here's how we make it happen:
First, we start with a personalized consultation where we discuss the specifics of your event. From there, we curate a customized package and provide a detailed quote tailored to your unique needs and theme.

Once everything is agreed upon, we'll finalize the details with a contract and deposit to secure your date.

One of our favorite parts of the process is collaborating with you to design your ideal bar menu. Whether you're envisioning a selection of fine wines and beers or handcrafted signature cocktails featuring our house-made mixers, we'll ensure every drink reflects your vision.

Please note, as a Dry Hire Bartending Service in accordance with California's Liquor Laws, we're unable to provide alcohol for your event. However, we'll equip you with a precise shopping list to obtain exactly what you need.
When the big day arrives, High Regard will arrive fully prepared with all the essentials for a top-notch bartending service, including bar setup, licensed bartenders, insurance coverage, coolers, ice, mixers, disposable cups, and more. Our mission is to elevate your event, one drink at a time.

Should you have any questions about our services, feel free to reach out to us at contact@highregardbar.com. We're here to ensure your event is not only professionally executed but also personally tailored to exceed your expectations. We can't wait to make your celebration unforgettable!

Request a quote below: 
https://www.highregardbar.com/

Name: Food Fuelter
Description:
Food Fuelter is a software that filters through menus to find meals that fit your diet and fuel your body with proper nutrition, as the name implies. The software is currently in its development stages and aims to launch by the end of 2022.

Do you have food allergies? Are you struggling eating healthy on the go? Are you tired of googling "healthy food near me"? Well look no further, Food Fuelter is here to help you achieve your nutrition goals. 

How does it work? 

Create a nutrition profile for yourself, set daily caloric intake goals, list any food allergies or dislikes you have, and then click search. Food Fuelter will only show meals that fit your specified criteria and are within your delivery or pickup radius.

Name: Golden Fords Ltd
Description:
Welcome to the Golden Fords Coffee Trailer, where the magic of coffee meets the thrill of cocktails, all in the convenience of a mobile oasis. In addition to our exceptional coffee offerings, we're proud to introduce a tantalizing array of handcrafted cocktails, expertly mixed and served with flair.

Step inside our trailer, and you'll discover a fully stocked bar that rivals the finest cocktail lounges in town. From classic concoctions to innovative creations, our talented bartenders are here to delight your taste buds and elevate your experience to new heights. Picture yourself sipping on our signature Espresso Martini, a decadent blend of rich espresso, velvety smooth Kahlua, and premium vodka, shaken to perfection and topped with a flourish of coffee beans.

But the delights don't stop there. Our bar is also stocked with a curated selection of beers, wines, and top-shelf spirits, ensuring that there's something for every palate. Whether you're in the mood for a crisp lager, a full-bodied red, or a refreshing gin and tonic, we've got you covered. And with an array of premium mixers and garnishes on hand, the possibilities are endless – so go ahead, let your imagination run wild.

And just like our coffee offerings, our cocktail menu is fully customizable to suit your event's theme and preferences. Planning a tropical beach wedding? How about serving up some refreshing mojitos or piña coladas? Hosting a chic corporate soirée? Treat your guests to sophisticated classics like Old Fashioneds or Negronis. Whatever the occasion, our bartenders are ready to craft the perfect cocktail experience for you and your guests.

So whether you're craving the rich complexity of a perfectly brewed coffee or the invigorating kick of a meticulously crafted cocktail, Golden Fords Coffee Trailer is your one-stop destination for all things delicious. With our commitment to quality, creativity, and convenience, we're here to make every moment golden – one sip at a time.

We're excited to unveil Eatz, our innovative app designed to address food insecurity and food waste on college and university campuses. With Eatz, students can access free or low-cost meals, ensuring that no one has to choose between their education and a nutritious meal.

What Makes Eatz Unique?
 Affordable Meals: Providing students with easy access to free or low-cost meals, reducing financial stress and hunger.

 Reducing Food Waste: Collaborating with campus dining services and local businesses to redistribute surplus food, minimizing waste.

https://linktr.ee/eatzgroup

Join us in our mission to create a sustainable, food-secure campus community. Together, we can ensure that every student has access to the nourishment they need to succeed.

Description:
Plating Grace and Grub isn’t “just another food truck.”

 To some, it may be just a truck serving delicious grub… but we’re also Plating Grace by:  

· Serving amazing international comfort food with a meaningful message 

· Providing job formation, skills training, hiring assistance and personal growth opportunities for returning citizens (formerly incarcerated) 

· Mentoring young chefs and help them hone their culinary, teamwork and leadership skills, build relationships and find jobs 

· Collaborating with local charity groups to distribute food to the homeless and hungry

Plating Grace and Grub is a wholly-owned subsidiary of The Table Foundation, a 501(c)3 nonprofit.

Name: Meals on Wheels of Arlington VA
Description:
Meals on Wheels of Arlington, Virginia (a 501(c)(3) organization) was founded in 1974 as a largely volunteer organization delivering meals to homebound residents in Arlington, Virginia. We work in partnership with Arlington County's Agency on Aging, and are affiliated with MOW America. Our
volunteers work to ensure Arlington's homebound residents nutrition and provide social interaction by personally delivering meals weekly.

The stated vision of Meals on Wheels Arlington is “to increase outreach and fundraising to actively ensure homebound and food insecure seniors and people with disabilities living in Arlington County are provided with nutritious meals and personal contact which will significantly support their
desire to live independently”.

We deliver a package of 10 meals per week to an average of 200 clients each week. In 2023, 139 volunteers delivered more than 97,000 meals to 270 individual clients.

Description:
SmartButcher Redefining Fresh Meat Delivery

At SmartButcher, we bridge the gap between local farmers and consumers, ensuring that only the freshest, highest-quality meat makes its way to your table. 

Our mission is rooted in providing unmatched convenience while supporting sustainable farming practices.

We work directly with trusted local farmers to bring you premium, farm-fresh meat delivered right to your doorstep. Using advanced insulated boxes, we guarantee that every cut arrives fresh, flavorful, and safe.

For even more convenience, our smartboxes offer an on-demand, 24/7 vending solution, making it easier than ever to shop for fresh meat whenever you need it.

What Makes Us Different:
Farm-to-Table Freshness: Direct sourcing from local farmers ensures quality and supports sustainability.

Advanced Delivery System: Insulated boxes keep your meat fresh and safe throughout delivery.

Smart Vending Options: Strategically placed smartboxes offer easy access to fresh meat, anytime, anywhere.

At SmartButcher, we’re not just delivering meat, we’re building a community that values quality, convenience, and sustainability.

- Expertise in slow cooking techniques that enhance the depth and richness of every dish.

 Why Choose Us:
- We believe in the power of food to bring people together and enhance experiences.
- Our commitment to quality, flavor, and wellness sets us apart in the industry.
- Join us in savoring the art of slow cooking and the beauty of natural ingredients.

Whether you're seeking personalized menus for your film production or event, or simply looking for inspiration for delicious, healthy eating, we're here to serve. Follow us for culinary insights, recipe ideas, and a taste of what Healthy Flavour Time has to offer!

Name: SPED
Description:
SPED Delivery: Revolutionizing Local Services in Europe
SPED Delivery, developed by SPED Tech Oy, is a cutting-edge, multi-service platform designed to simplify daily needs by offering food delivery, taxi services, event management, and a local marketplace all in one app. Operating from Joensuu, Finland, SPED Delivery brings innovative, integrated solutions to customers and merchants alike.

Our Vision
We aim to become the leading platform in Europe for convenient and efficient local services, empowering communities with a seamless experience. Our focus is on creating a sustainable ecosystem that benefits both users and service providers while boosting the local economy.

Our Services
Food Delivery: Connect with a wide variety of local restaurants and enjoy fast and reliable delivery.
Taxi Services: Safe and efficient transportation with just a few clicks, available when you need it most.
Event Creation: An intuitive event management tool for organizing local happenings and drawing community attention.
Local Marketplace: A space for individuals to upload and sell second-hand products, making local trade simple and accessible.
Why SPED Delivery?
All-In-One Platform: Unlike competitors, we combine multiple services into one app, making it easier for users to fulfill various needs without switching platforms.
Lower Commission Rates: We offer more attractive commission structures for merchants, with fees as low as 5% when using their own delivery staff, compared to up to 35% from other providers.
Empowering Local Businesses: SPED Delivery integrates with restaurant websites, expanding their reach beyond our delivery zones and ensuring service access even in developed regions.
Competitive Edge: We prioritize user satisfaction through localized marketing strategies and personalized offers, while promoting our brand through strategic partnerships, car branding, and traditional and digital advertising.
Investment Opportunity
SPED Delivery presents a high-potential investme

Millions of restaurants owner just sleeping

Name: Make it Mine
Description:
People with dietary restrictions, such as food sensitivities, have great difficulty with following a strict diet. Although there is a vast number of recipes out there, these people still have a lot of difficulty to find recipes that are suitable for them, since food sensitivities are usually very personal and unique. In their searching process to find suitable recipes, usually online or in cookbooks, many recipes get discarded because they contain unsuitable ingredients. As a consequence, only very few recipes are left that match their requirements. This is why most people with dietary restrictions find it extremely hard to find good recipes that are suitable for their personal needs.

But there is a way to make all existing recipes accessible for them, and that is with our recipe personalization App. Simply run any existing recipe through the Make it Mine App and it will be transformed into essentially the same recipe, but made with ingredients that you can eat. This isn't only great when cooking for yourself,  but also when family or friends need to cook for you and you want to eat the same dish!

Welcome to CUXIE - Where Culinary Innovation Meets Sustainability!

By using cutting-edge technology and a user-centred approach, we make the supply chain more efficient and sustainable.

Our goal is to minimize food waste and ensure optimal use of resources. Join us as we work together to reduce food waste and build a more sustainable world.

By leveraging Garista, restaurants can easily create visually stunning menus, gain valuable insights into customer preferences, and efficiently manage their orders, ultimately leading to increased efficiency, customer satisfaction, and revenue growth with lower costs and higher profit margins.

Welcome to our Foodie Tech Solution, where innovative technology meets the art of dining. Whether you're running a cozy cafe or a high-end restaurant, our technology adapts to your needs, delivering unmatched convenience and efficiency. 

Explore Our Key Apps:

Name: CartLu
Description:
At CartLu, we're reviving India's cherished tradition of personalized vegetable shopping by bridging the gap between local vendors and urban households through technology. Our platform connects trusted street vendors with customers, bringing the authentic experience of selecting fresh produce right to your doorstep.

Born from the observation that rapid digitalization was eroding the personal connection in daily shopping, we've created a solution that preserves the best of both worlds: the convenience of digital ordering with the irreplaceable experience of personally selecting your fruits and vegetables from trusted local vendors.

Our mission is to empower local vendors while providing urban families with access to fresh, hand-picked produce. Through our technology platform, we're creating a sustainable ecosystem that supports thousands of micro-entrepreneurs while delivering convenience to millions of households.

We believe in:
- Preserving traditional shopping experiences
- Supporting local micro-entrepreneurs
- Ensuring quality and freshness
- Building community connections
- Combining tradition with technology

Name: JOVER
Description:
Con Jover, vivere un'esperienza al ristorante diventa semplice e intuitiva. Le persone possono prenotare il tavolo, consultare il menù digitale, ordinare direttamente dall'app e pagare in pochi clic, eliminando ogni attesa superflua. Un'esperienza senza interruzioni, fluida e completamente digitalizzata.

VISION
Jover immagina un mondo in cui le attese interminabili per un tavolo, un ordine o un pagamento appartengano al passato. Un mondo in cui l'esperienza al ristorante sia priva di stress, ottimizzata e pensata per chi desidera godersi ogni momento senza inutili perdite di tempo. Jover nasce con l'obiettivo di trasformare questa visione in realtà, creando un nuovo standard per il settore della ristorazione.

MISSION
Da questa esigenza nasce Jover: un'innovativa app che semplifica ogni fase dell’esperienza al ristorante, garantendo efficienza, rapidità e comodità. Grazie a un'interfaccia intuitiva e a funzionalità avanzate, Jover permette agli utenti di gestire con facilità prenotazioni, ordini e pagamenti, offrendo ai ristoratori uno strumento prezioso per ottimizzare il servizio e migliorare la soddisfazione dei clienti.

Jover non è solo un'app, ma un vero e proprio partner digitale per chi vuole vivere la ristorazione in modo smart, valorizzando il tempo proprio e quello degli altri.

Name: Petersilchen GmbH
Description:
BIOLOGISCHE FEINKOST VON PETERSILCHEN.
Die Petersilchen GmbH versteht sich als Pionier und Partner der Naturkostbranche mit dem Anspruch, ökologische Lebensmittel in höchster Qualität zu entwickeln und auf eigenen Anlagen zu produzieren. Die Freude an immer neuen Herausforderungen haben wir uns bis heute bewahrt.

Seit Mitte der 80er Jahre arbeiten wir mit ökologischen Lebensmitteln und aus dem ursprünglichen Fachhandel ist mit der Zeit ein moderner Produktionsbetrieb entstanden.

ERFAHRUNGEN UND KOMPETENZEN.
Als eine unserer Kernkompetenzen sehen wir unsere Entwicklungsabteilung, wo wir auch unter „Private Label“ vom Preiseinstieg, bis hin zum Premiumbereich marktgerechte Produkte entwickeln. Fundierte Marktkenntnisse und hoher Qualitätsanspruch sind unsere Stärke. Die optimale Umsetzung der Kundenwünsche in der Entwicklungsphase und Produktion ist eine der Grundlagen unserer Arbeit.

STARKE MARKEN.
Mit unseren Marken Sanchon und Fredo´s präsentieren wir internationale Biofeinkost und Snackartikel im Naturkostfachhandel. Unter unserer Marke biofinesse führen wir ein kleines Sortiment an Pastasaucen und Pesti. Unsere hochmoderne Produktionslinie für Glasgebinde mit einem Output von ca. 20.000 Glas/Schicht bietet nahezu alle Anforderungen, um kosteneffizient und qualitativ hochwertig produzieren zu können.

UNSERE LEISTUNG FÜR DEN GASTROBEREICH
Auf einer weiteren Produktionslinie produzieren wir für den Catering- und Gastrobereich eine breite Palette an Feinkostprodukten in HACCP-konformen Großgebinden mit Inhalten von 1000 ml – 4200 ml. Durch unsere Leistungsstärke, unserem Qualitätsanspruch und unserer Zuverlässigkeit haben wir uns als Hersteller für die verschiedensten Marktsegmente sehr erfolgreich etabliert.

Name: Make the Menu
Description: At Make the Menu, we get it—the daily challenge of figuring out what to eat for every meal and snack can be tough. Whether you're a busy professional with a packed schedule, a parent juggling multiple responsibilities, or someone who just wants to enjoy tasty, stress-free meals, we've got your back. Our mission is to make figuring out what to eat easy and fun, giving you delicious options for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks. With Make the Menu, you can say goodbye to the question "What am I going to eat?" and enjoy hassle-free dining all day long.

Name: C • L • E Cotton Candy
Description:
Cotton candy favorites with a touch of whimsy! Ready to step up your cotton candy game? 

All of our C • L • E Cotton Candy recipes are made with 100% all-natural, unrefined and non-GMO pure cane sugar that is made by squeezing and evaporating the juice from freshly harvested sugar cane that comes from eco-friendly mills and farms. Our products are also vegetarian/vegan friendly, non-GMO, and gluten free. Our flavorings used include pure essential oils, as well as a variety of other high quality flavorings that are gluten free and vegetarian/vegan friendly.

Your wish is our command! Unless noted in its description, all of our cotton candy is spun white to keep it as pure as possible (with the exception of our classic pink and blue). Color requests are available to be added. We do garnish with a variety of sprinkles/toppings. Please note that coloring and sprinkles/toppings are not guaranteed gluten free or vegan/vegetarian, you may request to have these removed when ordering. 

Enjoy a great product knowing it's made with care and you in mind!

Name: Die Gemüsegärtner
Description:
Wir sind ein Bio-Lieferdienst mit eigener Gärtnerei in Kalkriese im nördlichen Landkreis Osnabrück. Über unseren Online-Shop könnt ihr sozial und ökologisch nachhaltig produzierte Lebensmittel kaufen, die wir euch mit unseren eigenen Fahrzeugen nach Hause oder in die Firma bringen. Unsere Waren sind zu 100% biozertifiziert und kommen von uns selbst, aus der Region oder von anderen Bio-Betrieben. 

Unser Ziel ist es, gesunde Ernährung zur Normalität werden zu lassen. Dabei spielen auch Unternehmen eine wichtige Rolle und wir helfen gerne dabei, eine gesunde, nachhaltige und umweltbewusste Ernährungskultur in der Firma zu fördern. Da wir nur 100% biologische Waren anbieten, fördern wir nicht nur die Gesundheit der Mitarbeiter. Ein Pausensnack von uns hat nämlich auch positive Auswirkungen auf die Umwelt und die Unternehmenskultur. 
Unsere Themenbereiche hier auf Linkedin sind u. a.:
	•	Nachhaltige Kantinen- und Büroverpflegung
	•	Reduzierung von Lebensmittelverschwendung
	•	Gesunde Pausen-Snacks für Mitarbeiter
	•	Partnerschaften mit lokalen Bauern und Lieferanten
	•	Erfolgsstories von Unternehmen auf dem Nachhaltigkeitsweg
Wir teilen bewährte Praktiken, neueste Erkenntnisse aus der Forschung und inspirierende Geschichten von Unternehmen, die den Wandel hin zu nachhaltiger Ernährung vorantreiben. Unsere Vision ist es, eine Community von Unternehmern, HR-Experten, Nachhaltigkeitsmanagern und Gesundheitsbewussten zu vereinen, um gemeinsam eine bessere Zukunft zu gestalten.
Sei auch du mit dabei!

Description:
KOKIT is the world’s first interface built to connect consumers and food creators through a unified marketplace and social hub.
We’re laying the foundation for how humans will interact with food in the future, from how we discover it, to how we engage with the people who create it.

Our vision is to build the infrastructure that empowers food creators with sustainable tools, helping them grow, monetize, and thrive in a rapidly evolving digital economy. 

KOKIT brings together two massive trillion-dollar industries, food delivery and the creator economy, into a single ecosystem designed for the next generation of food culture.

Name: BIRDZ BITEZ
Description: BIRDZ BITEZ is a mobile food service that provides lunch and dinner meals service, and caters celebrations, festivals, and company events. We offer buffet and individual style to go and onsite catering. We specialize in delicious Caribbean and BBQ poultry, beef, and pork dishes. We offer an array of incredible dishes from hand crafted salads and sides to mouthwatering brisket, jerk chicken, and curry chicken. Our Carib-Tex menu offers combination of some of your favorite Caribbean, Barbecue, and American dishes giving us the ability to offer an unique experience according to our client’s needs. We can provide from Jerk or BBQ Chicken and Turkey Legs, Brisket, and Pork Ribs to Stew or Curry Chicken, Oxtail, and several our Handcrafted Sides and Salads to at least a dozen other of specialty items. We strive to provide exceptional customer service and delicious cuisine. We are experienced in providing quality food with short wait times for large events. We have proven we can keep up with the demand of high-volume festivals and events while maintaining our goal of fresh hot food and a wait time of less than 10 minutes.

Name: Medium
Description: Medium is a company owned and operated by longtime friends Aaron Ruzinsky and Steven Sykes. Through this passion project, Aaron and Steven share the vision of connecting to people and places through food, seeing food as a Medium. Chef Aaron (CIA Hyde Park, Michael Mina SF, Kettner Exchange, MBA) manages operations for Medium and brings to life a menu of fusions drawn from a fine dining background as he and Steven aim to positively impact the way San Diego eats. With Steven (Alvarez & Marsal, Seismic) overseeing business administration, Medium's growth will meet the demand for exemplary cuisine at public at private events.

Name: Rowena Coffee Cart
Description:
At Rowena Coffee, we bring the full café experience directly to you! Our custom mobile coffee cart offers a variety of premium espresso-based drinks, crafted with care and attention to detail. Whether it's a wedding, private event, corporate gathering, farmers market, or pop-up, we elevate your event with freshly brewed, high-quality coffee.

Based in Arizona, our cart is designed to fit seamlessly into any event, providing guests with delicious coffee and a memorable experience. With a passion for great coffee and exceptional service, we’re dedicated to making your special occasion even more unforgettable.

Book us today and let us add the perfect touch to your next event!

Name: Chives Food Truck
Description:
Get ready for a culinary adventure on wheels with Chives Food Truck! We're a team of passionate food enthusiasts, dedicated to delivering exceptional flavors and a unique dining experience to the streets of DFW Metroplex.

At Chives, we believe in crafting mouthwatering dishes using locally sourced ingredients, ensuring freshness and quality in every bite. From gourmet burgers that melt in your mouth to loaded fries bursting with cheesy goodness, our menu is designed to satisfy all your cravings. We also offer delectable gourmet sandwiches and flavorful tacos that will transport your taste buds to new heights.

You'll find us roaming the city, popping up at various locations throughout the week. Follow our social media accounts to stay updated on our current whereabouts and join us for an unforgettable feast. We're also available for catering services, ready to bring our flavors to your next event and leave your guests raving.

Come join us and embark on a culinary journey that combines creativity, passion, and the joy of food. Chives Food Truck is here to tantalize your taste buds and redefine street food, one delicious dish at a time.

Name: Toss & Fire
Description:
Founded in 2015 by Nick Sanford, Toss & Fire was born from a love for great pizza and a passion for bringing people together. Inspired by the authentic flavors and community spirit he grew up with in Connecticut, he decided it was time to follow his dream and bring wood-fired, hand-tossed pizza to CNY. In 2015, Nick had hit the road with a single wood-burning oven mounted on a trailer, serving up creations like the now-iconic ‘Cuse Salt Potato pizza.

What started as a mobile operation has grown into something much larger. Today, Toss & Fire operates three wood-fired pizza trucks and three restaurant locations, becoming a beloved staple in Central New York. Our journey continues, fueled by a commitment to quality, community, and the love of bringing people together, one slice at a time.

Name: Weitner / Kerscher GbR  Wurst Michl
Description:
1948 eröffnet Michael Sterner einen Kiosk in der Sonnenstraße in München. In diesem Jahr fuhr er mit seiner Frau Hildegard und ihren 3 Töchtern Brigitta, Hildegard und Angelika nach Tüßling auf die Tüßlinger Dult.

1949 war er zum ersten Mal auf der Auer Dult und ein Jahr später auf dem Münchner Oktoberfest sowie kleineren Märkten. Auf dem Münchner Christkindlmarkt war er auch vertreten früher in der Blumenstraße und seit 1972 auf dem Marienplatz.

1982 übernahm die zweite Tochter Hildegard den Stand. 1999 brachte sich ihre Tochter Manuela Weitner mit ein.

Manuelas Tochter Stefanie Kerscher mit Mann Michael Kerscher (auch ein Michl) ist jetzt die 4 Generation im Geschäft.

Die 5 Generation mit Lena Kerscher ist auch schon fleißig mit dabei. In diesem Sinne wünschen wir uns für die Zukunft weiterhin treue Kunden, die uns über Generationen schon begleitet haben.

Name: Ancalagüela
Description:
Bienvenidas a Ancalagüela! Somos un food truck especializado en comida vegetariana, local y sostenible. Creemos en la cocina artesanal, sin prisa y sin aditivos, utilizando ingredientes frescos y de kilómetro cero. Nuestra misión es llevar alimentos caseros y saludables a todos los rincones, participando en ferias, eventos y mercados, para que cada vez más personas puedan disfrutar de la cocina vegetariana sin excusas.

Además, ofrecemos servicios de cátering para eventos y celebraciones, demostraciones de cocina en vivo y venta al por menor de productos como patés, panes y dulces, todo hecho a mano y con amor.

Estamos comprometidas con la sostenibilidad y la conexión entre mente, cuerpo y naturaleza. En el futuro, planeamos desarrollar un multi-espacio donde ofreceremos charlas, talleres y actividades formativas sobre salud, bienestar y estilo de vida. También incluiremos una caravana food truck-cafetería para eventos y un área para tatuajes en la naturaleza, siguiendo principios de minimalismo y el slow movement.

En Ancalagüela, creemos en la colaboración con otras empresas y colectivos locales para fomentar la concienciación social y el compromiso con el medio ambiente. Únete a nosotras y descubre la experiencia de la comida vegetariana artesanal y sostenible.

Name: Sạch Sành Xanh - Everything Deserves a Second Chance!
Description:
Sạch Sành Xanh: Rescuing Fresh Food, Reducing Waste, and Saving You Money!

Hey food lovers and eco-warriors!  We're excited to introduce Sạch Sành Xanh, our innovative online service dedicated to recovering fresh food from restaurants, bakeries, cafes, and wholesalers that would otherwise go to waste. We're about to revolutionize how we think about food waste and savings, and we'd love for you to be part of this journey!

Our Mission
We connect food establishments with conscious consumers to reduce food waste and offer great deals on soon-to-expire products. It's a win-win for everyone involved!

How It Works
- We communicate with food establishments to add discounts on their close-to-expiration products.
- Our platform markets these discounted items to customers.
- Customers save money while helping to reduce food waste.

Why You Should Get Excited & Join Us:
 Gourmet Deals: Get high-quality, fresh food from your favorite local spots at unbeatable prices.
 Be an Eco-Hero: Every purchase helps reduce food waste, making a real environmental impact daily.
 Save Big: Enjoy fantastic food while being kind to your wallet.
 Support Local: Help food establishments reduce waste and increase their bottom line.
 Join a Community: Connect with like-minded foodies who care about sustainability.
 Be an Early Adopter: Get in on the ground floor of the next big thing in sustainable living and smart shopping.

How You Can Help:
 Spread the Word: Share this with your foodie friends and eco-conscious pals!
 Share Ideas: We'd love to hear your thoughts on how we can make Sạch Sành Xanh even better.
 Suggest Partners: Know any local food businesses that might be interested? Let us know!
Together, we can make a significant impact in reducing food waste while offering great deals to conscious consumers and supporting local food businesses. Share the Sạch Sành Xanh love and let's make a difference, one delicious deal at a time!

Let's Go Eco-Warriors!!

At Flaming Yeti, we're on a mission to redefine your burger experience. We take the bold flavors of the Himalayas and infuse them into every bite, creating a culinary adventure that's second to none. Our unique blend of Himalayan spices, premium ingredients, and expert craftsmanship come together to craft burgers that will make your taste buds tingle with delight.

Description:

We partner with restaurants to handle logistics and ensure quick, affordable, and reliable meal deliveries. Our mission is to simplify food ordering while helping restaurants grow and customers enjoy their favorite meals with ease.

Name: Piranoid
Description:
Founded in 2019 in Barcelona, Piranoid offers the best Guilt Free Pizza.

Millennials are more savvy and conscious about what they eat and demand from brands both transparency regarding the quality of their ingredients and great brand experience. They still indulge and order delivery 2-3 times but the current offer is still heavily grounded in fast food and highly processed ingredients.

We offer the pizza everyone craves, made with locally sourced ingredients to people who are concerned about the impact of food on their health and the environment. We strive to reduce sugars and processed ingredients to a minimum and base our ingredients on a flexitarian diet with vegetarian and vegan options. 

We understand food is more than just replenishing calories so we want to provide a platform for people to transition into more sustainable food habits and we do it by leveraging a cool and likable brand that represents an urban lifestyle, offering merchandising and entertaining content beyond food, such as music, events, etc.

Name: Mamma Mia Sopapilla

Name: DÖZE CHROMÉE
Description:

EatFree is making dining out safe, simple, and stress-free for everyone with food allergies, dietary restrictions, or preferences.

Name: CommonDish
Description:
Across Portugal and much of Europe, small and medium-sized restaurants and local food shops struggle to attract new customers due to limited digital visibility and the high commissions charged by existing delivery and marketplace platforms. Customers, on the other hand, face limited options for accessing meals and ingredients, whether dining out, ordering cooked meals, or purchasing fresh, local produce for home cooking.
Meanwhile, delivery partners often earn low pay with minimal flexibility, and communities lose the connection between local producers, eateries, and households.
Currently, no single platform creates a fair and shared ecosystem where restaurants, local shops, customers, and delivery partners can all thrive together.

Our mission is to bring everyone to the table, empowering local restaurants and neighborhood food shops with an affordable digital platform to showcase their meals, produce, and ingredients.
We provide customers with flexible meal and shopping options, from cooked dishes to fresh market produce, and give delivery partners fair opportunities to earn.
In summary, our mission is to build a shared ecosystem where everyone, restaurants, local shops, customers, and delivery partners, has a place at the CommonDish table.

At CommonDish, we’re reimagining how communities connect through food. Our platform brings together local restaurants, food shops, and delivery partners to create a fair, flexible, and sustainable food ecosystem.
Whether you want to order a warm meal, pick up fresh local produce, or support nearby businesses, CommonDish makes it easy and equitable for everyone.
We empower small and independent food businesses with digital visibility, give customers flexible options to eat or shop locally, and provide delivery partners with fair opportunities to earn.
CommonDish, food should not just be consumed; it should connect people, uplift communities, and be shared fairly by all.

Name: Amore Mio Evento - L'Italie à célébrer - Traiteur Italien Événementiel
Description:
"Amore Mio Evento" vous propose une expérience gastronomique et festive unique, au cœur de la convivialité italienne. 
Avec nos deux triporteurs Piaggio Ape, symboles d'une Italie chaleureuse et joyeuse, nous vous transportons dans un voyage culinaire inédit au coeur de votre événement.

Notre premier Piaggio Ape est transformé en un authentique food truck proposant des pizzas napolitaines contemporaines, portafoglio, panuozzo et pinsa romana. L'animation du pizzaiolo au cœur de l'action crée une atmosphère artistique et interactive.

Notre deuxième Piaggio Ape se métamorphose en un bar autonome, offrant une sélection raffinée de cocktails, de bières artisanales et de prosecco italien.

Pour l'apéritif, nous proposons des boxs de produits italiens à partager, comprenant des planches de fromages et de charcuteries fines, des arancini, des focaccia et des antipasti, pour un avant-goût gourmand de notre cuisine.

Côté desserts, notre offre comprend des douceurs italiennes traditionnelles telles que le tiramisu, revisité dans différentes variations pour satisfaire tous les palais.

Enfin, pour immortaliser vos moments uniques, notre photobooth personnalisable vous permettra de capturer des souvenirs instantanés et de partager des instants de joie avec vos proches.

Nos produits sont soigneusement sélectionnés parmi des ingrédients italiens et locaux de qualité, pour vous offrir une véritable immersion dans les saveurs authentiques de l'Italie.

Que ce soit pour un mariage élégant, un anniversaire mémorable, un festival, ou un événement d'entreprise réussi, notre concept s'adapte à tous les types d'événements et à tous les publics. Nous apportons une touche d'originalité et de convivialité à chaque occasion, en proposant des animations culinaires interactives et des mets délicieux.

Vivez une expérience authentique et inoubliable avec Amore Mio Evento, où la passion italienne rencontre la convivialité et la qualité.

Name: Bite India Official
Description:
What Bite is (a hyperlocal food delivery platform).

Who you serve (lower middle-class families, students, daily wage earners, etc.).

What makes you different (affordable pricing, ₹100–₹150 average order value, salary-based delivery model, zero commission stress for restaurants).

Big vision (making food delivery accessible & profitable in Tier-2 & Tier-3 cities).


3. Mission Statement
 “To make quality food delivery affordable for customers and sustainable for local restaurants in India’s heartland.”

4. Problem Bite Solves

Existing apps (Swiggy/Zomato) charge heavy commissions.

Restaurants lose profits.

Customers face high delivery fees + inflated prices.

Small towns & lower middle class are ignored.


5. Bite’s Solution
 Salary-based delivery boys with electric scooters (lower cost structure).
 Low to zero commission for restaurants.
 Affordable delivery fees for customers.
 Hyperlocal approach: focus on Tier-2 & Tier-3 cities.

6. Business Model & Revenue

Revenue through ad partners & in-app banners.

Franchise expansion model.

Profit on every order (~₹10 per order after expenses).


7. Traction / Growth Plan

Starting in Lucknow.

First franchise in 6 months (60K orders/month).

Expansion to 10 cities in 1 year (franchise model).

Target: ₹10+ crore turnover in 4 years.


8. “We are looking to collaborate with investors, food partners, and franchise owners who share our vision of affordable food delivery for Bharat.”

Name: Kitchen 212º
Description: Thank you for coming by Kitchen 212º! Our origins are based in Northeast Ohio, but our menu is inspired by global cuisine.  Kitchen 212º values raising temperatures and standards, and here’s why. At 211º, water is hot … but at 212º degrees, it boils. Just like that one extra degree tips water over its boiling point, we know that the right combination of flavors, ingredients, and techniques can push your taste buds over the edge. That one extra degree is what we’re constantly striving to provide. Behind the burners is Chef Mike Hamlin, an executive sous chef who has traveled and cooked across America. Mike launched Kitchen 212º alongside his wife, Mandy, amid the chaos of COVID-19. When their world got turned upside down, Mike and Mandy saw an opportunity to turn their passion for food and service into a small business that could bring delicious eats to the streets, while creating a much-needed sense of community in the process.

 A calendar and reminder settings so you never miss an insulin shot again

Name: BringFresh.eu
Description:
BringFresh - Online Supermarkt mit Lieferservice

BringFresh digitalisiert den stationären Lebensmittelhandel &
vernetzt sie mit einer nachhaltigen Logistik, um den regionalen Handel mit dem E-Grocery Business zu erweitern.

+++ Warum BringFresh? +++

Um dir das Leben lebenswerter zu gestalten, kannst du deinen kompletten Einkauf über BringFresh nach Hause liefern lassen und somit mehr Zeit mit wichtigerem verbringen. Wir vergleichen wöchentlich die Marktpreise der regionalen Wettbewerber & bieten dir die günstigsten Preise an. Bei uns hast du keinen Mindestbestellwert, damit du nur das kaufst, was du wirklich benötigst. Wir sind gegen Lebensmittelverschwendung und stehen für ein bewusstes und nachhaltiges Einkaufen. Ab 50€ Bestellwert, entfallen sogar die Liefergebühren, sodass du deine Lebensmittel kostenlos nach Hause geliefert bekommst. BringFresh sucht dir die besten Angebote aus deiner Region aus und leitet dir die Rabatte täglich weiter.

Name: Holy Mo's
Description:
“Holy Mo’s Gourmet Hot Dogs and Sausages, Tamales, Elotes and Churros are Full Service Mobile Food Carts Serving the Bay Area. Heavenly Delicious!”
Holy Mo's Gourmet Dogs
Known for our “Build Your Own Menu” featuring 100% Beef Hot Dogs, Polish Sausages, Hot Links, Chicken Andouille Sausages and upon request, Bratwurst Sausage and Veggie Dogs.

 

Our Tamales
Come with Chicken, Pork or Cheese and Peppers.  All meats are quality cuts made from a signature family recipe of time-perfected flavors.

Elotes in a Cup
Savor the flavors of traditional Mexican street corn in a convenient cup! Our elotes in a cup are a delightful mix of freshly roasted corn kernels, creamy mayo, and savory cheese. Each bite offers a perfect balance of smokiness, creaminess, and a hint of spice, topped with fresh gourmet toppings for that extra burst of flavor. Enjoy this classic treat on the go, packed with the authentic taste of elotes, now in an easy-to-eat, portable form.
Spam Musubi
Experience the delicious taste of Spam Musubi! This Hawaiian favorite features a slice of savory Spam, perfectly grilled and placed on a bed of seasoned rice, all wrapped in a strip of crispy nori seaweed. Whether you enjoy it as a snack or a meal, Spam Musubi offers a delightful blend of flavors and textures that will transport you straight to the islands. Try this unique and tasty treat today!

Warm Churros
Our churros are made using the finest quality ingredients, ensuring an authentic taste with every bite. Each churro is expertly fried to golden perfection, resulting in a crisp outer layer that gives way to a soft, doughy interior. Lightly dusted with cinnamon sugar, with a choice of chocolate and caramel syrup. Our churros offer a harmonious balance of sweetness and spice that is simply irresistible.

Description: The existential problem we face is to conserve the environment and promote economic equality while we deliver healthy food and groceries at a large-scale. I Luv Elotes: Products & Services Overview

I Luv Elotes is a food truck business that brings a unique twist to Mexican-inspired cuisine, blending bold African-American flavors into our dishes. We serve a variety of handcrafted street food with high-quality ingredients, ensuring every bite is flavorful and memorable.

Products:
	•	 Tacos – Made with fresh ingredients, seasoned with our signature cultural twist.
	•	 Quesadillas – Cheesy, grilled perfection with bold flavors.
	•	 Nachos – Loaded with savory toppings for a satisfying crunch.
	•	 Elotes (Mexican Street Corn) – Infused with rich seasonings and toppings.
	•	 Refreshing Drinks – Specialty beverages complementing our bold flavors.

Services:
	•	 Food Truck Events – Serving at local hotspots, festivals, and private locations.
	•	 Catering Services – Customizable menu options for events, corporate gatherings, and private parties.
	•	 Pop-Up Experiences – Special appearances at community events, markets, and businesses.
	•	 Community Impact – Providing job opportunities for youth and formerly incarcerated individuals while teaching food industry and financial literacy skills.

I Luv Elotes is more than just food—it’s a cultural experience that blends great taste, community engagement, and economic empowerment into every meal we serve.

Name: foodmataz.com
Description:
Foodmataz.com is an innovative platform that connects buyers with local sellers of food items and meals in their area. Our mission is to empower small-scale food sellers and promote sustainable local food systems while providing a convenient and efficient service to our customers. We believe that everyone should have access to fresh, healthy, and sustainably produced food items and meals, and we are committed to making this a reality through our platform.

Foodmataz.com offers a user-friendly platform where sellers can create profiles and list the products they have available for sale, and buyers can browse and purchase these products. Our platform uses location proximity to connect buyers with the nearest sellers and dispatch riders, ensuring that products are delivered quickly and efficiently. Sellers can also specify their delivery range to ensure that they receive orders from buyers within a certain distance, helping buyers to minimize transportation costs and increase efficiency.

Foodmataz is committed to promoting sustainable local food systems, and we work with sellers who use sustainable farming practices and prioritize environmental stewardship. We believe that by connecting buyers with local sellers, we can help to reduce food waste, support local economies, and promote healthy and sustainable food choices.

Name: Tiramisumma
Description:
Tiramisumma è una realtà d'eccellenza italiana dedicata alla produzione e distribuzione di tiramisù artigianale, fondata da Marina Summa, Campionessa Mondiale di Tiramisù Creativo.
Con il nostro iconico furgoncino rosa offriamo un'esperienza dolce e indimenticabile, portando il nostro amato dessert
direttamente ai vostri eventi. 
Siamo specializzati in servizi di catering per eventi privati, come matrimoni, compleanni, battesimi e qualsiasi altra celebrazione abbiate in programma!
Collaboriamo con aziende fornendo soluzioni su misura per occasioni speciali come Family Day ed eventi corporate.
Che si tratti di una celebrazione intima o di una grande festa, il nostro tiramisù artigianale saprà conquistare i vostri ospiti.
Oltre ai catering, la nostra chef Marina Summa, con la sua esperienza come docente di scuola professionale, offre una gamma di servizi esclusivi:
•Chef a domicilio, preparando il suo rinomato tiramisù direttamente nella tua cucina.
•Corsi privati di pasticceria per adulti e bambini, perfetti per apprendere le tecniche e i segreti della preparazione di questo famosissimo dolce.

Ma non ci fermiamo qui!
Sei un ristoratore? 
La nostra azienda è qui per aiutarti a stupire i tuoi clienti, offri un dessert di qualità, preparato con ingredienti selezionati, facile da servire e dal sapore autentico. Sappiamo quanto sia importante la soddisfazione dei tuoi ospiti, e con i nostri tiramisù potrai garantirla ogni giorno. 
Scegliere i nostri prodotti significa puntare sull'eccellenza, sulla tradizione e sulla sicurezza di servire un dolce che emoziona, realizzato dalla migliore esperta del settore.
Scegli la qualità, scegli il tiramisù che ha fatto la storia.

Portiamo passione, competenza e dolcezza in ogni progetto, sempre con un tocco di rosa!

By connecting diners with personalized dish suggestions, we eliminate the guesswork and elevate every meal into a memorable experience.

TasteBud is committed to:

Enhancing dining decisions with precision and personalization.
Supporting diverse dietary preferences, including vegan, gluten-free, and more.
Continuously improving through user feedback and machine learning.
We believe dining should be stress-free, enjoyable, and tailored to individual tastes. TasteBud is here to make every meal count, one dish at a time.

Join us on our journey to redefine how the world enjoys food!

About Us

Kuneo Group was established in 2022 with a vision to create a dynamic, purpose-driven business that reflects our heart for excellence and devotion to God. Our name, Kuneo, is inspired by the Greek word Proskuneo, which is most often translated as worship and speaks to an attitude of reverence, service, and wholehearted dedication. Kuneo Group serves as the umbrella for a collection of unique companies that together offer a diverse range of products and services, each united by a commitment to quality, innovation, and integrity. Name: Little Yellow Rice Co
Description:
Little Yellow Rice Co is a Peranakan supper club experience, exploring Nyonya culture through the flavours of Hainan & Malaysia.

Peranakan // refers primarily to Straits-born Chinese — that is, to those born in the former Straits Settlements (specifically, Singapore, Penang, and Melaka) or in the former British Malaya (now Peninsular Malaysia) and their descendants.

Founded in 2020 to share my cultural heritage with others and showcase authentic, regional dishes.

Our story begins around 1920 when my great-grandfather left our ancestral home, the Ooi Klan house in Hainan, China and travelled to Malaysia. There, he set up a kopi (coffee) house in one of the suburbs, which was successful and exists to this day. When visiting it as a child to meet with my cousins, I remember feeling proud of how well known our family was. Even at 4 years old, hearing mention of my grandfather made me think of our heritage and what we’d achieved. 

Many of my family members still live in and around Penang, Malaysia. And, like me, have set up businesses of their own. 

Peranakan cuisine is diverse and rich, but with each generation, it fades. My aim for Little Yellow Rice Co. is to shine a light on its melting pot of flavours and culture. It’s my way of celebrating Peranakan food, tradition and heritage — with a growing community of those who want to eat together 

We host regular pop-up supper clubs and food events across the country. Typically during the course of the evening, you’ll experience a selection of family-favourite dishes as curated by the Ooi klan — enjoyed in an informal setting. 

Expect classic Nyonya dishes, alongside food which showcases the flavours of Penang, to be shared and eaten together. Every meal is accompanied by an informative talk and my lived experiences, drawing on the history of the Ooi klan, food, family and culture

We believe in the power of community and the impact of collective kindness, and so for every 10 totes purchased, we’ll donate 1 to an underprivileged family. By partnering with you and donors, we ensure that every contribution directly nourishes those in need, fostering health, hope, and unity. 

Join us in our commitment to make food security a reality for every household.

Name: Deliverheat
Description:
Deliverheat: De Revolutie in Maaltijdbezorging met Mobiele, Verwarmde Ovens.

Deliverheat transformeert de maaltijdbezorgingsindustrie met innovatieve verwarmde cargo-oplossingen voor restaurants en maaltijdleveringsplatformen. Koud eten is een veelvoorkomende klacht die klanten afschrikt van online bestellen. Deliverheat biedt daarom cargofietsen met actief verwarmde en geventileerde compartimenten aan, wat de voedselkwaliteit waarborgt, de leveringsafstand vergroot, klanten behoudt, operationele efficiëntie verbetert en de winst verhoogt vergeleken met traditionele isolatiezakken.

Visie en Missie 
Deliverheat wil de bezorgervaring revolutioneren door ervoor te zorgen dat maaltijden warm en krokant, van het restaurant tot aan de klant raken. Wij streven ernaar dé oplossing te worden voor restaurants en bezorgdiensten die klanttevredenheid en efficiëntie willen verhogen.

Innovatieve Oplossingen
Onze verwarmde ovens voor cargofietsen, (elektrische) scooters en auto’s houden voedsel warm en krokant, zelfs bij langere afstanden. Vooral de Belgische trots – frietjes – blijft dankzij onze technologie perfect op temperatuur en krokant.

Waardepropositie
Voor maaltijdleveringsplatformen betekent warme levering hogere voedselkwaliteit en grotere leveringsafstanden, wat nieuwe klanten aantrekt. Horecazaken profiteren van trouwere klanten door consistent warme bezorging.

Toekomstplannen
Deliverheat staat klaar om de markt te betreden en maaltijdbezorging te herdefiniëren. We plannen verdere investeringen in productontwikkeling en marketing om onze positie te versterken en ons klantenbestand uit te breiden. Met onze innovatieve oplossingen willen we dé partner worden voor restaurants en bezorgdiensten in België en daarbuiten.

Name: Bermuda Trail Mix
Description:
Amongst a saturated market of yummy and nostalgic homemade goods, Bermuda Trail Mix has had to prove itself worthy amongst the big dawgs, with great taste and healthier snack options. 

Founded in 2021, we first introduced our product as a lunch time snack run in the City of Hamilton, the first selection of flavours - Crunchy Craving and Smackin' Smores were an immediate success. Everyone that was willing to try our new snacks were in for a sweet and savoury treat. 

Often purchased as "something to try" with a significant other or family/ children, returning customers were sure to double or triple their order from their previous. Thanks to our first retail partnerships at Rubis East Broadway Service Station, Treats Ltd., and Roy's Fine Foods, our exposure grew quickly. 

Unfortunately in 2022, when the prices of food increased, in addition to some meaningful conversations with veteran business owners about the stability of the business, we made the uncomfortable decision to increase our prices. Our quickly populating, well packaged and tasty product quickly experienced a plummet in sales and for months we wandered the fate of the business - there were even considerations to dissolve the company. 

Fortunately, we listened to our junior co-founder who advised against quitting and we are glad we did. In the interim new opportunities have become available to our small and unique business. Within this space we look forward to sharing our growth with you while building new business connections and relations, establishing and introducing new offers while gunning for our international distribution, one bite at a time!

Description:
Zutado Soul is the vision of a girl from Detroit that grew up on great food and great music.  Zutado Soul combines amazing, uniquely crafted flavors and sauces, with the best sounds of Motown Music to- Makes yo' taste buds sang!  

Our daring combination of flavors are health conscience, so nothing is fried.  Our mission is to provide healthy fast-food, take-out alternatives with unique tastes and freshness.

All of our vegetables are farm fresh.  We mix the nostalgic theme from familiar old school artists, with the nostalgic side dishes of the past (baked potatoes, and zucchini), to create our meals.

Description:

Inspired by a homemade relish recipe from Viggo, these teenage entrepreneurs offer classic franks, sourcing locally and prioritizing quality. From "The Dawg" to "The New Yorker" and "The Sassy St. Paul," and the potential of themed dogs per event, their menu boasts delicious flavors to satisfy those hot dog cravings. 

Beyond delicious bites, Relish Brothers give back, with a percentage of profits supporting the St. Paul based Sanneh Foundation's free youth sports camps. Customers indulge in more than just a tasty treat—they're supporting a meaningful cause, making Relish Brothers a delicious way to make a difference in the community.

LDV’s mission is to share the joy of sweet moments and life on two wheels to inspire more people to adopt a bicycle-friendly lifestyle.

Pensadas para un público que se mueve rápido y exige sabor sin compromisos, nuestras burgers mezclan ingredientes frescos, recetas originales y una actitud libre que no se rinde ante lo común.

En Rapaz, no buscamos gustar a todos. Buscamos volarte la cabeza a la primera mordida.

Name: Nutrolina
Description:
Nutrolina, established in December, 2021, is a private health and wellness company based in Karachi, Pakistan. With the mission of providing healthy and delicious food products for all, Nutrolina introduces a revolutionary approach to snacking. Our tagline, "Real Food for Real People," encapsulates our commitment to merging health and taste.

At the heart of our innovation is the introduction of Spirulina platensis, a superfood, into everyday snacks. Our flagship product, SpiroCake, transforms traditional cupcakes into a nutritious delight, incorporating Spirulina and various nuts.

Complementing SpiroCake is Spiroflax. Designed for those seeking muscle mass, Spiroflax combines Spirulina with seeds to offer an energy-packed, additive-free snack. Both products are retailed on Facebook (@Nutrolina) and Instagram (@nutrolina.ltd), ensuring accessibility for a diverse audience.

Nutrolina's competitive edge lies in being the first to introduce Spirulina platensis in Pakistan. This novelty, supported by research, positions Nutrolina as a trailblazer in the market, offering unique, health-conscious alternatives. Our goals extend beyond product development to building a retail platform, promoting superfoods in Pakistan, and addressing malnutrition through nutritional enhancements.

Join us in the Nutrolina movement toward healthier living. With each Spirulina-infused snack, we aim to transform ordinary indulgences into extraordinary, health-conscious choices.

Name: fromhom
Description:
In the heart of Beirut, food isn't just a necessity - it's a way of life. From the bustling streets to the quiet corners, the aroma of delicious cuisine wafts through the air, tempting our taste buds and reminding us of the rich culinary traditions that make our city so special.

But while the food in Beirut is certainly something to celebrate, we believe that it's the people behind the meals that truly make them special. That's why we created #FromHom - a culinary community that's bringing together vulnerable communities and food lovers alike, to build a stronger, healthier, and more inclusive Beirut.

We bieden een ruim assortiment aan glutenvrij eten van brood en pasta tot snacks en tussendoortjes. Alles is 100% glutenvrij én met zorg geselecteerd op smaak en kwaliteit.

Elke maand verrassen we onze klanten met een glutenvrije box, vol nieuwe en vertrouwde producten om uit te proberen – makkelijk, lekker en zonder gedoe.

Daarnaast hebben we onze eigen GLUUTBAI BAR ontwikkeld een glutenvrije variant van de dubai reep.

Onze missie is om glutenvrij eten leuker, makkelijker en toegankelijker te maken voor iedereen.

Name: CapsaFood
Description:
C’est le moyen le plus rapide pour commander vos repas en ligne, depuis votre smartphone grâce à notre application gratuite.

Présent exclusivement à Gafsa en Tunisie, CapsaFood vous apporte chez vous ou sur votre lieu de travail les repas d'une large gamme des restaurants à Gafsa. Nous pensons que manger est un plaisir, et que commander un repas devrait être rapide et amusant.

Commander sur CapsaFood est simple comme une recette en trois étapes:

1- Choisir vos plats préféré :

Parcourez des centaines de menus pour trouver la nourriture qui vous plait.

2- Livraison rapide :

La nourriture est préparée et livrée chez vous par le restaurant de votre choix.

3- Paiement à la livraison :

Payez rapidement et de manière sécurisée à la livraison.

Que ce soit sur mobile, tablette ou ordinateur, l’expérience CapsaFood reste toujours aussi une solution pratique!

Name: PRO EXPRESS
Description:
PRO EXPRESS je tvrtka sa sjedištem u Zadru koja se ponosi postignućima i konstantnim rastom. 
Pružamo visokokvalitetne usluge dostave hrane diljem Hrvatske, kroz partnerstvo s renomiranim kompanijama poput Glovo i Wolt. 

Naša priča je priča o kontinuiranom razvoju, s temeljnim kapitalom isključivo iz domaćih izvora. Naša poslovna strategija temelji se na održivosti i stabilnosti poslovanja, s fokusom na globalno zapošljavanje. 
Tijekom 2022. godine, ostvarili smo značajan rast prihoda u odnosu na prethodnu godinu, što svjedoči o našoj stalnoj poslovnoj ekspanziji i uspješnosti.


U PRO EXPRESSU ne pružamo samo sigurne usluge našim korisnicima - pružamo povjerenje, kvalitetu i izvrsnost.

Name: The Butcher Shop
Description:
Somos el círculo gastronómico más exclusivo, selecto y de alta cocina de toda la República Dominicana, conformado por las más reconocidas figuras, marcas
y productos de la rama culinaria y retail de Santo Domingo y Punta Cana.

Como marca, en nuestros estándares y procesos, ofrecemos lo más exclusivo y high end. Nuestra amplia cartera de clientes y marcas engloba los paladares más exigentes. Somos sin duda sinónimo de calidad, donde encuentras la mejor y más fina selección de productos culinarios.

Name: Beyond Boba
Description: Beyond Boba is the finest mobile boba trailer in WNY. Boba tea is fresh imported tea leaves brewed to perfection and infused with original flavors. Our wide selection of flavors and toppings provides a unique experience for all guests. Beyond Boba travels to various fairs and festivals within the Northeast during the summer months of the year.
