Name: Capulus Danmark
Description:
Hos Capulus Danmark vil vi gerne imponere vores gæster, med det der lille ekstra, der gør en god kop kaffe til noget helt særligt. Vi elsker at forkæle vores gæster, og det gør vi for eksempel med en lun cookie direkte fra ovnen eller andre lækkerier, som vores skønne økologiske saft eller en økologisk vegansk is.
Alt er selvfølgelig lokalt produceret og vi forsøger at arbejde bæredygtigt.

Vores flotte kaffebil kan bookes til markeder, festivaller, messer, firmaarrangementer, private fester og meget mere. Det er kun fantasien, der sætter grænser.

Kontakt os i dag for at høre mere om mulighederne for, at forkæle dem du holder af med lidt lykke i en kop.

Name: Frietkar.nl
Description:
Frietkar.nl 
De beste, lekkerste en gezelligste frietkar van het land.  

Onbeperkt genieten van de lekkerste friet en snacks aan huis of op kantoor.

Wij hebben de meeste snacks
In het basis arrangement heeft u de keuze uit 15 verschillende snacks.

Wij kiezen alleen de aller beste snacks
100 grams frikandel, 25% kroket, traditionele Vietnamese loempia's, de lekkerste bami's.

Gezellige frietbazen
Ons team bestaat uit ervaren Frietbazen die van frietbakken een beleving maken, De Brabantse gezelligheid nemen wij overal mee naar toe.

Professionele frietwagens 
Wij beschikken over nieuwe en hypermoderne frietwagens. Die zorgen voor kwaliteit en uitstraling.

Van iedere gelegenheid maken wij een smakelijk en gezellig feest. 
Van kleine huiselijke gezelschappen tot mega evenementen, Frietkar.nl frietwagens is voor iedereen beschikbaar. Naast maatwerk hebben wij een aantal standaard arrangementen o.a. Party Pieper, Fiesta Patat en het BonkenFest.

Onbeperkt eten op een door u aangewezen locatie, wij zorgen ervoor. De frietwagens zijn ingericht volgens het HACCP systeem en beschikken over de

nieuwste snufjes op gastronomie gebied. Hierdoor kunnen wij snel de lekkerste kwaliteit afleveren. Wij bakken onze friet en snacks in 100% plantaardige oliën, die voldoen aan alle eisen van de campagne Verantwoord Frituren.

Name: Dinner Drop-Off
Description:
Dinner Drop-Off began back in 2007 with a casserole and a dream.  This chef-driven service is a premium provider of healthy, balanced meals designed to make dinner fun!  As a woman/Texan owned business, we take pride in serving the BEST meals available in the DFW area!  

Our goal is to help families get back to the dinner table sharing a homemade meal and get out of the drive-thru!  No dirty dishes. Just a delicious meal & quality time together!  

We drop off fully-cooked dinners at your doorstep every week.  Just pre-heat your oven, pop in your dinner & set the timer. About 30 minutes later, you are ready to enjoy your meal!  Easy peasy!  

We also specialize in corporate boxed lunch catering so you can enjoy the quality of our meals at your office with your employees & co-workers as well!

Name: Mamma la Ricotta !
Description:
Foodtruck conçu pour représenter le Sud de l'Italie grâce à ses spécialités streetfood traditionnelles ! Basés dans la Drôme, nous nous déplaçons dans toute la France pour régaler vos convives.

Nous proposons notamment des arancini, une spécialité venue tout droit de Sicile. Si cela ne vous parle pas encore, ce sont de petites boules de risotto fourrées et frites sur place. Ce qui leur donne une texture croustillante à l’extérieur et bien fondante à l’intérieur !

Bien entendu nous produisons toutes nos spécialités in casa ! Autrement dit, nous réalisons tout nous même, à base de produits frais, dans notre labo avant chaque événement. Ensuite nous nous occupons de la cuisson directement sur site, depuis notre stand (modulable selon le lieu) afin de proposer nos produits dans des conditions optimales ! 

Notre stand, se caractérise par ses couleurs chatoyantes et sa déco faite de détails directement inspirés de ce que l'on peut apercevoir sur le Marché de Ballaro à Palerme ! A cela s'ajoutent notre verve et notre enthousiasme invétéré pour faire découvrir nos spécialités au plus grand nombre. Tous ces éléments constituent, depuis le premier jour, l'essence même de Mamma la Ricotta ! 

Nous nous déplaçons dans toute la France pour faire découvrir nos recettes lors :
- D’événements publics : concerts, festivals, foodcourts, événements sportifs...
- D’événements privés : particuliers et professionnels

Name: GastroYummy
Description:
Gastroyummy, sağlıklı yaşamı benimseyenler için geliştirilmiş yenilikçi bir platformdur. Glutensiz, vegan, vejetaryen, ketojenik ve benzeri özel beslenme türlerine uygun işletmeleri hızlıca bulmanızı, bu işletmelerde ayrıcalıklı fırsatlardan yararlanmanızı ve deneyimlerinizi paylaşmanızı sağlar. Misyonumuz, sağlıklı beslenmeyi herkes için erişilebilir ve sürdürülebilir kılmaktır.

Platformumuz, Türkiye’nin dört bir yanındaki işletmeleri detaylı filtreleme seçenekleriyle listeler. Kullanıcılar, bulundukları konuma en yakın, ihtiyaçlarına en uygun mekânı kolayca keşfeder. İşletmeler ise hedef kitlesine doğrudan ulaşır, marka bilinirliğini artırır ve özel kampanyalarla müşteri memnuniyetini güçlendirir.

Gastroyummy ekibi olarak, sürekli güncellenen verilerle doğruluğu garanti edilmiş içerikler sunar; güvenilir ve şeffaf bilgi akışı sağlar. Amacımız, sadece bir listeleme hizmeti değil, sağlıklı yaşamı destekleyen güçlü bir ekosistem oluşturmaktır.

Gastroyummy ile “Ne yesek?” sorusu artık hem sağlıklı hem de size özel cevap buluyor.

Name: Arepatoire
Description:
Arepatoire is a love story. Sofi and Gioele met as students, and despite the fact she's very gluten intolerant and his love language revolves around timeless Italian classics (pasta, pizza), they fell in love. With a slight dilemma on their hands, he humbly accepted t\and grew to love the  gluten free staples of her Colombian food, where corn (maize) is favored over wheat in home cooking. Cue to their culinary =eureka moment, when 'arepatoire' was invented. 

Arepas are stuffed maize cakes (think crispy on the outside and fluffy on the inside) eaten every day in Colombia,where Sofi’s family comes from. Sofi and Gioele soon discovered they can also be a versatile companion to his favorite Italian fillings. What started as a clever solution to a dietary requirement, has become AN imaginative take on traditional recipes featuring a revolving menu to reflect their ever-changing sources of inspiration, cravings, and ideas.  With inclusivity at the core of Arepatoire's ethos, theey always provide both vegan and halal options for their customers. 

Find them at Pilgrims Way, East Ham, Tues- Sat from 11am throughout the summer; support local businesses and taste some fantastic fusion arepas!

Name: Verdura - Fruits et légumes découpés
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle de Verdura, votre partenaire de choix pour des fruits et légumes frais prédécoupés de qualité supérieure. Fondée avec l'ambition de résoudre les défis quotidiens des professionnels de la restauration, Verdura se consacre à fournir des solutions alimentaires sur mesure, pratiques et durables.

 Pourquoi Verdura ? 

Qualité supérieure : Nous nous engageons à fournir des fruits et légumes de la plus haute qualité, négociés directement avec des agriculteurs et des marchés de gros.

Gain de temps : Nos produits prédécoupés sont une solution clé en main pour les cuisines en manque de temps et de personnel. Ils permettent de réduire les coûts et d'améliorer l'efficacité opérationnelle.

Durabilité : Opérant depuis notre laboratoire certifié à Jassans Riottier, nous adoptons des pratiques respectueuses de l'environnement, allant de la réduction des déchets à la livraison efficace.

 Livraison flexible

Nous offrons des livraisons du lundi au samedi dans un rayon de 30 km autour de Villefranche-sur-Saône, vous garantissant ainsi une flexibilité maximale pour répondre à vos besoins opérationnels.

 Produits phares

Frites fraîches : Disponibles en tailles 10x10 mm et 8x8 mm, nos frites sont 100% naturelles, sans conservateurs et conditionnées sous vide.

Légumes de saison découpés : Personnalisés selon les besoins de chaque chef et chaque recette.

Fruits de saison et exotiques : Découpés et emballés selon vos besoins spécifiques.

 Pour les professionnels

Nous comprenons que le secteur de la restauration est en constante évolution et confronté à des défis tels que le recrutement de personnel. Verdura s'adresse à ce point en offrant une solution qui minimise le temps et l'effort nécessaires pour la préparation des aliments, vous permettant de vous concentrer sur ce qui compte vraiment : votre entreprise.

Name: The 4th Sister, Co.
Description:
The 4th Sister is a corporate events food delivery service providing authentic Guatemalan food in metropolitan Miami. We offer a variegated menu including exotic food like Pepian, the national Guatemalan dish, which includes a savory pumpkin seed sauce, and other items such as Chiles Rellenos (stuffed peppers), Tacos, Carne Asada, and a few side dishes.

MISSION & VISION

Our main goal is to be positive role models to our kids and a catalyst for change within the Guatemalan community. We envision Guatemalans everywhere taking pride in our culture and going after their dreams just like we did ours.

OUR VALUES

Tradition: The processes and ingredients incorporated are authentic to Guatemalan cuisine.

Quality: We use the highest quality ingredients available including organic and grass fed.

Innovation: New techniques are incorporated to ensure the best experience.

Collaboration: We work with as many local and Guatemalan vendors.

Name: MojeDostawy.pl - woda mineralna, soki, napoje
Description:
MojeDostawy.pl to dynamicznie rozwijająca się firma oferująca WaaS - (Water as a Service). 
W swojej unikalnej ofercie, oferuje szeroki wybór wysokiej jakości wód w szklanych butelkach zwrotnych, dostarczając je regularnie do biur, firm i domów prywatnych. Nasza firma jest przyjazna dla środowiska i gwarantuje dostępność do zdrowego, świeżego źródła wody, bezpośrednio do Twojego miejsca.

Rozumiemy, że potrzeby każdego klienta są unikalne, dlatego oferujemy usługi typu Pay as you Go. Bez umów, bez abonamentów, po prostu płacisz za to, czego używasz. Zasady są proste i przejrzyste, co sprawia, że jesteśmy przyjaźni dla Klientów. Wspieramy elastyczność i dostosowujemy nasze usługi do Twoich indywidualnych potrzeb.

W MojeDostawy.pl, mamy na celu ułatwić Ci życie. Nasz prosty system subskrypcji pozwala na stałe dostawy wody prosto do Twojego domu lub biura. Możesz zdecydować, ile i jak często potrzebujesz wody, a my zajmiemy się resztą.

Ponadto, świadomi wpływu na środowisko, z dumą oferujemy szereg napojów w szklanych butelkach zwrotnych. To nie tylko zmniejsza ilość odpadów, ale również zapewnia świeżość i smak napojów, które są zachowane w szkle.

W MojeDostawy.pl, woda nie jest tylko produktem - to usługa. Dostarczamy wodę jako usługę, z szacunkiem do Ciebie, do Twojego zdrowia i do środowiska. Naszym celem jest dostarczyć Ci najlepszą jakość wody w najbardziej wygodny sposób. MojeDostawy.pl - to twoje źródło zdrowia, dostarczone prosto do Ciebie, zawsze, kiedy tego potrzebujesz.

Name: The Load & Lounge
Description:
The Load & Lounge is a mobile café and lifestyle concept bringing comfort and convenience to business parks and industrial sites. We serve handcrafted breakfast and lunch options including our signature Japanese milk bread sandwiches alongside premium barista-style drinks.

Beyond great food, we offer a wash & fold laundry service, giving busy professionals more time to focus on what matters most. Our mission is to make everyday routines easier, one coffee, sandwich, and clean load at a time.

At The Load & Lounge, we believe that everyday routines from grabbing breakfast to doing laundry, can be transformed into meaningful moments. Our ethos is built on three key pillars:

1. Sustainability at the Core
Eco-friendly packaging, energy-efficient equipment, and mindful choices reduce our footprint while keeping quality high.

2. Building Community
 We’re more than a café. The Load & Lounge is a welcoming spot on wheels — a place to enjoy great food, connect, and simplify life. With our premium wash-and-fold service, customers can relax while we take care of the hard work.

3. Flavour with heart
Simple, quality ingredients crafted into barista coffee, matcha, and all-day breakfast. Paired with our laundry service, we deliver comfort and convenience in one stop.

Together, these values shape a mobile café laundrette that’s sustainable, community-driven, and built for connection wherever we go.


Launching 2026.

At Country Fried, we believe in more than just great food—we aim to create a memorable dining experience for our customers, wherever we go. From our hand-battered fish to our crunchy chips, every bite is made with passion, tradition, and a commitment to quality.

Join us on our journey as we continue to bring the joy of delicious fish and chips to the masses. Follow us to stay updated on our upcoming locations, special offers, and the latest news from Country Fried.

Let's keep the tradition alive—one delicious bite at a time!

Name: Mumbai Food Truck Society
Description:
MFTS is a non-profit organisation which was founded By Roysten Misquitta of Ex Bombay Food Truck Company (Bandra) early 2015 by bringing in 50 Food Truck Operators from various part of Mumbai City. 

Food Truck Owners and Enthusiast came together with a vision of changing the legal issue and fixing the loophole Mobile Food Vending via a single window system method. 
 
Since 2016 end many Food Truck operators shut down and have faced multiple on road issue and hurdles via authorities and various associations through cannibalisation and corruption. 

Till Date MFTS as a single unit from Mumbai city alone has successfully consulted over 2500+ comprising of individuals, entrepreneurs, Brands and small startups entities who have a vision to expand & Believe in our Growth planning strategy.

Our motto is to build brands through real time planning, market analysis and Onground retail operation reality .

Our Portfolio consist of OSR, Cloud Kitchens, Mobile Kiosk, Food Carts, Food Trucks & New product development in kitchen or any raw food space.

Name: BaobUP
Description:
BaobUP:
Wir sind acht motivierte Schülerinnen und Schüler der Alten Kanti Aarau, welche das Yes-Miniunternehmen BaobUP gegründet haben. Unsere Ziel ist es, das Superfood Baobab aus Afrika mit etwas bekanntem Schweizerischen zu kombinieren und zwar in Form eines exzellenten, sehr hochwertigen Sirups. Wir legen hohen Wert auf Sozialnachhaltigkeit. Name: Beastie Burgers
Description:
At Beastie Burgers, we’re passionate about food and committed to bringing a new level of flavour to the world of gourmet burgers. We’re a family-owned mobile food business that serves up delicious, made-to-order burgers across the South West. Using only the finest locally sourced ingredients, our mission is to deliver fresh, flavourful, and stress-free catering experiences for every event.

Beastie Burgers began with a simple idea: to transform the humble burger into an extraordinary culinary experience. What started as a spark of inspiration during a family barbecue quickly grew into a full-fledged business, fuelled by a desire to create something unique.

After carefully researching the market and identifying a gap for premium, flavourful burgers, founder Josh set out to bring his vision to life. The journey has involved a lot of experimentation, refining recipes, and a whole lot of taste-testing. Today, every Beastie Burger reflects that dedication to quality and creativity.

Every burger we make is crafted with care, using only top-quality, locally sourced ingredients. From premium meats and fresh produce to homemade sauces and gourmet toppings, each component is carefully selected to create a memorable taste experience. Our menu also includes vegetarian and vegan options, so there’s something for everyone.

Inspired by flavours from around the world, our burgers offer something truly unique. You’ll find toppings like spicy jalapenos, smoky chipotle aioli, and even truffle oil drizzle to add depth and excitement to every bite. Whether you’re craving a classic cheeseburger or an Asian-inspired vegan burger, our menu has something to satisfy every taste.

We believe in doing our part to protect the environment. At Beastie Burgers, we strive to minimize waste and prioritize eco-friendly practices in every aspect of our operations. From the sourcing of our ingredients to the disposal of materials, we’re constantly looking for ways to reduce our environmental impact.

Vi har en vision om at gøre plantebaseret mad mere attraktivt gennem efterspørgselsfremmende tilbud. Vi tror på, at vejen til at spise mere plantebaseret kommer gennem information om tilberedning, smagsoplevelser og tillidsfulde relationer.

Vi bespiser gæster og deler vores viden om madlavning med plantebaserede ingredienser i forskellige kontekster. Dette inkluderer udkørsel til private og erhvervsarrangementer med food truck, private dining, intime middagsbuffeter i samarbejde med Grønhøj Kro og meget mere.

Vi er særligt dygtige til at lave plantebaseret smørrebrød og gryderetter, samt forårsruller og pakoras når det skal være lidt fedtet til festivaler.

Vores kunder værdsætter vores fokus på kvalitet og vores evne til at tilpasse os deres specifikke behov og ønsker, hvad enten det drejer sig om allergener eller præferencer.

Description:
Playa Baby is Orange County's premier mobile culinary experience, serving "the best fish AND shrimp tacos in Orange County" with a side of vibrant culture and exceptional hospitality. Born from the sands of the playa and the creative spirit of Burning Man, we blend rich traditions from Ensenada to the American South, creating a flavorful fiesta that celebrates our shared histories.

Founded by Red Feather, with deep roots in indigenous Mexican culinary traditions, and Chef Amanda Rios, a Chef Works Brand Ambassador with Southern culinary expertise, Playa Baby delivers more than just incredible food—we create memorable experiences that make everyone feel like familia.

Our 20ft mini school bus food truck and 10x10 pop-up tent bring the coastal magic of Baja to events across SoCal, offering customizable catering and vending packages perfect for corporate events, weddings, festivals, and private celebrations.

Our Offerings:
→Ensenada-style beer-battered fish and shrimp tacos
→Hand-crafted tamales (Pollo Verde, Puerco Rojo, Rajas)
→Southern-inspired fresh-pressed lemonades and limeades in signature 32oz buckets
→Custom culinary experiences for events of all sizes
→VIP food and beverage packages

From casual street service to full-scale event catering, Playa Baby delivers exceptional food, vibrant presentation, and authentic hospitality—elevating SoCal's street food culture to an art form.

Tap in with the tribe! Where every guest is VIP and every meal comes with amor.

Name: 970 Sno
Description:
970 Sno is a locally owned mobile Sno Ball stand serving up authentic New Orleans-style Sno Balls across Northern Colorado. We’re not just a small business—we’re full-time professionals, parents, and passionate Sno Ball connoisseurs who believe in creating simple, sweet moments that bring people together.

Our journey started with a craving for real NOLA Sno Balls—the kind made with finely shaved ice and bold, vibrant flavors that transport you straight to the South. So we brought that experience to Windsor and beyond, rolling out the fluffiest ice, premium syrups, and tons of personality from our custom-built trailer.

Whether we’re posted up at a local park, cooling down a neighborhood block party, or popping up at a summer festival, 970 Sno is all about community. We love being part of the moments that make summer feel like summer—big smiles, sticky fingers, and the kind of joy that only a great Sno Ball can bring.

Follow us to see where we’ll be next—or reach out to book us for your event!

Name: the american food truck
Description:
The American food truck, c'est une véritable cabane de cow-boy qui ajoutera une touche originale à votre évènement !  Avec sa terrasse et ses drapeaux flottant à cinq mètres de haut, The American food truck est unique, vous vous évaderez sans aucun doute en plein Far West ! 

Au menu, le food truck vous propose de déguster de délicieux et copieux burgers 100% BOEUF QUALITY BELGE ET BIO tels que le "USA" avec sa sauce maison, le "Cow-boy" et la sauce barbecue de l Oncle Sam, le "végé-ricain" sans viande (BIO!) pour les végétariens et bien d'autres encore… Bien sûr, le food truck n'oublie pas les plus petits et propose le "Billy The Kid" pour que les enfants puissent eux aussi se régaler. 

Chili con carne Texan fait maison et Hot dog USA aussi possible!

Entrée, dessert et boissons disponibles également!

Notre pain artisanal est frais du jour.

Grâce à leur formule à volonté, tous les invités pourront se faire plaisir et bien sûr, toutes les préparations sont faites maison ! 

Service rapide assuré!

The American food truck c'est aussi 6 ans d'expérience à temps plein et de nombreuses références! (Décathlon, Ikéa, Lidl, Total Energie, …)

Alliez originalité et saveurs grâce à The American food truck !

Name: The Graze Company Okanagan
Description:
Come Together, Break Bread, Feast

We believe food is more than sustenance; it is a common bond that brings people together and provides a backdrop for some of the most connected times in our lives.

What started off as just a hobby and creative outlet, quickly turned into an unexpected craze! Friends turned business partners, we are the founders, creators and driving force behind The Graze Company. Combining our creativity, attention to detail, and love of social events, The Graze Company Inc. was born.

The farthest thing from your average charcuterie board, our Graze Boards, Boxes and Table options are lavish and opulent and are the highlight of any event, including cocktail parties, weddings, kids parties, birthdays, corporate functions, baby showers, engagement parties, you name it; we’ll make your party an Instagram-worthy showcase! When opulence is in order and only the best will do, The Graze Company can elevate your event to the next level.

Our Graze options are perfect for corporate functions, weddings, brand launches, life events, gifts, and more! 

Plan Your next event with us today!

Name: De Verrukkelijke IJsman
Description: Dit dynamische ijsverkoopbedrijf is opgericht door Yeti McSweaty. Hij kwam op het idee ijs te verkopen, maar in zijn eigen buurt wonen weinig mensen en is het vrijwel nooit warm genoeg om zin te krijgen in een lekker ijsje. Daarom heeft hij zijn bedrijf in het tropische Nederland gevestigd. Het grootste deel van het jaar brengt hij door in de Himalaya, maar af en toe bezoekt hij ons land. Je kunt hem dan tegenkomen in en rond Arnhem.

Name: BRUTTI Foodtruck
Description:
Parce que tout le monde mérite un 'Carpe Diem'... Chez BRUTTI, la passion de la cuisine italienne authentique se mêle à l'art du partage au sein de son ‘Food Truck’. Découvrez un voyage culinaire unique, au cœur de vos événements privés ou d’entreprise en Belgique ou au Luxembourg au travers de nos deux concepts : 
1/ Concept de street food : les “crapuloso par BRUTTI"
Notre interprétation humble mais savoureuse de la street food, offrant un pain unique de notre artisan boulange, l'Arche de Pain, garni de porchetta  traditionnelle, de roquette et de mayonnaise à la truffe…ou, pour une touche végétarienne, de mozzarella fumée…
2/ Concept de walking diner : les “chichetti de BRUTTI”
Un Walking Diner subtil et authentique, proposant des bouchées italiennes traditionnelles et des créations végétariennes innovantes, toutes conçues pour transformer vos rencontres en moments gastronomiques inoubliables.

L'essence de notre passion : tenter de TRANSFORMER L’ÉPHÉMÈRE EN MÉMORABLE, événement après événement.

Name: Dang Brother Pizza Company
Description:
Dang Brother Pizza Co. is the exciting next chapter of a beloved brand, reimagined by the people who helped build it. As former members of the original company, we’ve taken our passion, experience, and deep love for wood-fired pizza to create something even better—a revamped, reenergized, and more versatile catering experience.

At Dang Brother Pizza Co., we specialize in authentic, wood-fired pizza served fresh from our iconic Vintage Fire Truck—a mobile pizzeria like no other. But we don’t stop there. We’ve expanded our setup options with versatile mobile ovens, allowing us to bring our signature pizza to any event, anywhere—whether it’s a backyard gathering, a wedding in the mountains, or a large-scale festival.

With years of experience in event catering, our team is committed to delivering not just great pizza, but unforgettable experiences. From intimate celebrations to high-energy corporate events, we work closely with our clients to ensure seamless execution, exceptional service, and, of course, delicious, Neapolitan-style pizza baked at 800 degrees.

At Dang Brother Pizza Co., we believe in good food, great company, and creating moments worth remembering. Whether you’re planning a wedding, a private party, corporate event, or a golf tournament, let us bring the fire—and the flavor!

Name: Fro Yo By The Sea
Description:
About the mother/daughter duo behind your favorite frozen dessert and Acai Bowl food truck in San Diego, Fro Yo By The Sea! 

A shared love of frozen desserts evolved into a way to create healthier options of favorites, spend time together, earn some money having fun in their free time, and most importantly, create a platform to serve their local beach community! 

The owner of Fro Yo By The Sea, is MOST proud of being a local (both raised in San Diego), woman-owned/operated business, and that my partner is my teenage daughter. “Our concept and menu is unique to our community and we do a lot to support our local organizations by sponsoring sports teams, helping our local schools raise funds, and feeding our local homeless and underserved community through various non-profits.”

As two Encinitas natives it is extremely important to them to give back. Fro Yo By The Sea actively contributes to their local community through sports team sponsorships, donating treats to Fill A Belly and local foster organizations, and helping local schools with their fundraising efforts. 

Fro Yo By The Sea is known for serving frozen desserts, using only the best premium ingredients and locally sourced products. They serve fresh, acai bowls using San Diego-based The Roots acai and their frozen yogurt is a brand from Temecula. For their guests with dietary restrictions, they always have non-dairy and gluten-free selections available. They feature specials including Root Beer Floats, Homemade Cookie Ice Cream Sandwiches and Dole Whip and vegan ice cream.

Their specialty is serving special events: corporate parties, weddings, birthday parties, school and sports fundraisers, large scale sporting events. But in their free time, they LOVE to serve it up curbside at the beach!

“Thanks a million to our customers for continuously supporting our adventure and showering us with love!”

Name: CHT Flavours
Description:
Indigenous cuisine in the CHT makes use of locally available spices and herbs. Some common spices include ginger, garlic, turmeric, and various types of chilies. 
Here are some aspects of indigenous food from the Chittagong Hill Tracts:
Indigenous cuisine in the CHT makes use of locally available spices and herbs. Some common spices include ginger, garlic, turmeric, and various types of chilies.
Indigenous people in this region have their own unique culinary traditions that reflect their culture, lifestyle, and the resources available in the hilly terrain. 

The Chittagong Hill Tracts (CHT) is a region located in southeastern Bangladesh, known for its diverse indigenous communities and rich cultural heritage.

Name: La Crêperie mobile
Description:
La crêpe est un mets composé d'une couche plus ou moins fine de pâte, faite à base de farine (principalement de blé ou de sarrasin) et d'œufs agglomérés à un liquide (lait, parfois mélangé à de l'eau ou de la bière). Elle est généralement de forme ronde.

La crêpe est cuite sur les deux faces dans une crêpière (ou une poêle ordinaire), ou sur une plaque chauffante, appelée bilig en Basse-Bretagne, galettoire ou galetière en Haute-Bretagne.

La crêpe se mange chaude ou froide, sucrée ou salée (ou nature), comme plat principal ou comme dessert, mais peut aussi constituer un en-cas. Elle est servie telle quelle, agrémentée d'une garniture ou encore fourrée. On la déguste chez soi ou au restaurant, et on en trouve à emporter sur les marchés, lors d'événements festifs, comme dans les fêtes foraines. Selon les habitudes et la garniture, elle peut être d'épaisseur variable.

Dirbame su renginiais, kuriuose svarbu trys dalykai:
patikimumas, efektyvumas ir įspūdinga maisto patirtis.

Per du sezonus organizavome maitinimą įvairiose vietose: terasose ant stogo, kiemuose, gamyklose, ofisuose ir įvairiose lauko erdvėse. Mūsų tikslas visada tas pats:
visi pavalgę, visi patenkinti, organizatoriams – nulis rūpesčių kalbant apie maistą.

Ką gaunate pasirinkę Jokūbo BBQ?
 Unikalų BBQ meniu pritaikytą įmonės renginiams
 Šonkauliai, dešrainiai, burgeriai ar kiti įvairūs patiekalai ruošti profesionalioje rūkykloje
 Pilnai mobili stotis – Viską gaminame vietoje matant klientams
 Greitas aptarnavimas 
 Patikimas, profesionalus ir organizatoriams draugiškas procesas.

Maitiname iki 1000 žmonių.
Dirbame visoje Lietuvoje.

Jeigu planuojate vasaros šventę, team-building’ą ar renginį lauke, susisiekite — esame įsitikinę, kad rasime geriausią sprendimo būdą atsižvelgiant į Jūsų norus!

But we don't stop there. Our burgers are a force to be reckoned with, prepared with premium, hand-selected beef patties that are seared to succulent perfection. Each burger is an experience in itself, with an array of gourmet toppings and delectable sauces that elevate the classic burger to new heights.

The Grillzzly takes pride in sourcing only the freshest ingredients, ensuring that every dish is made with love and care. Our commitment to quality extends to our artisanal bread, crisp vegetables, and flavorful sauces that perfectly complement our grilled offerings.

Whether you're seeking a quick lunch on the go or looking to indulge in a satisfying dinner, The Grillzzly is your ultimate destination for scrumptious street food. Our friendly staff is always ready to serve you with a smile, providing a memorable dining experience that will keep you coming back for more.

So come and unleash your inner foodie at The Grillzzly, where chicken kebabs and burgers reign supreme. Prepare yourself for a culinary adventure that will leave you roaring with delight!

About Us:
At YELO, we’re not just changing the game in food delivery; we're redefining it for businesses and consumers alike in Pakistan. As an innovative food delivery platform, we blend the widespread appeal of a diverse marketplace with the unique opportunity for food businesses to grow their brand independently. Our mission is to make food delivery more accessible, affordable, and business-friendly.

What We Offer:
YELO stands out in the bustling food delivery landscape with its unique dual-model approach. For consumers, we offer a seamless interface to order food online from a wide array of local restaurants, ensuring a delightful and diverse dining experience right at their doorstep. From popular cuisines to hidden culinary gems, YELO is their go-to platform for exploring and enjoying delicious meals.
For food businesses, from established restaurants to budding home chefs, YELO is more than just a delivery service. We empower them with tools to build their brand, manage orders, and gain valuable customer insights. Our low-commission model ensures that businesses can offer the best value to customers while enhancing their profitability.

Our Edge:
YELO’s innovative approach addresses the core challenges of the food delivery industry. We provide a level playing field where businesses can reduce operational costs and customers can enjoy high-quality food at reasonable prices. Our platform is a catalyst for growth, fostering a community where businesses thrive, and customers relish the convenience and variety.

Description:
Welcome to The Bear Den - a family-owned and operated food truck housed in a converted airstream RV!  Our passion project is not just about serving delicious treats but also about teaching kids the ins and outs of running a business and instilling a strong work ethic.

About Us:
Run by a close-knit family, The Bear Den is more than just a food truck - it's a labor of love. We believe in giving back to the community by providing opportunities for kids to learn valuable skills while having fun.

Our Menus:

Winter Menu: Cozy up with our build-your-own Gourmet Hot Chocolate or indulge in our delectable Gourmet Donuts, perfect for those chilly days.
Spring-Fall Menu: As the weather warms up, enjoy our build-your-own Gourmet Popcorn, a delightful snack for outdoor adventures. Don't miss out on our mouthwatering Caramel Apples served with amazing sauces, a seasonal favorite for all ages.
Why Choose The Bear Den:

Family Values: We operate with family values at our core, ensuring every customer feels like part of our family.
Hands-on Experience: Our food truck serves as a platform for kids to gain real-world experience in entrepreneurship and work ethic.
Seasonal Delights: Whether it's warming up with hot chocolate in the winter or enjoying fresh popcorn in the spring, we've got something for every season.
Let's Connect:
Join us at The Bear Den for a unique food truck experience that's not just about the food but also about building memories and skills that last a lifetime. Follow us on social media to stay updated on our latest locations and seasonal offerings. Come be a part of our journey!

Derived from the Latin word "tutum" meaning "safe," Tutum is not just an app; it's your trusted companion on the journey to prioritize safety and well-being in the world of food and personal care products.

 Safety First:
Tutum's revolutionary core functionality lies in its ability to scan and identify harmful ingredients, empowering you to make informed decisions that align with your health preferences. With our extensive ingredient database, quick and safe choices are just a tap away.

 Supporting Local, Fostering Community:
We understand the importance of community and local support. Tutum goes the extra mile by featuring a unique local search option, highlighting licensed farmers, bakers, and household product manufacturers. Discover and support nearby producers, fostering a sense of community while prioritizing safety.

 Holistic Insight into Products:
Tutum goes beyond ingredient analysis, offering in-depth product analytics, condiment percentages, calorie calculations, and even store recommendations. Ensuring not only safe choices but also supporting a balanced diet.

 Personalized Nutrition Guidance:
For those seeking personalized nutrition, Tutum's feature allows you to create weekly menus based on your individual nutritional needs. Input your data, and receive tailored meal plans that guarantee you meet your nutrient and vitamin requirements.

 Empower Your Health Journey:
Tutum is more than an app; it's a lifestyle. Take control of your health, make informed choices, and support local businesses—all in one user-friendly platform. Safety, convenience, and well-being are just a tap away with Tutum. Join us on the journey to a healthier, safer, and more informed life!

Description:
Paisani was co-founded by two friends who graduated from the University of Massachusetts, Lowell. After studying four years in business and engineering, Matthew Minichiello of Canton and Ryan Palmer of Medford decided to dive into an entrepreneurial opportunity by starting a business to fill the void of an Italian food truck in the Boston area. The two friends have been creating innovative dishes together during their time spent at Lowell cooking for friends and family on occasions such as homecoming, the Super Bowl, and graduation. They have creatively positioned themselves in the Boston food truck market by combining their culinary skills with their outgoing personalities. 

Paisani’s food truck has been open since the Summer of 2022 and as the business continues to grow, the quality and quantity of the food remains the same. Growing up in Italian-American households, Matt and Ryan know just how important it is to have a top-of-the-line sandwich shop near by; making Paisani, the mobile food truck serving Boston’s best sandwiches, a must have in the city offering something for everybody in a variety of neighborhood locations. Unable to make it to the food truck? That’s okay, too. Paisani offers a top of the line catering experience whether that be traditional catering or booking the food truck for your next event. The owners work with each client on a need by need basis; from the booking to the serving details, we strive to create a seamless, trustworthy experience for our customers to facilitate the stressful nature of event planning. 

Paisani’s mission is to make each customer experience a memorable one. The Paisans work to display their commitment to good eats while serving and supporting the entire community in Boston. Not only is the food consistent and plentiful, the customer service is unrivaled as the two owners of the business are on site day in and day out putting their best foot forward; no matter who steps up to the window.

Name: Mini Kitchen - Vietnamese cuisine
Description:
Welcome to our take-away Vietnamese food service! 
A cozy food truck locates in Thorsager near Rønde, where you can call or order online and pick up your order.

By choosing Mini Kitchen, you are about to get to know the culture of Vietnamese cuisine. Having a rich mark on our history of dining culture, the nation’s culinary art with its influences reaches from China, Malaysia and even France. Vietnamese food combines the best of all! 

Vietnamese cuisine is all about balancing protein, carbohydrates and fiber. The most common spices—chilli, lime, ginger, garlic, shallot, and pepper—are essential sources of vitamins and minerals. Fresh greens and aromatics in various herbs ( basils, mints, corianders) are crucial components in Mini Kitchen’s dishes. Altogether, Vietnamese cuisine is invented to supply human nutritional demand.

In our menu, there are three main categories you can choose from: Bánh Mì, Poké Bowl and Bún. While Bánh Mì and Bún are traditional dishes, Poké Bowl is an integrated dish with a new interpreted touch.

Mini Kitchen honours healthy ingredients and focuses on food hygiene and quality. Our food is made with love and passion.

You are invited to walk on a culinary trip through Vietnam. It is our privilege to serve you at Mini Kitchen in Thorsager.

 • Customizable Menu: Tailor the flavors and options to suit the theme of your event, making it a personalized experience for your guests.
 • Eco-Friendly: We use sustainable packaging and practices, because we believe in treating our planet as kindly as we treat our customers.

Perfect for Any Occasion:

 • Farmers Markets: Enhance the market experience with our delightful and refreshing treats.
 • Night Markets: Add a sweet and cooling treat to the night market ambiance.
 • School Events: Make school fairs and sports events extra special with a fun ice cream break.
 • Parties and Celebrations: From birthdays to anniversaries, our ice cream is a hit with guests of all ages.

Let Ice Cream Lab be the cherry on top of your next event in Kelowna. Contact us today to book our services and make your occasion deliciously memorable!

Name: Natural Rise
Description:
Hello, Lucy and Ben here, we are Natural Rise.
We have converted our Vintage Rice Horsebox into a mobile coffee and pancake outlet. During 2020- 2021 we have planned and built our vision on the combined 25 years’ experience we share in the hotel and restaurant world. It has been a formative journey, and we have put our heart and soul into the project, as well as our hard-earned savings. Our focus is on quality, made to order, sustainably sourced products.

Sourcing is important to us, the produce we use to create our coffee and pancakes is carefully chosen: 

Our Coffee supplier works closely with remote Indigenous communities in the Peruvian Amazon, ensuring true traceability. Their mission is to support the communities directly, allowing them to grow incredible specialty coffee, in harmony with the forests they live in. Rainforest protection and defending against its destruction is a project we can all get behind. The beans are of course Fair Trade, Rainforest Alliance and also the first to be WWF approved. We have invested in top quality equipment and honed our skills to get the most out of these wonderful beans for our customers’ pleasure.

Our pancakes are made of ingredients from within 20miles of Marlow. There is a resurgence in small scale wheat, milk and egg production in the UK and we wish to support these producers. Organic and small batch products add great value to our food and we naturally ferment our batter to give it a delicious sourdough taste and texture, hence the name – Natural Rise.
We serve our freshly made-to-order pancakes in a convenient bitesize form, with a range of portion sizes. Our menu of homemade toppings is seasonal and varied.

We are passionate about sustainability and locality, aiming to use 100% traceable, organic, seasonal produce. We are plastic free and use 100% recyclable packaging.

The trailer itself is 4.25 x 2.5M or (6 x 3M in large format).

We require a 32amp electric supply or a Type 2 EV Charge point to operate.

Name: Bangkok Bro
Description:
Bruh. Lemme hit you with some real talk.

Back in my grindset days, I was clocking 16-hour shifts in tech—late nights, code sprints, all of it. But when those in-between hours hit and I needed a quick Thai fix? Nada. Everything was either closed, full-on sit-down, or just... not it.

See, I grew up in Bangkok. Thai street food is a way of life. And while I love Pad Thai as much as the next guy, let’s be real: that’s tourist fuel. I wanted the real Bangkok flavor. So, I started recreating the stuff I grew up on. Next thing I knew, people were vibing with it—hard.

Then the layoffs hit. Immigration chaos followed. So I did what any efficiency-maxing former tech guy would do: I pivoted. Boom! Harder than a startup running out of Series A.

Now? I’m out here cooking real Bangkok street food from a truck with my face on it. Yeah. My actual face. Why? Because I believe in extreme accountability—and also because it looks kinda dope on the logo.

In Asia, businesses are built to last. It’s not about squeezing every dollar—it’s about legacy. Happy customers. Happy crew. Real community. That’s the blueprint.

So yeah. I made the leap. From tech… to truck.

Name: Bongo Bunee Chow
Description:
Bongo Bunee Chow is a street food concept hailing from it's humble roots in Durban, South Africa. Our co-founder Craig was raised in Durban and often ate a "Bunny Chow", which would traditionally consist of a loaf of bread, cut in half with the inside scooped out and filled with a curry. The extracted soft centre of the bread would be used to dip into the curry sauce and the outside crust would be broken away, piece by piece and consumed together with the curry. The whole thing would be eaten with zero waste!!! The Bongo Bunee Chow brand was borne out of Raj's love for a homecooked, authentic Indian curry and passion to create new and innovative dishes, combined with Craig’s love and nostalgia for his hometown food.

So this is our take on this traditional South African staple and we envision Bongo Bunee Chow firmly establishing itself at events and festivals across the UK and beyond.

Our Promise: A Bongo Bunee Chow will always be cooked from scratch and you can rest assured that Taste, Quality and a Positive Customer Experience are our top priorities.

Name: Food craft
Description:
**Food Craft: The Art of Culinary Creation**

Food Craft is not just a method of cooking—it's a philosophy, a celebration of the artistry that goes into transforming raw ingredients into delightful culinary experiences. At its core, Food Craft embodies the fusion of passion, creativity, and technique, where every dish is an expression of skillful craftsmanship and attention to detail. This approach honors tradition while embracing innovation, producing food that not only satisfies hunger but also engages the senses, tells a story, and connects people with cultures and memories.

### The Essence of Food Craft

The heart of Food Craft lies in the careful selection and preparation of ingredients. From farm to table, every step is deliberate, ensuring that quality is maintained, and that the natural flavors of the ingredients are preserved or enhanced. The focus is on using fresh, locally sourced, and often seasonal ingredients, honoring their unique qualities. This farm-to-table ethos is not only environmentally responsible but also supports local farmers and producers, ensuring the freshest and most flavorful food possible.

Crafting food requires an intimate understanding of ingredients—their textures, flavors, and how they react to different cooking methods. Food crafters take the time to experiment and perfect techniques, whether it's the slow fermentation of dough to create the perfect loaf of bread, the meticulous aging of cheese, or the precise balancing of spices in a curry. This dedication results in dishes that are rich in depth, flavor, and complexity.

### A Symphony of Technique and Tradition

Food Craft draws heavily from time-honored traditions passed down through generations, yet it also leaves room for modern interpretations and innovative techniques. Whether it's the centuries-old tradition of smoking meats, pickling vegetables, or curing fish, or the more contemporary practices of molecul

Madhav Foods is a Bharat-first food infrastructure company building India’s most reliable meal distribution system.

What We Build :-

Centralized Vedic Kitchens → Hygienic, automated, Ayurveda-guided preparation.

Ob Firmenveranstaltung, Hochzeit oder private Feier - wir stehen euch zur Seite, um eure Veranstaltung mit unserem erstklassigen Catering-Service unvergesslich zu machen. 

Folgt uns gerne, um immer auf dem Laufenden zu bleiben und keine Neuigkeiten zu verpassen. Habt ihr Fragen oder Anregungen? Lasst es uns wissen - wir sind nur eine Nachricht entfernt!

Gemeinsam machen wir die Welt zu einem besseren Ort, angefangen bei unserem Teller. Lasst uns zusammen für Catering auf höchstem Niveau, nachhaltige Praktiken und Kundenzufriedenheit stehen.

Our drinks are made fresh to order, ensuring that each cup is bursting with flavor and the perfect balance of sweetness and creaminess.

In addition to serving our drinks at public events and markets, we also support parties and corporate events. Whether it's a birthday party, wedding, or company gathering, we're here to provide refreshing and unique drinks that will impress your guests. Our team is dedicated to making your event a success and will work with you to customize our drinks to fit your theme or branding.

At Boba by the Bay, we are proud to be a veteran-owned business. Our team understands the importance of hard work, dedication, and a commitment to excellence, and we strive to reflect these values in everything we do. We are passionate about our drinks and take pride in serving our local community.

Curated providers: vetted kitchens with clear macros and ingredients.

Compare meal plans by calories, cuisine, diet (keto, vegetarian, high-protein, etc.).

Introducing the Greatest of All Trucks (GOAT) food truck, where culinary excellence meets on-the-go convenience! We are a mobile food sensation that has taken the streets by storm, dedicated to serving you the most mouthwatering and unforgettable culinary experiences on wheels.

At GOAT, we believe in pushing the boundaries of traditional food truck fare, constantly reinventing and elevating street food to new heights. Our passionate team of talented chefs and food enthusiasts work tirelessly to create innovative, gourmet dishes that will tantalize your taste buds and leave you craving for more.

Whether you're a devoted foodie or simply looking for a delicious meal on the move, GOAT has got you covered. Our menu showcases a fusion of flavors from around the world, with a focus on using only the freshest, locally sourced ingredients to ensure the highest quality in every bite.

From sizzling gourmet burgers to delectable tacos with unique flavor profiles, from indulgent desserts to refreshing beverages, GOAT offers a diverse range of culinary delights that cater to every palate. Our commitment to culinary excellence is unwavering, and we strive to deliver an unparalleled dining experience that will leave a lasting impression.

Join us on our culinary adventure as we roam the streets, attending local events, festivals, and gatherings, bringing the magic of GOAT directly to you. Be prepared to embark on a flavor-filled journey like no other, as the Greatest of All Trucks redefines what it means to dine on the move. Get ready to experience the extraordinary, because at GOAT, we're more than just a food truck – we're a culinary revolution on wheels.

Name: ZAP Burger
Description:
Olá! Apresento a vocês o Zap Burger, um food truck de ultra smash burger que tem como referência as histórias em quadrinhos da Zap Comics e o início do movimento underground.

O Zap Burger traz essa mesma ousadia e irreverência do quadrinho para o mundo dos hambúrgueres. Com ingredientes cuidadosamente selecionados e uma técnica de preparo inovadora, o Zap Burger oferece um sabor único e autêntico.

Assim como as histórias em quadrinhos da Zap Comics, o Zap Burger também desafia o status quo. Nós não seguimos as regras tradicionais do mundo dos hambúrgueres e oferecemos uma experiência única e memorável. E assim como o movimento underground, o Zap Burger traz um pouco de rebeldia e irreverência para o mundo da culinária.

Se você é fã de hambúrgueres e está procurando algo diferente e emocionante, não deixe de ter o Zap Burguer no seu evento. Com certeza você terá uma experiência inesquecível!

Description:
Bucko is a mobile app designed to help users discover nearby restaurants, bars, and fast food places through a smart, interactive food map. Built for locals, students, tourists, and foodies, Bucko combines real-time location filtering with exclusive dining offers to help users save money while exploring new spots.

Premium users can unlock special restaurant deals (like “Pizza 1+1”) and activate them directly through the app, creating a win–win for both diners and businesses. Our mission is simple: save users time and money while driving more customers to local restaurants.

Bucko currently operates in Serbia (Belgrade) with plans to expand across the Balkans.

Name: Popaella | Paella para eventos
Description:
En Popaella estamos especializados en una sola cosa:
hacer paellas para grandes eventos… y hacerlas muy bien.

Cocinamos paellas y arroces en directo para cenas y comidas de empresa, fiestas populares, bodas, aniversarios y jornadas corporativas en Barcelona y en toda Catalunya. Nuestro punto fuerte son los grupos grandes, desde unas 80 personas hasta eventos de más de 1.000 comensales.

Trabajamos con recetas tradicionales y opciones adaptadas (carne, mar y montaña, verduras, vegetariana…), y podemos complementar la paella con pica-pica, postre y bebida durante la comida para ofrecer una experiencia completa sin complicarte la logística.

No somos una agencia de eventos:
somos el equipo de paellas dentro de tu evento.

Colaboramos de forma natural con organizadores de eventos, wedding planners y departamentos de RRHH / People / Office Management, integrándonos con su montaje (mobiliario, música, barra, etc.) para que el día del evento todo fluya y la paella sea un momento memorable.

Si necesitas paella para un gran evento, ya sea un comida de Navidad, un afterwork de viernes, un final de temporada o una celebración con clientes clave en tu oficina, en Popaella nos encargamos de que el arroz sea uno de los puntos fuertes del día.

Description:
Passionate about bringing world-class, Texas-inspired BBQ to Spartanburg, SC.  Currently looking for the right investor, to add value to the company as a restauranteur.  I currently offer bulk-items for events, tailgating, etc.  

Also have recently partnered with Main Street Pub, to start a "Brisket Sunday" event, where they sell my brisket on the first Sunday of each month.  The reaction has been overwhelming, and they have been sold out within a matter of 2-4 hours each time.

Looking to secure a larger smoker to increase output, as well as a food trailer to make my business fully mobile.

We trade Monday, Thursday & Friday daytimes kerbside and we pop up at various locations in Northamptonshire on Friday evenings and weekends. We are also available for private hire - corporate, weddings, parties etc. Get in touch for more information.

Name: Pitlane Café Co.
Description:
Pitlane Café Co. is the product of late nights in the shop, early mornings at the track, and a lifelong obsession with cars, motorcycles, community, and creativity.

My name’s Tomas — I’ve been drifting for years, working on my own builds, spotting for pro drivers at FD, and living this motorsport lifestyle every chance I get. But no matter where I went, drift days, track events, car meets, there was always something missing: good food that felt part of the scene.

So I created Pitlane Café Co. to change that. What started as an idea in my head is now a full mobile pop-up experience, built from scratch and inspired by the energy of the hot pits. We serve track style foods, foil-wrapped burritos that hit like tire warmers, cold brew straight from a fuel handle. It is real food that doesn’t feel like an afterthought.

This isn’t just about what’s on the menu. It’s about building something for the community I grew up in, the early risers, the late night tuners, the track crews, and every enthusiast in between. If you’ve ever stayed up working on a car just to make it to the next event, you’re already one of us.

Pitlane Café Co. is for the culture and we’re just getting started.

Description:
Tartine & Moi, c’est une cuisine créative et esthétique que je partage à travers des vidéos, des pop-up et des caterings sur-mesure.
Au cœur du concept : la tartine, réinventée comme un véritable support gastronomique — un terrain d’expression où la simplicité devient sublime grâce à des produits frais, des associations généreuses et un dressage soigné.

Name: Chela & Lalo
Description:
Chela & Lalo is a mobile northern Mexican street food business serving at private events and at changing locations around London markets. Born from the deep passion and pride of the founder for northern Mexican culinary culture, our mission is to share with Londoners a more regional and authentic version of Mexican food than the usual Tex-Mex.

The company is named after my parents. Chela, my mum, the best cook I have ever met, who has spent most of her life cooking for large businesses and family events with unrivalled passion. And Lalo, my dad, who can’t cook an egg but does produce tons and tons of the most delicious chillies widely consumed across Mexico and the US.

Founded in September 2024, we have traded at Shoreditch Exchange Market, soon to be in Hoxton, and are available for private hire in London and the surrounding areas.

Check out our website chelaandlalo.co.uk and our Instagram chelaandlalo for details on our menu.

Name: Java Mochi Coffee

At Simply Boiled, we strive to provide an elevated customer service experience at every event. From start to finish, our team is dedicated to making sure that your event is not only delicious, but also stress-free and memorable.

Our mission is to minimize your prep time and maximize your enjoyment. We believe a BBQ is more than just a meal, it's a cherished opportunity to connect with friends and family. With our kits, you can forget the hassle and dive straight into the fun of grilling and bonding.

Join us in creating memorable moments around the grill, the kitchen, the backyard, or wherever you choose to cook—because at Sear and Smoke, we’re not just delivering food, we’re delivering the full BBQ experience, anytime, anywhere.

Name: Linn Enterprises LLC
Description:
At Linn Enterprise, we take pride in delivering a consistent and high-quality menu that has stood the test of time. Over the last 30 years, our menu has seen minimal changes, and that's because we believe in the never-ending appeal of our classic staple items. Year after year, we continue to deliver the same quality products that have become a signature of our family-owned business. From classic Gyros/Chicken Gyros to refreshing Lemonade, crispy Fries, and Frozen Yogurt, our menu stands as a testament to our dedication to providing a consistent and satisfying experience.

We recognize the need for prompt and fresh service because we understand that people don't have time to wait, especially during a quick lunch break or when eager to get back to the exciting activities of a fair. Our commitment is to deliver a fast and efficient food experience, ensuring that every meal is not only delicious but also served with speed, allowing you to savor your meal without missing a beat. Whether you're eager to dive back into the festivities of a fair or on a tight lunch schedule, we've got you covered with quick, quality service that keeps you fueled for the moments that matter.

Our success isn't just about our menu or our quick service – it's about the incredible team of friendly and awesome employees who make the entire operation happen. From the friendly faces taking your orders to the ones putting together your food with care, our employees embody the spirit of our family-owned business. We believe that great service is just as important as great food, and our team consistently delivers both.

While the fair and corporate landscape may evolve in the future, our commitment to delivering a quality product remains the same. Join us at Linn Enterprise and experience the reliability and excellence that come with a menu that has minimally changed since the beginning.

Name: Ambarsari Kitchen
Description:
Ambarsari Kitchen is a Manchester-based food business specialising in fresh, feel-good vegetarian meals — mostly plant-based, always plastic-free, and delivered to your door by pre-order.

We create clean, conscious curries made from real ingredients you can trust. Every meal is prepared fresh on the day of delivery, without preservatives, additives, or anything artificial — just honest, flavourful food that supports your health and respects the planet.

Our food is more than just tasty — it’s nourishing. Every dish typically includes at least 2 of your 5-a-day and is designed to help busy people eat better without compromising on convenience, culture, or quality.

Customers order in advance through our WhatsApp group, where we release new menus and updates weekly. We operate on a limited drop model to maintain freshness, reduce food waste, and keep our service personal and community-led.

At the heart of Ambarsari Kitchen is a commitment to better food systems — rooted in heritage, mindful of the environment, and powered by people. Our packaging is 100% biodegradable, and our service is proudly plastic-free.

We’ve recently rebranded from TasteOfPunjabMCR to better reflect our growth, identity, and the story behind what we do. “Ambarsari” is a nod to Amritsar — the cultural and culinary heartbeat of Punjab — and we carry that spirit in every meal we serve.

Whether you’re looking for a healthier lunch alternative, wholesome family meals, or a way to support local, values-driven food — Ambarsari Kitchen is here to feed you well

Name: Gloopies
Description:
Aloha! It's me, Gloopie. Lemme tell you a bit about my crazy journey from the valleys of Kauai to, well, somewhere I've never been before - Florida.

Back in Kauai, amidst them green valleys and misty mountains, everyone knew me. I was that big fella with tattoos all over, each telling a tale of our ancient Hawaiian legends. I always dreamt of sharing a piece of my home with everyone through shave ice. I mean, who doesn't love 'em? But, man, the regulations on the islands were no joke. My dream of launching a shave ice truck there? Seemed like it was going down the drain.

But hey, as we say in Hawaii, "Moemoeā wale nō, aʻohe moemoeā paʻa." (I think it means, dream big or something like that.) So, I looked further, all the way to Florida. Heard it was business-friendly and all. Plus, they got some cool beaches, right?

Here's where things got wild. I got in touch with this Japanese flavor lab, and boom! We came up with some mad flavors. Ever tasted tropical pineapple mixed with... wasabi? Or what about coconut with a dash of matcha? Sounds nuts, but trust me, it's the bomb.

Now, my sis Uliani, she's the real deal. Riding waves like it's nobody's business. She joined me in this wild ride, and together, we thought, why not get the locals involved? So, we asked folks from places like Rosemary Beach, Seaside, and some other spots to pitch in just a buck. Yep, $1! And in return, they'd get our legendary shave ice for the same price, always.

Oh, and here's a lil' secret between you and me. You see all these fierce tattoos on me, right? Sea creatures and all. But, man, I'm scared of sharks. Like, really scared. And the big joke? I can't even swim! But hey, with Uliani by my side, what's there to fear?

Never been to Florida, but I can't wait to make it my new home. With its sunny vibes and our icy delights, I reckon we're gonna fit right in. So, here's to new beginnings and bringing a slice of Hawaii to Florida. Mahalo!

Name: DOUN'S
Description: Se nourrir est un besoin primaire et vital. Tout le monde doit passer par la case cuisine un jour ou l’autre. Certains redoutent ce moment parce que cuisiner signifie effort. En effet, il faut faire les courses, réfléchir au plat, prendre le risque de rater puis faire la vaisselle, tout cela semble épuisant. J’espère que ce site changera votre état d’esprit sur la question puisque comme tout passionné, j’ai voulu partager avec vous ce qui m’anime et me rend heureux. Je vous garantis qu’en suivant mes conseils, vous pourrez ressentir ce sentiment de satisfaction que l’on éprouve après avoir réalisé un plat soi-même et qu’on le partage avec les gens qu’on aime. Selon moi, pour atteindre cet objectif, il vous faut suivre trois critères que j’estime primordiaux. Le premier est la qualité parce qu’une bonne préparation commence par avoir de bons produits, ce facteur n’est pas négligeable. Quoi de mieux que d'aller au marché, sentir et toucher les fruits et légumes, tisser des liens avec les commerçants et choisir ses produits méticuleusement. Deuxièmement, la mise en place est cruciale pour un plat réussi. Avoir un plan de travail propre, avec tous les ingrédients religieusement rassemblés, vous aidera à avoir la tête claire pour la préparation. Troisièmement, la présentation visuelle est sans doute l’un des points les plus importants de chaque création. Michel Troisgros, chef du restaurant triplement étoilé le Troisgros, dit la chose suivante : « le palais est le deuxième sens qui vient confirmer la satisfaction de l’œil ». Je suis cette logique quotidiennement en portant une attention toute particulière au dressage et surtout à l'art de la table. Un plat peu totalement être différent selon la façon avec laquelle on le présente, n’êtes-vous pas d’accord ? Il faut comprendre que la cuisine requiert la mobilisation de tous les sens pour que l’expérience soit d’autant plus exceptionnelle. DOUN'S c'est donc ça, l'art d'être bon vivant.

Fermentation, Kultur, Permakultur

Das sind die Wurzeln unserer Wortschöpfung Fermakultur. Wir leben für eine Kultur des Zusammenkommens - Gemeinschaftlich arbeiten wir für Lebensqualität, für Sinn und Erfüllung.

Mit Fermakultur erinnern wir an die Tradition des Fermentierens zur Haltbarmachung von Lebensmitteln. Dieses Kulturgut gewinnt heute wieder an Bedeutung, wenn es darum geht, uns gesundheitsförderlich zu ernähren und mit dem Wert von Lebensmitteln auseinanderzusetzen.

Fermakultur steht für einen nachhaltigen Lebensstil und die Förderung einer regionalen und ökologischen Lebensmittelproduktion. Wir bieten Fermentationsworkshops und entwickeln fermentierte Produkte wie Sauerkraut, Kimchi und Tempeh.

Wir gestalten mit euch jegliche Art von Events. Ob im Rahmen einer Firmenfeier oder als Teamevent - wir haben viele Werkzeuge in unserem Koffer und freuen uns, bei Interesse eine maßgeschneiderte Lösung anzubieten.

Description:
La Pinsa Romana, originaire de la Rome antique tire son nom du latin « Pinsere » qui signifie étirer. Contrairement à la pizza traditionnelle, la Pinsa Romana est de forme ovale, elle présente une texture légère et aérée et un extérieur croustillant, faisant de chaque bouchée une révélation de saveurs.

Notre Pinsa est fabriquée de façon artisanale à partir d’un mélange spécial de farines de blé, de soja et de riz, créant ainsi une croûte à la fois légère et digeste.
Grâce à sa longue fermentation à froid et en mettant l’accent sur la nutrition et la saveur, notre Pinsa Romana est une alternative plus saine à la pizza traditionnelle, offrant un plaisir sans culpabilité.

Vous êtes dans une rue du centre historique de la magnifique ville de Guadalajara, 
une odeur de viande cuite, d'oignons caramélisés et de tortilla de maïs vient chatouiller vos sens, 
Vous penser entendre un musique de mariachi au loin qui se précise au fur et a mesure que vous vous approchez.
Arrivé a l'angle un stand de tacos apparait avec ses couleurs vives, ses lumières chaudes, ses vapeurs aux odeurs gourmandes et cette ambiance chaleureuse et familiale qui fait du Mexique un pays a part du reste du monde…

Sachez que ce même stand de tacos est maintenant en France dans la ville du Puy-en-Velay en Haute-Loire.

Venez découvrir avec nous l'ambiance détendue et l'hospitalité d'un stand de tacos mexicain. Nullement besoin de prendre l'avion rassurez vous... 
Vous pouvez même passer commande a l'avance et passer récupérer vos succulents petits plats chaud d'un coup de volant en sortant du travail.

Vous ferez des heureux… Croyez moi !

Description:
Shave Ice is a traditional dessert found in Hawaii, and it consists of four main steps: 

First, a scoop of vanilla ice cream is put at the bottom of the bowl.

Then, we use our machine which comes straight from Hawaii to shave a large block of ice into soft, thin flakes.

We then add up to three flavors of your choice, all of which are made with cane sugar and sourced from Hawaii.

Finally, you get a choice of a sweetened condensed milk topping or a sour spray.

With flavors and techniques coming straight from Hawaii, we are bringing the spirit of Aloha to Atlanta!

Name: alora GmbH
Description:
Beschreibung einer Lebensmittelliefer-App, die in Deutschland tätig ist und mit lokalen Restaurants begann, aber auf größere Gebiete abzielt. Die App nutzt die neuesten Technologien und bietet einen Preisvorteil (Kommission) sowie schnelle Unterstützung.

Unsere Lebensmittelliefer-App hat ihren Anfang mit lokalen Restaurants in Deutschland gemacht und zielt nun darauf ab, auf größere Gebiete auszuweiten. Wir setzen auf die neuesten Technologien, um unseren Nutzern ein schnelles, effizientes und unkompliziertes Erlebnis zu bieten.

Unsere Nutzer können aus einer Vielzahl von Restaurants und Gerichten wählen und ihre Bestellung direkt über die App aufgeben. Wir haben eine einzigartige Partnerschaft mit den Restaurants aufgebaut, um unseren Nutzern eine schnelle Lieferung zu fairen Preisen zu gewährleisten.

Ein weiterer Vorteil unserer App ist unser niedriger Provisionsanteil, der es Restaurants ermöglicht, ihre Gerichte zu günstigeren Preisen anzubieten, als bei anderen Lieferdiensten. Dies ermöglicht unseren Nutzern eine große Auswahl an Gerichten zu einem erschwinglichen Preis.

Zusätzlich bieten wir unseren Nutzern eine schnelle Unterstützung, wenn sie Fragen oder Probleme mit ihrer Bestellung haben. Unser Kundenservice-Team ist immer erreichbar und bereit, unseren Nutzern zu helfen.

Wir sind stolz darauf, unseren Nutzern eine einzigartige Lebensmittelliefererfahrung zu bieten und sind bestrebt, unser Angebot auf weitere Gebiete in Deutschland auszuweiten.

Name: Firefly S'mores
Description:
Firefly S’mores was born from the glow of campfires and the magic of family tradition. For over 45 years, our family has gathered every summer at Firefly Lake in northern Wisconsin — a place where laughter, late nights, and gooey marshmallows have always gone hand in hand.

When we dreamed up Firefly S’mores, we wanted to capture that same feeling — the warmth of the campfire, the sparkle of creativity, and the joy of sharing something simple but extraordinary. Our food truck brings those moments to life with gourmet, customizable s’mores — from the classics you know and love to imaginative twists featuring cookies, candy bars, ice cream, and other sweet surprises.

But Firefly S’mores isn’t just about dessert — it’s about the experience. The truck itself is part of the story: a retro-inspired beauty with an orange strobe light that flickers like the fireflies dancing around a summer bonfire. When the light’s on, you know the magic is happening — a sign that something special (and delicious) is being created inside.

At Firefly S’mores, we celebrate both nostalgia and innovation — connecting generations through a treat that never goes out of style, and reimagining it for new memories to come. Whether you’re at a community event, wedding, or festival, we invite you to stop by, build your dream s’more, and share in the glow.

Firefly S’mores — where nostalgia meets imagination.

Name: Gio's Pizza Lab
Description:
Welcome to Gio's Pizza Lab, where a passion for pizza meets culinary innovation. 

Our journey began in the early '90s when pizzerias started dotting our hometown. The aroma of fresh dough sparked a lifelong fascination with pizza.

In 2010, a transformative trip to Italy and Naples deepened our connection to pizza culture. Nestled in its birthplace, we received our first formal training. This experience kindled a passion that would change our culinary journey.

Our pursuit of the perfect pizza led us to explore the science of dough-making. We experimented with flour, water, yeast, and time. What we discovered was a beautiful paradox – perfection lay in the embrace of subtle variations.

A nod to our great-grandfather, who ran a bread bakery, adds nostalgia. Despite a detour into pharmaceuticals, the ancestral echo of flour and fire was undeniable.

Our journey led us to explore various ovens, but it was the wood-fired oven that stole our hearts. Today, it takes center stage in our pizza truck.

Pizza mirrors our diverse existence, where every slice tells a unique story. Gio's Pizza Lab invites you to embark on this culinary journey with us. Our pizzas are an ode to tradition, innovation, and shared experiences.

As we fire up our wood-fired oven, we invite you to savor the flavors, honor perfect imperfection, and immerse yourself in a culinary saga that is both timeless and tantalizing. Welcome to Gio's Pizza Lab, where every bite is an adventure, every slice is a story, and every moment is an opportunity to savor life's delicious moments.

Name: The Buenos BBQ
Description:
Olá, sou Carlos Bueno, possuo 20 anos de experiência no ramo da Gastronomia em variados tipos de cozinha tanto regional como internacional.  

Iniciei minha trajetória no mundo gourmet no Mezzaluna e no Green Street Café (ambos em Miami Beach, EUA). No Brasil, atuei no Tomie Otake (São Paulo), Sofitel (São Paulo), L´epicerie Bistrot (Curitiba), e Yaah Cozinha Oriental Criativa (Florianópolis). Aperfeçoei minha paixão em cozinhar explorando as cozinhas regionais da Europa por 2 anos, explorando na França, Itália, Espanha, Inglaterra, Dinamarca, Noruega, Grécia e Turquia.  Hoje me especializei em fazer churrasco para sua casa e sua empresa. 

Eu e minha equipe realizamos seu evento, prezando por excelência e muita qualidade tanto em matéria prima quanto a detalhes e capricho no serviço! 

Nessa página mostraremos para você nosso churrasco com buffet, uma verdadeira BBQ Experience em uma churrascaria móvel para você levar para onde quiser!

Fale conosco, será uma honra realizar seu evento!

Name: FOODIE LANE
Description:
At Foodie Lane, our vision is to revolutionize street food by providing the fastest and most efficient food preparation solutions. We aim to empower food street vendors with innovative, easy-to-use products and technology that drastically reduce cooking time without compromising on quality or taste. By streamlining the preparation process, we help vendors serve more customers quickly, enhance their business efficiency, and elevate the overall food street experience for everyone.

1. Food Lane is a convenient way to order your food ahead of time.

2. You can place your order before reaching the food street using your mobile phone.

3. This means you don't have to wait in long queues at the stalls.

4. The ordering process is quick, simple, and user-friendly.

5. It helps you save time, especially during busy hours.

6. Once you arrive, your food will be ready or almost ready.

7. You can enjoy your meal without the stress of waiting.

8. It also reduces crowding and makes the food street experience smoother.

9. Multiple food vendors are available to choose from on the app.

10. With Food Lane, your street food experience becomes faster and more enjoyable.

Name: Glory Hole Bagels LTD
Description:
This is NOT a dirty site… unless you have a bagel fetish!
Golden bagels with a thin crust and a pillowy interior. Generous fillings, homemade with great quality ingredients. That is Glory Hole Bagels!

Glory Hole bagels was created in London in March 2021 by a couple with a love for food and a bagel obsession. We are on a mission to elevate bagels to cult status across London’s street food markets. Move over burgers, the hole is taking over!

Our bagel recipe is the result of hundreds of tests and tweaks and it doesn’t belong to any cities in the world, it’s just ours! Our fillings are made with great ingredients and are all about twists on loved classics and amazing new flavour combinations.

We look forward to seeing you at one of our markets! Check out the Where to Find us page for full details.

Name: Raski Sukuti
Description:

For those who need faster meal deliveries for hunger and gatherings after midnight till dawn, we have got you covered. Raksi Sukuti is here to rescue your famished soul 24/7. P.S. We have a wide range of locally sourced Sukuti enriched with spices to tickle your taste buds with meaty goodness.

Name: Savour: Your Recipes
Description:
Savour is your all-in-one recipe companion, where cooking meets community. 

Whether you’re saving family favorites, sharing your own creations, or discovering fresh inspiration from other home cooks, Savour makes it easy to enjoy food together.

What you can do with Savour:
• Save recipes: build your personal cookbook with ingredients, steps, tags, and photos
• Share your creations: publish your recipes for friends or the whole community
• Discover new meals: explore dishes from food lovers around the world
• Stay organized: tag recipes by meal type, cuisine, or occasion
• Collaborate on menus: build recipe sets for events, families, or friends
• Plan ahead: add recipe ingredients to your shopping list
• Access offline: your saved recipes are always available, even without internet

Why you’ll love it:
• Keep all your recipes in one place
• Get inspired by a community of real home cooks
• Easy, fun, and free to use

Savour is more than recipes; it’s about saving, sharing, and savoring food together. Your social media app that keeps meals social. 

Download Savour today and start cooking your way.

Children should never be anxious about food, and as a result of BackPack Blessings, improvement has been seen in student test scores, attendance, and behavior.

Foodtruckers ApS tilbyder omfattende støtte, herunder finansieringsmuligheder, marketingstrategier og operationel vejledning. Name: Taco N Ganas, LLC
Description:
We didn’t launch with investors or a franchise model—just one truck, a small team, and a mission to support a local youth center. But Memphis showed up hungry, and what began as a passion project quickly grew into something bigger.

Today, Taconganas operates seven locations across the city, including two inside the FedEx Forum, with more on the horizon. We’re proud to serve authentic Mexican street food, made fresh and full of ganas—drive, hustle, and heart.

Our founder, Greg Diaz, was born in Mexico and came to the U.S. at age 12. The youngest of ten, he was raised on home-cooked meals and a spirit of hospitality that always made room at the table. That same culture of warmth and pride is at the heart of everything we do.

At Taconganas, every taco is made with purpose—bold flavors, real ingredients, and a deep love for the Memphis community that helped us grow.

“Con Dios nunca se pierde, con Dios siempre se gana.”
(With God, you never lose. With God, you always win.)

Name: Vanista
Description:
Yeni bir yolculuk başlıyor. Vanista, kahve tutkunlarına ve sağlıklı içecek arayanlara yepyeni bir deneyim sunmak için yola çıktı. İsmini “Van”dan alan mobil yapısıyla,“Barista” becerilerini ve sağlıklı içecek uzmanlığını birleştirerek, her nerede olursanız olun taptaze ve kaliteli içecekleri size getiriyor. Prodüksiyon çekimlerinden büyük etkinliklere, her an yanınızda olan Vanista, sadece kahve değil, taze meyve suları, sağlıklı smoothie’ler ve enerji veren içecekler ile de gününüze lezzet katıyor. Herkesin damak zevkine hitap eden bu içecekler, size hem enerji hem de keyif dolu anlar sunuyor.

Vanista'nın misyonu sadece kaliteli kahveyle sınırlı değil; sağlıklı içecek seçenekleriyle de her durakta tazelik ve yenilik sunmayı hedefliyor. Vanista, yolda, sette ya da etkinlik alanında durduğunda, sizlere hem sağlıklı hem de lezzetli bir mola sunuyor.

Over this time, we have accumulated extensive experience across various sectors — from serving factories and plants to organizing corporate events, educational institutions, private celebrations, and large-scale occasions. The pride of our company is our team. We are staffed with experienced chefs, waiters, coordinators, and logistics specialists who know their job and work in perfect harmony.
