Name: The Chili Whale LLC
Description:
Proudly Serving Delicious Chili & Making Waves for Conservation 

Welcome to The Chili Whale Food Truck, your go-to destination for mouthwatering chili dishes in Omaha, NE! 

Our Story:
At The Chili Whale, we're passionate about two things: Serving up the most delectable chili creations and saving the whales. Based out of Omaha, NE, our food truck is your one-stop-shop for satisfying your chili cravings while contributing to a worthy cause.

Our Mission:
Why whales? We just love them, and always have! And what better way to help these gentle giants than donating portion of every sale to the WDC (Whale and Dolphin Conservation). By indulging in our scrumptious chili dishes, you'll not only be treating your taste buds but also helping protect whales, dolphins and their respective habitats.

 What We Offer:
 Mouthwatering chili varieties, served in anything from cones to hotdogs
 Flavor-packed toppings and sides
 Expertly crafted recipes
 Sustainable dining experience

Join us on our culinary voyage that's not only about savoring the best chili in Omaha, but making a difference for our oceans. Follow us for updates, and together, let's support the WDC while enjoying a hearty bowl of chili!

Name: Nazdeeki
Description:
Nazdeeki is a local-first food-tech ecosystem designed to digitally connect restaurants, food shops, and local customers through one unified system that manages the entire food business workflow, not just food delivery.

It is a Food Business Operating System (Food OS) for the Indian market.   
 Today’s Indian Food Market Reality

Sellers use multiple platforms (POS, delivery apps, staff coordination tools)

High commissions reduce profit

Sellers don’t own customer data

Users face confusion, fake offers, price mismatch

Local food businesses remain invisible

No single system connects ordering, staff, menu, offers, reviews, events

 The ecosystem is fragmented, expensive, and unfair.

Nazdeeki exists to replace this fragmentation with one connected system.

Vi anser att äta ren, ekologisk mat inte borde innebära att kompromissa med smak eller att nöja sig med tråkiga sallader. Vårt mål är att visa dig att hälsosam mat kan vara läcker, varierad och spännande.

Name: Sweet Surrender Ice Cream
Description:
Welcome to our family-run pop-up ice cream shop, located in the picturesque city of Salem, Virginia! At our shop, we bring the joy of delightful frozen treats to our beloved community. We take great pride in serving only the finest ice cream sourced from Homestead Creamery, a renowned local dairy farm.

Our passion for ice cream runs deep, and we believe in creating unforgettable experiences for our customers. Whether you're a sweet tooth connoisseur, a casual ice cream enthusiast, or simply seeking a moment of indulgence, our shop is the perfect destination to satisfy your cravings.

What sets us apart is our commitment to quality and authenticity. Each scoop of ice cream is crafted with care, using the freshest ingredients and traditional recipes that have been passed down through generations. We take pride in supporting local farmers and businesses, ensuring that every bite is not only delicious but also a celebration of our community.

Name: DailyDish Pro
Description:
DailyDish.pro – The Smarter Way to Cook, Share, and Discover Recipes

DailyDish.pro is a modern recipe hub built for everyday cooks, food lovers, and creative home chefs who want more than just a static recipe collection. Our platform blends the warmth of a community-driven recipe site with the intelligence of AI-powered tools, making it easy to create, organize, and share meals that fit your lifestyle.

At its core, DailyDish.pro is about connection. You can upload your favorite family recipes, share them with friends, or explore a growing community library filled with dishes from people around the world. Whether it’s a passed-down comfort food, a quick weekday dinner, or a show-stopping dessert, DailyDish.pro keeps your recipes safe, organized, and accessible anywhere.

But we go a step further with built-in AI features designed to inspire and simplify your cooking journey. Stuck on what to make? Use our recipe generators to create personalized meal ideas in seconds. Snap a photo of ingredients and let the AI suggest complete recipes. Convert long blocks of text into structured, easy-to-follow recipes. Or simply let DailyDish.pro surprise you with creative dishes tailored to your preferences.

Planning meals is also effortless. Our meal planner and shopping list tools help you organize your week, cut down on food waste, and make grocery shopping more efficient. With smart features like random meal selectors, you’ll never run out of ideas again.

DailyDish.pro offers both free and pro membership tiers. Free members can enjoy community access and recipe sharing, while Pro unlocks advanced AI generation, enhanced storage, and exclusive features.

Whether you’re a beginner experimenting in the kitchen, a parent juggling family meals, or a seasoned cook looking to digitize and share your collection, DailyDish.pro brings recipes, inspiration, and community together in one easy-to-use platform.

Discover. Create. Share. Cook smarter with DailyDish.pro.

Name: Revo
Description:
Revo | Redefining Food Waste in Cambodia

At Revo, we’re on a mission to make food waste a thing of the past. Every day, restaurants, cafés, and grocery stores throw away perfectly good food — while millions struggle with affordability and access.

Revo bridges this gap by connecting local businesses with consumers through a simple, tech-driven marketplace. Surplus meals and products are sold at discounted prices, helping vendors recover value, customers save money, and communities reduce waste.

 Our Impact

* Tackling UN SDG 12: Responsible Consumption & Production
* Supporting Zero Hunger through affordable food access
* Reducing carbon emissions tied to wasted food

 Our Solution

A mobile-first platform where businesses list surplus food in real time, and customers discover affordable meals nearby. With AI-driven features in development — from smart demand matching to dynamic pricing — we’re creating a scalable model built for Cambodia and beyond.

 Our Vision

To become Southeast Asia’s leading food-waste reduction platform — saving food, saving money, and saving the planet, one meal at a time.

Name: Obstmontag
Description:
Unser Unternehmen ist spezialisiert auf die Organisation von Obstlieferungen für Unternehmen mit Standorten in ganz Deutschland. Unsere Kunden haben in uns einen zentralen Ansprechpartner, der sich um die Koordination und Abwicklung der Lieferungen kümmert.

Dank unserer Zusammenarbeit mit regionalen Obsthändlern und Lieferanten können wir sicherstellen, dass unsere Kunden stets frisches Obst und Gemüse höchster Qualität erhalten. Dabei ist uns besonders wichtig, dass unnötige Transportwege vermieden werden und die Waren schnell und zuverlässig beim Kunden ankommen.

Unser Ziel ist es, Unternehmen bei der Förderung der Gesundheit und Wohlbefindens ihrer Mitarbeiter zu unterstützen. Mit regelmäßigen Lieferungen von Obst und Gemüse tragen wir dazu bei, dass diese gesund und fit bleiben und sich bei der Arbeit wohlfühlen.

Profitieren auch Sie von unserem regionalen Obsthändlernetz! Wir übernehmen die komplette Abwicklung für Sie und sorgen dafür, dass Ihre Mitarbeiter regelmäßig mit frischem Obst und Gemüse versorgt werden. Kontaktieren Sie uns heute noch und lassen Sie uns gemeinsam für Ihre Mitarbeiter und Ihr Unternehmen etwas Gutes tun!

Obstmontag.de ist ein Angebot der Canus UG (haftungsbeschränkt) mit Sitz in Neumarkt/Opf.

Name: DailyDish Pro
Description:
DailyDish.pro – The Smarter Way to Cook, Share, and Discover Recipes

DailyDish.pro is a modern recipe hub built for everyday cooks, food lovers, and creative home chefs who want more than just a static recipe collection. Our platform blends the warmth of a community-driven recipe site with the intelligence of AI-powered tools, making it easy to create, organize, and share meals that fit your lifestyle.

At its core, DailyDish.pro is about connection. You can upload your favorite family recipes, share them with friends, or explore a growing community library filled with dishes from people around the world. Whether it’s a passed-down comfort food, a quick weekday dinner, or a show-stopping dessert, DailyDish.pro keeps your recipes safe, organized, and accessible anywhere.

But we go a step further with built-in AI features designed to inspire and simplify your cooking journey. Stuck on what to make? Use our recipe generators to create personalized meal ideas in seconds. Snap a photo of ingredients and let the AI suggest complete recipes. Convert long blocks of text into structured, easy-to-follow recipes. Or simply let DailyDish.pro surprise you with creative dishes tailored to your preferences.

Planning meals is also effortless. Our meal planner and shopping list tools help you organize your week, cut down on food waste, and make grocery shopping more efficient. With smart features like random meal selectors, you’ll never run out of ideas again.

DailyDish.pro offers both free and pro membership tiers. Free members can enjoy community access and recipe sharing, while Pro unlocks advanced AI generation, enhanced storage, and exclusive features.

Whether you’re a beginner experimenting in the kitchen, a parent juggling family meals, or a seasoned cook looking to digitize and share your collection, DailyDish.pro brings recipes, inspiration, and community together in one easy-to-use platform.

Discover. Create. Share. Cook smarter with DailyDish.pro.

Description:
Welcome to Vigusto, where passion for food and culinary experiences takes center stage. Founded by a dynamic duo driven by their love for gastronomy, Vigusto embodies the essence of indulging in life's flavors through a fusion of creativity, humor, and expertise.

Derived from the initials of the five senses – vision, taste, hearing, touch, and smell – Vigusto isn't just about savoring delicious dishes; it's about immersing oneself in the entire sensory journey of food.

Our flagship offerings include a curated selection of trendy and witty t-shirts adorned with playful and ironic food-themed slogans. From cheeky puns to clever wordplay, our designs capture the essence of our gastronomic adventures. Whether you're a self-proclaimed foodie or simply appreciate a good laugh, our apparel is sure to add flavor to your wardrobe.

But Vigusto isn't just about fashion; it's a lifestyle. We're passionate about sharing our love for food with the world, which is why we also host a variety of events, dinners, and cooking classes. From pasta-making workshops to pizza parties, our events are designed to inspire and educate, fostering a community of culinary enthusiasts eager to explore the boundless possibilities of the kitchen.

Vigusto is more than just a brand; it's a culinary movement. Join us as we embark on a journey to delight the senses and savor every moment, one delicious bite at a time.

Indulge your senses with Vigusto – where every taste, smell, sound, touch, and sight is a culinary adventure waiting to be explored!

We are committed to using quality ingredients and preparing our sandwiches with the utmost care and passion. Whether you're looking for a quick, satisfying lunch or catering for a special event, our food truck is ready to exceed your expectations.

Multicultural Marketplace:
Our platform connects customers with diverse local stores - from specialty cultural markets to mainstream grocers - enabling multi-store shopping in a single seamless session. We're bridging communities through authentic ingredients and cultural food access.

AI-Powered Experience:

Name: SmartCart
Description: SmartCart is a mobile app that helps users shop smarter, eat healthier, and cut food waste using built-in Gemini AI. Before shopping, users enter household size and activity level to estimate weekly calorie needs. After shopping, users scan their receipt. Gemini logs each item securely in a Firebase database, tracks total calories, estimates shelf life, and checks if your household can consume the food in time. If you’ve overbought, SmartCart alerts you, and suggests recipes and provides food expiry reminders. We used Google technologies like the Gemini Developer API and Firebase. Using Google AI Studio, we trained Gemini by fine-tuning our custom prompts. The app was built in Android Studio and is ready to launch on the Google Play Store. We developed on Chromebooks using Google Workspace and attended Google DevFest Singapore. There, we attended workshops and lectures by Google engineers to understand Gemini AI Studio.

Description:
About Lee's Caribbean Fixes
Mission Statement
"Lee's Caribbean Fixes is committed to delivering authentic Caribbean cuisine with a focus on convenience and innovation. Our goal is to transition to a fully autonomous operation, revolutionizing the way meals are manufactured, shipped, and delivered on demand."

Our Story
Founded in 2019 by John Lee Gauntlett, Lee's Caribbean Fixes started as a Caribbean meal delivery service out of a two-bedroom apartment in Orangeburg, South Carolina. Driven by a desire for independence and a passion for serving others, John has expanded the business into various segments over four years. Today, we offer catering, meal prep, vendor events, and personal chef services.

The Future
As we look ahead to 2023 and beyond, our vision is to become a fully autonomous operation, changing the landscape of meal delivery and catering services.

What really sets us apart and makes us so connected to the community is the Alsies App. It’s like having a direct line to your favorite ice cream truck! By seeing which neighborhoods have the most app downloads, we can tell exactly where the excitement is and they are ready for us to swing by.

Once you download the app, you’ll get notifications when the truck is coming to your neighborhood, plus real-time tracking so you’ll never miss us. Name: Uminari Ramen
Description:
Uminari Ramen is a small batch ramen brand bringing authentic Japanese street flavour to the East Coast of Scotland.

Founded from a decade long obsession with ramen culture, Uminari was built on the belief that great ramen should be bold, soulful, and cooked with care. Every bowl is prepared fresh by hand, using carefully developed recipes inspired by Japan’s street food scene and refined for Scottish markets.

We operate primarily as a market based food business, serving St Andrews, Dundee, Fife, Tayside, and Angus. Our focus is quality over scale, producing a limited number of bowls each day to ensure consistency, depth of flavour, and an unforgettable experience for every customer.

We specialize in handcrafted dishes like tamales, flautas, quesadillas, and other beloved staples, all made with recipes passed down through generations. Our journey has been built on hard work, family values, and strong community support.

Beyond the food, Delicias Lupita represents resilience, entrepreneurship, and the power of starting small. Today, while part of our team supports the business remotely—handling social media, digital organization, and cost management—our mission remains the same: to serve fresh, delicious meals that feel like home.

Whether you’ve been with us since the beginning or are trying our food for the first time, we’re happy to serve you.

Name: FOOD CRAFT
Description:
Food Craft: A Deep Dive into the Art and Science of Culinary Creation

Food has always been a central part of human existence. It sustains us, brings people together, and serves as an expression of culture, creativity, and innovation. As humanity evolved, so did the way we approach food, not just as a necessity but as an art form. Food craft, which encompasses the intricate techniques, skills, and artistry involved in preparing and presenting food, has become a powerful force in the culinary world. It bridges tradition with innovation, blending the culinary arts with science, culture, and sensory experiences.

This comprehensive guide delves into the concept of food craft, exploring its historical roots, its evolution, the intersection of food and culture, the modern-day innovations, and its role in sustainability. By the end of this journey, we will have a deep appreciation of how food craft has shaped, and continues to shape, our gastronomic experiences and traditions.

1. The Origins of Food Craft
The term “food craft” refers to the meticulous methods, creativity, and attention to detail applied in cooking, baking, fermenting, and preserving food. These techniques have evolved through centuries, rooted in the necessity of preparing safe and delicious food for survival.

In ancient times, food craft was based on available ingredients, climate, and local customs. People discovered ways to store, prepare, and cook food, gradually refining techniques through trial and error. From the intricate bread-making methods of ancient Egypt to the complex fermentation processes used in Asian cultures, early food crafts were essential for survival, culture preservation, and community building.

Over time, food craft became intertwined with cultural rituals and social customs. Specific methods, such as curing meats or fermenting alcohol, became art forms and sources of pride for different regions. Culinary craftsmanship was passed down through generations, evolving as new

Je suis chef à domicile pour les professionnels et je transforme vos bureaux, parkings, ateliers ou showrooms en restaurant éphémère avec show culinaire en direct. J’arrive avec tout le matériel : planchas, braseros, gaufriers, crêpières, barnums, camion frigo, fontaines à boissons… Vous profitez de l’instant, je m’occupe du reste. Jusqu’à 800 personnes.

 Mes spécialités
Pain perdu façon Philippe Etchebest, crêpes artisanales sucrées, galettes de sarrasin, gaufres de Bruxelles salées (morbier, lardons–comté, Morteau–cancoillotte, végétarienne), gaufres façon pizza pour les cocktails.
Côté sucré : Nutella, confitures, crème de marrons, chantilly maison, versions tiramisu et Paris-Brest.
Côté plats cuisinés : bœuf bourguignon / purée, blanquette de veau façon Etchebest / riz, paella royale, risottos crémeux.

 Ambiance feu & extérieur
Gaufres au feu de bois, soirées feu de camp livrées : pommes de terre en robe des champs, steaks, oignons, fromages, vin blanc en papillote, pavés de saumon, brochettes de chamallows pour finir la soirée.

 Matinales & afterworks
Petits-déjeuners livrés (thés et cafés artisanaux, viennoiseries) et fontaines à boissons/cocktails avec ou sans alcool pour vos soirées clients et vins d’honneur.

 Location de matériels: 
Braseros, vitabris 3x3, gaufriers, crêpières gaz, fontaines à eaux, percolateur 100 tasses, camion frigo 20 m³…

 Intervention en Franche-Comté et sur le canton de Vaud (Suisse), sous réserve de permis de travail établi par l’entreprise.

Whether you're craving a hearty plate of Seswaa, a comforting dish of Bogobe, or your favorite international cuisine, KuduDash ensures your meals are delivered swiftly and reliably.

Our Mission:
To provide every household in Botswana with access to their favorite meals, supporting local restaurants, empowering delivery professionals, and embracing Botswana’s culinary heritage.

What We Offer:

Fast & Reliable Food Delivery: From local eateries to fine dining, we connect you with the best restaurants in Botswana.
Celebrating Local Cuisine: Explore traditional favorites like Morogo, Dikgobe, and Magwinya through our curated "Taste of Botswana" section.
User-Friendly App: Seamlessly order meals with just a few taps, track your delivery in real time, and enjoy convenient payment options.
Empowering Local Businesses: We proudly partner with Botswana’s restaurants to boost visibility and grow their customer base.

Why Choose KuduDash?
We’re more than a delivery service—we’re a celebration of Botswana’s rich culture and a gateway to convenience. Our team is committed to excellence, ensuring every order arrives fresh, on time, and with a touch of local pride.

 The Future of Delivery in Botswana
KuduDash is not just about food. We're building a platform that will soon include groceries, home cleaning, and more—all tailored to Botswana's unique needs.

 Download the App Today: Experience fast, reliable, and locally inspired delivery like never before.

Partner with Us:
Are you a restaurant or food vendor? Join the KuduDash network and grow your business with us.

Name: C'Basilic&Go
Description:
C'Basilic&Go – Une startup foodtech en compétition pour Graine de Boîte !   

C'Basilic&Go est une entreprise fictive créée dans le cadre du concours **Graine de Boîte** en région Centre-Val de Loire. Ce challenge entrepreneurial nous permet d’explorer le monde de l’innovation en simulant le développement d’une startup réelle, de l’idée à la stratégie de lancement. À travers ce projet, nous expérimentons la gestion d’entreprise, le marketing et la viabilité économique d’un concept novateur.  

 Notre concept : une solution foodtech qui révolutionne la pause déjeuner en proposant des repas sains, équilibrés et préparés avec des produits locaux

 NOS 6 VALEURS, NOTRE ENGAGEMENT 

Chez C'Basilic&Go, nous plaçons nos valeurs au cœur de notre démarche pour offrir des repas qui allient goût, santé et responsabilité.

 ANCRAGE TERRITORIAL – "Ici commence la saveur, là, où vous êtes."
Nous privilégions les circuits courts et collaborons avec les producteurs locaux pour garantir des ingrédients frais et de qualité.

 SAIN – "La santé dans chaque bouchée."
Nos repas sont conçus pour être équilibrés et nutritifs, adaptés aux besoins de chacun.

 QUALITATIF – "L’Excellence, dans chaque bouchée."
Chaque plat est préparé avec soin pour offrir une expérience gustative unique et savoureuse.

 TRANSPARENT – "Nos engagements sont transparents, nos produits aussi."
Nous nous engageons à une totale transparence sur la provenance de nos ingrédients et nos procédés de fabrication.

 BIO – "Le bio, c'est plus qu'un choix, c'est un engagement."
Nous intégrons des options biologiques pour une alimentation plus saine et respectueuse de l’environnement.

 RESPECT DE L’ENVIRONNEMENT – "Protéger la planète, une assiette à la fois."
Nous réduisons notre impact écologique grâce à des emballages réutilisables et une logistique optimisée.

Name: Restaurante Típico Paseo El Carmen
Description:
Restaurante Típico Paseo El Carmen specialized in authentic Salvadoran traditional appetizers, strategically located in Santa Tecla's popular tourist area of Paseo El Carmen.

Originally promoted by Santa Tecla's municipal government as part of the tourist district development, the restaurant later pivoted its business model to focus on private events and meetings, adapting to market demands and customer preferences.

Operating primarily on weekends, the restaurant served both local residents and tourists visiting the Paseo El Carmen area, contributing to the cultural and culinary landscape of La Libertad region.

Key services:
- Traditional Salvadoran appetizers and cuisine
- Private event catering and hosting
- Weekend operations in tourist district
- Cultural dining experience

The business demonstrated adaptability and strategic thinking by successfully transitioning from a tourist-focused model to private event services, showcasing entrepreneurial flexibility in a dynamic market environment.
